Source code snippets

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Quick start

Requirements

  • Node.js 20+
  • Codex CLI installed, verified with codex --version, and authenticated (Homebrew or npm are both fine; do not reinstall @openai/codex with npm if Homebrew already owns codex)
  • Codex auth configured and visible in the same shell/profile that will run OMX
  • tmux on macOS/Linux if you want the recommended durable team runtime
  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

A good first session

After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor
codex login status
omx exec --skip-git-repo-check -C . "Reply with exactly OMX-EXEC-OK"

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

Madmax and worktree launch safety

--madmax is OMX shorthand for Codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. It removes the normal approval and sandbox guardrails, so only use it in trusted repositories and environments. --high is shorthand for -c model_reasoning_effort="high".

When you use --madmax from a git repository, prefer a worktree launch instead of running directly in the current checkout. For repeatable or concurrent work, use a named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high

If you are outside a git repository, omit --worktree; worktree launches require Git.

For concurrent --madmax sessions, do not run them all in the same directory. Give each session its own named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high
omx --worktree=fix/flaky-tests --madmax --high

--worktree / -w with no name creates or reuses a detached launch worktree at ../.omx-worktrees/launch-detached. --worktree=, --worktree , or -w creates or reuses a named launch worktree under ../.omx-worktrees/ and checks out that branch name. OMX consumes the worktree flag before starting Codex; it is not forwarded to Codex itself. Treat the unnamed detached form as a one-off convenience: if the source checkout advances after that worktree is created, a later unnamed launch can fail with worktree_target_mismatch because launch-detached still points at the old HEAD. Use a named worktree for repeated work, or remove the old detached worktree before retrying. If the target launch worktree is already dirty, OMX warns and launches as-is, so clean, commit, or stash that worktree before relying on it for isolation.

For omx team, workers already use dedicated worktrees automatically by default; --worktree on omx team is only a legacy-compatible override.

If you want a one-off launch with no OMX tmux/HUD management, use --direct:

omx --direct --yolo

For a persistent shell/profile preference, set an environment policy:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --yolo

Return to the auto/default behavior with:

unset OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY

CLI policy flags win over the environment, and the last CLI policy flag before -- wins:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

Physical Rename Rule

Before a folder is moved, add an explicit mapping row using:

old_path -> proposed_path | classification | move_status | evidence

For gitlinks, also reconcile .gitmodules before moving.

Top-Level Triage

Use this when scanning the root directory. Status is intentionally conservative: keep-current means the current path remains the source of truth for now.

Current Path Triage Status
`/Users/jun/Developer/codex/.agen

000/03_overview_canonical_map.md

Overview Canonical Map

This map resolves the apparent duplication between /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without deleting or moving files.

Canonical Rule

  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.
  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ is the deep overview source set.
  • If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> first for orientation,
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> for detailed analysis.
  • If content is identical, treat /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> as the navigation copy and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.

Paired Overview Files

Filename /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ bytes /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ bytes Equal Rule
00_ag_overview.md 27224 15790 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_ai_overview.md 25716 25716 yes duplicate content; defer dedupe until link audit
00_ay_overview.md 3815 798 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cc_overview.md 25990 27537 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_co_overview.md 41569 17061 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cp_overview.md 23525 6854 no keep both: orientation plus detail

000/00_harness-index.md (excerpt)

Harness Source Index

This file is the non-conflicting 000/ index for source-repository harnesses.

The canonical deep overview files stay under /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/. Files in /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000 named 00_harness-index_* are short routing/index notes only. They intentionally avoid the canonical 00_<prefix>_overview.md basename so wiki/backlink indexers do not see two files with the same 00_*_overview identity.

Routing

Prefix Index stub Canonical overview Classification
hermes /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_hermes.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_hermes_overview.md standalone source-based agent runtime
omc /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_omc.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_omc_overview.md Claude Code host-dependent orchestration harness
omx /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_omx.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_omx_overview.md Codex host-dependent control plane
omo /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_omo.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_omo_overview.md OpenCode host-dependent harness plus Codex Light adapter
lc n/a /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_lc_overview.md LazyCodex / Codex Light distribution wrapper for OmO
sp n/a /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_sp_overview.md Superpowers multi-harness skills/bootstrap methodology layer

  overview-index/
  deep-overview/
  axes/

Physical Rename Rule

Before a folder is moved, add an explicit mapping row using:

old_path -> proposed_path | classification | move_status | evidence

For gitlinks, also reconcile .gitmodules before moving.

Top-Level Triage

Use this when scanning the root directory. Status is intentionally conservative: keep-current means the current path remains the source of truth for now.

Current Path Triage Status
`/Users/jun/Developer/codex/.agen

000/03_overview_canonical_map.md

Overview Canonical Map

This map resolves the apparent duplication between /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without deleting or moving files.

Canonical Rule

  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.
  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ is the deep overview source set.
  • If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> first for orientation,
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> for detailed analysis.
  • If content is identical, treat /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> as the navigation copy and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.

Paired Overview Files

Filename /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ bytes /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ bytes Equal Rule
00_ag_overview.md 27224 15790 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_ai_overview.md 25716 25716 yes duplicate content; defer dedupe until link audit
00_ay_overview.md 3815 798 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cc_overview.md 25990 27537 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_co_overview.md 41569 17061 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cp_overview.md 23525 6854 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cr_overview.md 3216 595 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_ge_overview.md 47345 35414 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_gr_overview.md 3310 546 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_ki_overview.md 3360 692 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_oc_overview.md 43650 33628 no keep both: orientation plus detail

Deep-Overview Only Files

These exist under /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without same-name files under /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/:

00_hermes_overview.md
00_lc_overview.md
00_newharness_vs_cli-jaw_synthesis.md
00_omc_overview.md
00_omo_overview.md

00_sp_overview.md

Index-Only Files

00_harness-index.md

01_corpus_navigation_map.md
02_corpus_move_candidates.md

000/00_harness-index.md (발췌)

Harness Source Index

This file is the non-conflicting 000/ index for source-repository harnesses.

The canonical deep overview files stay under /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/. Files in /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000 named 00_harness-index_* are short routing/index notes only. They intentionally avoid the canonical 00_<prefix>_overview.md basename so wiki/backlink indexers do not see two files with the same 00_*_overview identity.

Routing

Prefix Index stub Canonical overview Classification
hermes /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_hermes.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_hermes_overview.md standalone source-based agent runtime
omc /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_omc.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_omc_overview.md Claude Code host-dependent orchestration harness
omx /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_omx.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_omx_overview.md Codex host-dependent control plane
omo /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/00_harness-index_omo.md /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_omo_overview.md OpenCode host-dependent harness plus Codex Light adapter
lc n/a /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_lc_overview.md LazyCodex / Codex Light distribution wrapper for OmO
sp n/a /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/00_sp_overview.md Superpowers multi-harness skills/bootstrap methodology layer

Topics covered

  • Corpus axis index

Source code snippets

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Quick start

Requirements

  • Node.js 20+
  • Codex CLI installed, verified with codex --version, and authenticated (Homebrew or npm are both fine; do not reinstall @openai/codex with npm if Homebrew already owns codex)
  • Codex auth configured and visible in the same shell/profile that will run OMX
  • tmux on macOS/Linux if you want the recommended durable team runtime
  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

A good first session

After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor
codex login status
omx exec --skip-git-repo-check -C . "Reply with exactly OMX-EXEC-OK"

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

Madmax and worktree launch safety

--madmax is OMX shorthand for Codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. It removes the normal approval and sandbox guardrails, so only use it in trusted repositories and environments. --high is shorthand for -c model_reasoning_effort="high".

When you use --madmax from a git repository, prefer a worktree launch instead of running directly in the current checkout. For repeatable or concurrent work, use a named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high

If you are outside a git repository, omit --worktree; worktree launches require Git.

For concurrent --madmax sessions, do not run them all in the same directory. Give each session its own named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high
omx --worktree=fix/flaky-tests --madmax --high

--worktree / -w with no name creates or reuses a detached launch worktree at ../.omx-worktrees/launch-detached. --worktree=, --worktree , or -w creates or reuses a named launch worktree under ../.omx-worktrees/ and checks out that branch name. OMX consumes the worktree flag before starting Codex; it is not forwarded to Codex itself. Treat the unnamed detached form as a one-off convenience: if the source checkout advances after that worktree is created, a later unnamed launch can fail with worktree_target_mismatch because launch-detached still points at the old HEAD. Use a named worktree for repeated work, or remove the old detached worktree before retrying. If the target launch worktree is already dirty, OMX warns and launches as-is, so clean, commit, or stash that worktree before relying on it for isolation.

For omx team, workers already use dedicated worktrees automatically by default; --worktree on omx team is only a legacy-compatible override.

If you want a one-off launch with no OMX tmux/HUD management, use --direct:

omx --direct --yolo

For a persistent shell/profile preference, set an environment policy:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --yolo

Return to the auto/default behavior with:

unset OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY

CLI policy flags win over the environment, and the last CLI policy flag before -- wins:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

Main analysis

Installation & Verification — Official README/documentation excerpt + corpus cross-reference.

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Quick start

Requirements

  • Node.js 20+
  • Codex CLI installed, verified with codex --version, and authenticated (Homebrew or npm are both fine; do not reinstall @openai/codex with npm if Homebrew already owns codex)
  • Codex auth configured and visible in the same shell/profile that will run OMX
  • tmux on macOS/Linux if you want the recommended durable team runtime
  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

A good first session

After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor
codex login status
omx exec --skip-git-repo-check -C . "Reply with exactly OMX-EXEC-OK"

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

Madmax and worktree launch safety

--madmax is OMX shorthand for Codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. It removes the normal approval and sandbox guardrails, so only use it in trusted repositories and environments. --high is shorthand for -c model_reasoning_effort="high".

When you use --madmax from a git repository, prefer a worktree launch instead of running directly in the current checkout. For repeatable or concurrent work, use a named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high

If you are outside a git repository, omit --worktree; worktree launches require Git.

For concurrent --madmax sessions, do not run them all in the same directory. Give each session its own named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high
omx --worktree=fix/flaky-tests --madmax --high

--worktree / -w with no name creates or reuses a detached launch worktree at ../.omx-worktrees/launch-detached. --worktree=, --worktree , or -w creates or reuses a named launch worktree under ../.omx-worktrees/ and checks out that branch name. OMX consumes the worktree flag before starting Codex; it is not forwarded to Codex itself. Treat the unnamed detached form as a one-off convenience: if the source checkout advances after that worktree is created, a later unnamed launch can fail with worktree_target_mismatch because launch-detached still points at the old HEAD. Use a named worktree for repeated work, or remove the old detached worktree before retrying. If the target launch worktree is already dirty, OMX warns and launches as-is, so clean, commit, or stash that worktree before relying on it for isolation.

For omx team, workers already use dedicated worktrees automatically by default; --worktree on omx team is only a legacy-compatible override.

If you want a one-off launch with no OMX tmux/HUD management, use --direct:

omx --direct --yolo

For a persistent shell/profile preference, set an environment policy:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --yolo

Return to the auto/default behavior with:

unset OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY

CLI policy flags win over the environment, and the last CLI policy flag before -- wins:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. 05

Agent workflow

Agent workflow

Overview

Agent workflow — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • Daily edit, tool, and commit loop for this harness.

  • 171_oh-my-codex/README.md

    1. $deep-interview — clarify scope when the request or boundaries are still vague.
    1. $ralplan — turn that clarified scope into an approved architecture and implementation plan.
    1. $ultragoal — make the approved plan durable as sequential Codex goals with .omx/ultragoal ledger checkpoints.
  • $ralplan stops at planning artifacts and a durable consensus handoff. Code changes require an explicit execution lane ($ultragoal, $team, or an intentional $ralph fallback); ralplan does not implement directly.
  • Inside an Ultragoal story, use $team only when that story benefits from coordinated parallel execution. Use $ralph as an intentional alternate completion loop when you do not need a durable multi-goal ledger.

Topics covered

  • Agent workflow
  • Recommended workflow

Source snippets

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Quick start

Requirements

  • Node.js 20+
  • Codex CLI installed, verified with codex --version, and authenticated (Homebrew or npm are both fine; do not reinstall @openai/codex with npm if Homebrew already owns codex)
  • Codex auth configured and visible in the same shell/profile that will run OMX
  • tmux on macOS/Linux if you want the recommended durable team runtime
  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

A good first session

After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor
codex login status
omx exec --skip-git-repo-check -C . "Reply with exactly OMX-EXEC-OK"

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

Madmax and worktree launch safety

--madmax is OMX shorthand for Codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. It removes the normal approval and sandbox guardrails, so only use it in trusted repositories and environments. --high is shorthand for -c model_reasoning_effort="high".

When you use --madmax from a git repository, prefer a worktree launch instead of running directly in the current checkout. For repeatable or concurrent work, use a named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high

If you are outside a git repository, omit --worktree; worktree launches require Git.

For concurrent --madmax sessions, do not run them all in the same directory. Give each session its own named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high
omx --worktree=fix/flaky-tests --madmax --high

--worktree / -w with no name creates or reuses a detached launch worktree at ../.omx-worktrees/launch-detached. --worktree=, --worktree , or -w creates or reuses a named launch worktree under ../.omx-worktrees/ and checks out that branch name. OMX consumes the worktree flag before starting Codex; it is not forwarded to Codex itself. Treat the unnamed detached form as a one-off convenience: if the source checkout advances after that worktree is created, a later unnamed launch can fail with worktree_target_mismatch because launch-detached still points at the old HEAD. Use a named worktree for repeated work, or remove the old detached worktree before retrying. If the target launch worktree is already dirty, OMX warns and launches as-is, so clean, commit, or stash that worktree before relying on it for isolation.

For omx team, workers already use dedicated worktrees automatically by default; --worktree on omx team is only a legacy-compatible override.

If you want a one-off launch with no OMX tmux/HUD management, use --direct:

omx --direct --yolo

For a persistent shell/profile preference, set an environment policy:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --yolo

Return to the auto/default behavior with:

unset OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY

CLI policy flags win over the environment, and the last CLI policy flag before -- wins:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

Main analysis

The daily edit/tool/commit loop for this harness.

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Recommended workflow

  1. $deep-interview — clarify scope when the request or boundaries are still vague.
  2. $ralplan — turn that clarified scope into an approved architecture and implementation plan.
  3. $ultragoal — make the approved plan durable as sequential Codex goals with .omx/ultragoal ledger checkpoints.

$ralplan stops at planning artifacts and a durable consensus handoff. Code changes require an explicit execution lane ($ultragoal, $team, or an intentional $ralph fallback); ralplan does not implement directly.

Inside an Ultragoal story, use $team only when that story benefits from coordinated parallel execution. Use $ralph as an intentional alternate completion loop when you do not need a durable multi-goal ledger.

OMX Orchestration

Codex above tmux + MCP + .omx/.

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Korean corpus (reference)

에이전트 루프

이 하네스의 일상적인 편집·도구·커밋 루프.

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Recommended workflow

  1. $deep-interview — clarify scope when the request or boundaries are still vague.
  2. $ralplan — turn that clarified scope into an approved architecture and implementation plan.
  3. $ultragoal — make the approved plan durable as sequential Codex goals with .omx/ultragoal ledger checkpoints.

$ralplan stops at planning artifacts and a durable consensus handoff. Code changes require an explicit execution lane ($ultragoal, $team, or an intentional $ralph fallback); ralplan does not implement directly.

Inside an Ultragoal story, use $team only when that story benefits from coordinated parallel execution. Use $ralph as an intentional alternate completion loop when you do not need a durable multi-goal ledger.

OMX 오케스트레이션

Codex 위 tmux + MCP + .omx/.

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

06

Config & models

Config & models

Overview

Config & models — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • CLI flags, environment, and project config layers.

  • See 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md and official docs.

Topics covered

  • Config & models

Source snippets

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Quick start

Requirements

  • Node.js 20+
  • Codex CLI installed, verified with codex --version, and authenticated (Homebrew or npm are both fine; do not reinstall @openai/codex with npm if Homebrew already owns codex)
  • Codex auth configured and visible in the same shell/profile that will run OMX
  • tmux on macOS/Linux if you want the recommended durable team runtime
  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

A good first session

After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor
codex login status
omx exec --skip-git-repo-check -C . "Reply with exactly OMX-EXEC-OK"

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

Madmax and worktree launch safety

--madmax is OMX shorthand for Codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. It removes the normal approval and sandbox guardrails, so only use it in trusted repositories and environments. --high is shorthand for -c model_reasoning_effort="high".

When you use --madmax from a git repository, prefer a worktree launch instead of running directly in the current checkout. For repeatable or concurrent work, use a named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high

If you are outside a git repository, omit --worktree; worktree launches require Git.

For concurrent --madmax sessions, do not run them all in the same directory. Give each session its own named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high
omx --worktree=fix/flaky-tests --madmax --high

--worktree / -w with no name creates or reuses a detached launch worktree at ../.omx-worktrees/launch-detached. --worktree=, --worktree , or -w creates or reuses a named launch worktree under ../.omx-worktrees/ and checks out that branch name. OMX consumes the worktree flag before starting Codex; it is not forwarded to Codex itself. Treat the unnamed detached form as a one-off convenience: if the source checkout advances after that worktree is created, a later unnamed launch can fail with worktree_target_mismatch because launch-detached still points at the old HEAD. Use a named worktree for repeated work, or remove the old detached worktree before retrying. If the target launch worktree is already dirty, OMX warns and launches as-is, so clean, commit, or stash that worktree before relying on it for isolation.

For omx team, workers already use dedicated worktrees automatically by default; --worktree on omx team is only a legacy-compatible override.

If you want a one-off launch with no OMX tmux/HUD management, use --direct:

omx --direct --yolo

For a persistent shell/profile preference, set an environment policy:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --yolo

Return to the auto/default behavior with:

unset OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY

CLI policy flags win over the environment, and the last CLI policy flag before -- wins:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

Main analysis

CLI/env/project settings file hierarchy.

See 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md and official docs.

Korean corpus (reference)

설정 & 모델

CLI / env / 프로젝트 설정 파일 계층.

See 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md and official docs.

07

Overview §1

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §1 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • OMX는 npm 글로벌 패키지로 omx 단일 바이너리를 노출한다. package.json:
  • "bin": { "omx": "dist/cli/omx.js" },
  • "main": "dist/index.js"
  • src/cli/omx.ts는 얇은 부트스트랩이다. dist/cli/index.js의 main()을 동적 import하고, rememberOmxLaunchContext()로 실행 컨텍스트를 기록한 뒤, mcp-serve 서브커맨드가 아니면 즉시 process.exit() 한다(MCP 서버는 stdio 루프를 유지해야 하므로 예외):
  • src/cli/omx.ts:
    1. rememberOmxLaunchContext() // 런치 컨텍스트 기록 (utils/paths)
    1. dist/cli/index.js 존재 확인 // 없으면 "run npm run build first"
    1. main(process.argv.slice(2)) // 실제 디스패치
    1. argv[2] !== 'mcp-serve' → exit // MCP 서버는 살아있어야 함
  • 실제 서브커맨드 라우팅은 src/cli/index.ts의 거대한 switch에 있다(라인 1662~). 사용자 가시 명령 군:
  • 설치/진단: setup, doctor, update, uninstall, cleanup, auth, list, version, status
  • 워크플로우: ralph, ultragoal, performance-goal, autoresearch, autoresearch-goal, team

Topics covered

    1. 시스템 기동
    1. 시스템 기동
  • 1.1 CLI 진입점
  • 1.2 명령 디스패치 (src/cli/index.ts)
  • 1.3 omx setup — 설치 표면
  • 1.4 omx doctor — 설치 검증
  • 1.5 실행 표면 감지 (codex-execution-surface.ts)

Source code snippets

README / docs

"bin": { "omx": "dist/cli/omx.js" },
"main": "dist/index.js"

README / docs

src/cli/omx.ts:
  1. rememberOmxLaunchContext()       // 런치 컨텍스트 기록 (utils/paths)
  2. dist/cli/index.js 존재 확인       // 없으면 "run npm run build first"
  3. main(process.argv.slice(2))      // 실제 디스패치
  4. argv[2] !== 'mcp-serve' → exit   // MCP 서버는 살아있어야 함

README / docs

설치/진단:   setup, doctor, update, uninstall, cleanup, auth, list, version, status
워크플로우:   ralph, ultragoal, performance-goal, autoresearch, autoresearch-goal, team
탐색/실행:   explore(deprecated), sparkshell, exec, ask, question, imagegen, adapt
런타임:      hud, sidecar, tmux-hook, reasoning, cancel
MCP 패리티:  state, notepad, project-memory, trace, code-intel, wiki, mcp-serve
훅:         hooks, codex-native-hook

README / docs

설치 대상 (src/cli/setup.ts):
  ~/.codex/skills/        ← skills/*/SKILL.md (46개)
  ~/.codex/prompts/       ← prompts/*.md (37개 역할 프롬프트)
  ~/.codex/agents/        ← generateAgentToml() 로 네이티브 agent TOML 생성
  AGENTS.md               ← templates/AGENTS.md (OMX 운영 계약) + 마커 오버레이
  MCP 레지스트리           ← mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock / hasFirstPartyOmxMcpRegistrations
  Codex hooks 설정          ← mergeManagedCodexHooksConfig (config/codex-hooks.ts)

README / docs

Check 1   Codex CLI 설치 여부 (checkCodexCli)
Check 2   Node.js 버전 (checkNodeVersion)
Check 2.5 Explore 하니스 준비 상태 (checkExploreHarness)
Check 3   Codex home 디렉토리 (paths.codexHomeDir)
Check 4   Config 파일 (checkConfig)
Check 4.1 모델 컨텍스트 권장 (checkModelContextRecommendation)
Check 4.25 네이티브 훅 커버리지 (checkNativeHooks → getMissingManagedCodexHookEvents)
... (MCP 레지스트리, 스킬/프롬프트/에이전트 설치 상태 등)

Main analysis

1. System startup

1. System startup

1.1 CLI entry point

OMX exposes a single omx binary as an npm global package. package.json:

"bin": { "omx": "dist/cli/omx.js" },
"main": "dist/index.js"

src/cli/omx.ts is a thin bootstrap. Dynamically import main() from dist/cli/index.js, record the execution context with rememberOmxLaunchContext(), then immediately process.exit() unless it is a mcp-serve subcommand (except for the MCP server, which must maintain a stdio loop):

src/cli/omx.ts:
  1. rememberOmxLaunchContext()       // 런치 컨텍스트 기록 (utils/paths)
  2. dist/cli/index.js 존재 확인       // 없으면 "run npm run build first"
  3. main(process.argv.slice(2))      // 실제 디스패치
  4. argv[2] !== 'mcp-serve' → exit   // MCP 서버는 살아있어야 함

1.2 Command dispatch (src/cli/index.ts)

The actual subcommand routing is in the huge switch in src/cli/index.ts (lines 1662~). User visible command family:

설치/진단:   setup, doctor, update, uninstall, cleanup, auth, list, version, status
워크플로우:   ralph, ultragoal, performance-goal, autoresearch, autoresearch-goal, team
탐색/실행:   explore(deprecated), sparkshell, exec, ask, question, imagegen, adapt
런타임:      hud, sidecar, tmux-hook, reasoning, cancel
MCP 패리티:  state, notepad, project-memory, trace, code-intel, wiki, mcp-serve
훅:         hooks, codex-native-hook

Key design point: omx is not its own agent, but a control plane that drives and supports Codex. setup installs the assets, and runtime commands (team/ralph/hud/sparkshell) orchestrate the Codex session on top of tmux.

Summary of key commands/surfaces (src/cli/index.ts):

command Category Role tmux/runtime
omx setup Installation Install skill/prompt/agent/MCP/AGENTS.md/hook ❌
omx doctor Diagnosis Installation/Hook/MCP/Model Context Check ❌
omx update / uninstall / cleanup Management update/remove/stale cleanup ❌
omx team [N:type] "<task>" runtime tmux split N-walker orchestration ✅
omx ralph "<task>" runtime Continuous single-owned completion/verification loop ✅
omx ultragoal / performance-goal runtime Goals/Performance Goals Workflow ✅
omx autoresearch [-goal] Workflow validator-gated research output some
omx sparkshell Navigation read-only shell surface (Rust) Select
omx explore Navigation deprecated Whitelist Harness (Rust) ❌
omx hud [--watch/--tmux/--json] Observation Workflow status HUD Select
omx sidecar / tmux-hook Observation tmux secondary process attachment ✅
omx state/notepad/project-memory/trace/code-intel/wiki MCP Parity CLI/JSON surfaces in MCP tools ❌
omx mcp-serve <target> MCP stdio MCP server startup ❌
omx codex-native-hook hook native hook handler entry point ❌
omx question / ask Interaction deep-interview question renderer / single-shot query Select
omx cancel / status control Cancel mode / Check status ❌

1.3 omx setup — Installation surface

The src/cli/setup.ts header comment specifies: "Installs skills, prompts, MCP servers config, and AGENTS.md". The import surface reveals what is being installed:

설치 대상 (src/cli/setup.ts):
  ~/.codex/skills/        ← skills/*/SKILL.md (46개)
  ~/.codex/prompts/       ← prompts/*.md (37개 역할 프롬프트)
  ~/.codex/agents/        ← generateAgentToml() 로 네이티브 agent TOML 생성
  AGENTS.md               ← templates/AGENTS.md (OMX 운영 계약) + 마커 오버레이
  MCP 레지스트리           ← mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock / hasFirstPartyOmxMcpRegistrations
  Codex hooks 설정          ← mergeManagedCodexHooksConfig (config/codex-hooks.ts)

Installation is divided into legacy mode (direct installation of native agent/prompt) and plugin mode (plugins/oh-my-codex discovery). plugin mode archives/removes the OMX-management prompt/agent TOML (README.md:90) so that stale role files do not obscure its behavior.

1.4 omx doctor — Verify installation

src/cli/doctor.ts diagnoses the installation status by accumulating the Check { name, status: "pass"|"warn"|"fail" } array. Key checks:

Check 1   Codex CLI 설치 여부 (checkCodexCli)
Check 2   Node.js 버전 (checkNodeVersion)
Check 2.5 Explore 하니스 준비 상태 (checkExploreHarness)
Check 3   Codex home 디렉토리 (paths.codexHomeDir)
Check 4   Config 파일 (checkConfig)
Check 4.1 모델 컨텍스트 권장 (checkModelContextRecommendation)
Check 4.25 네이티브 훅 커버리지 (checkNativeHooks → getMissingManagedCodexHookEvents)
... (MCP 레지스트리, 스킬/프롬프트/에이전트 설치 상태 등)

1.5 Execution surface detection (codex-execution-surface.ts)

OMX classifies at runtime what environment the same session runs in (src/scripts/codex-execution-surface.ts). Two axes:

  • launcher: "native" (Codex App/native session) vs "cli" (omx CLI launcher)
  • transport: "attached-tmux" ($TMUX exists) vs "outside-tmux"

This classification drives the runtime availability gate in §5.2. For example, launcher: "native" + transport: "outside-tmux" will fallback to the App-safe surface without directly activating the tmux-dependent workflow ($team). Compare nativeSessionId and persistent session (persistedSession.native_session_id) to determine native/CLI.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

1. 시스템 기동

1. 시스템 기동

1.1 CLI 진입점

OMX는 npm 글로벌 패키지로 omx 단일 바이너리를 노출한다. package.json:

"bin": { "omx": "dist/cli/omx.js" },
"main": "dist/index.js"

src/cli/omx.ts는 얇은 부트스트랩이다. dist/cli/index.js의 main()을 동적 import하고, rememberOmxLaunchContext()로 실행 컨텍스트를 기록한 뒤, mcp-serve 서브커맨드가 아니면 즉시 process.exit() 한다(MCP 서버는 stdio 루프를 유지해야 하므로 예외):

src/cli/omx.ts:
  1. rememberOmxLaunchContext()       // 런치 컨텍스트 기록 (utils/paths)
  2. dist/cli/index.js 존재 확인       // 없으면 "run npm run build first"
  3. main(process.argv.slice(2))      // 실제 디스패치
  4. argv[2] !== 'mcp-serve' → exit   // MCP 서버는 살아있어야 함

1.2 명령 디스패치 (src/cli/index.ts)

실제 서브커맨드 라우팅은 src/cli/index.ts의 거대한 switch에 있다(라인 1662~). 사용자 가시 명령 군:

설치/진단:   setup, doctor, update, uninstall, cleanup, auth, list, version, status
워크플로우:   ralph, ultragoal, performance-goal, autoresearch, autoresearch-goal, team
탐색/실행:   explore(deprecated), sparkshell, exec, ask, question, imagegen, adapt
런타임:      hud, sidecar, tmux-hook, reasoning, cancel
MCP 패리티:  state, notepad, project-memory, trace, code-intel, wiki, mcp-serve
훅:         hooks, codex-native-hook

핵심 설계 포인트: omx는 자체 에이전트가 아니라 Codex를 구동·보조하는 컨트롤 플레인이다. setup이 자산을 설치하고, 런타임 명령(team/ralph/hud/sparkshell)이 Codex 세션을 tmux 위에서 오케스트레이션한다.

주요 명령/표면 요약(src/cli/index.ts):

명령 분류 역할 tmux/런타임
omx setup 설치 스킬/프롬프트/에이전트/MCP/AGENTS.md/훅 설치 ❌
omx doctor 진단 설치/훅/MCP/모델 컨텍스트 점검 ❌
omx update / uninstall / cleanup 관리 갱신/제거/stale 정리 ❌
omx team [N:type] "<task>" 런타임 tmux 분할 N-워커 오케스트레이션 ✅
omx ralph "<task>" 런타임 지속 단일소유 완료/검증 루프 ✅
omx ultragoal / performance-goal 런타임 목표/성능 목표 워크플로우 ✅
omx autoresearch [-goal] 워크플로우 validator-gated 연구 산출물 일부
omx sparkshell 탐색 read-only 셸 표면(Rust) 선택
omx explore 탐색 deprecated 화이트리스트 하니스(Rust) ❌
omx hud [--watch/--tmux/--json] 관찰 워크플로우 상태 HUD 선택
omx sidecar / tmux-hook 관찰 tmux 보조 프로세스 부착 ✅
omx state/notepad/project-memory/trace/code-intel/wiki MCP 패리티 MCP 도구의 CLI/JSON 표면 ❌
omx mcp-serve <target> MCP stdio MCP 서버 기동 ❌
omx codex-native-hook 훅 네이티브 훅 핸들러 진입점 ❌
omx question / ask 상호작용 deep-interview 질문 렌더러 / 단발 질의 선택
omx cancel / status 제어 모드 취소 / 상태 조회 ❌

1.3 omx setup — 설치 표면

src/cli/setup.ts 헤더 주석이 명시한다: "Installs skills, prompts, MCP servers config, and AGENTS.md". import 표면을 보면 설치 대상이 드러난다:

설치 대상 (src/cli/setup.ts):
  ~/.codex/skills/        ← skills/*/SKILL.md (46개)
  ~/.codex/prompts/       ← prompts/*.md (37개 역할 프롬프트)
  ~/.codex/agents/        ← generateAgentToml() 로 네이티브 agent TOML 생성
  AGENTS.md               ← templates/AGENTS.md (OMX 운영 계약) + 마커 오버레이
  MCP 레지스트리           ← mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock / hasFirstPartyOmxMcpRegistrations
  Codex hooks 설정          ← mergeManagedCodexHooksConfig (config/codex-hooks.ts)

설치는 legacy 모드(네이티브 agent/prompt 직접 설치)와 plugin 모드(plugins/oh-my-codex 디스커버리)로 갈린다. plugin 모드는 stale 역할 파일이 동작을 가리지 않도록 OMX-관리 prompt/agent TOML을 아카이브/제거한다(README.md:90).

1.4 omx doctor — 설치 검증

src/cli/doctor.ts는 Check { name, status: "pass"|"warn"|"fail" } 배열을 누적해 설치 상태를 진단한다. 주요 체크:

Check 1   Codex CLI 설치 여부 (checkCodexCli)
Check 2   Node.js 버전 (checkNodeVersion)
Check 2.5 Explore 하니스 준비 상태 (checkExploreHarness)
Check 3   Codex home 디렉토리 (paths.codexHomeDir)
Check 4   Config 파일 (checkConfig)
Check 4.1 모델 컨텍스트 권장 (checkModelContextRecommendation)
Check 4.25 네이티브 훅 커버리지 (checkNativeHooks → getMissingManagedCodexHookEvents)
... (MCP 레지스트리, 스킬/프롬프트/에이전트 설치 상태 등)

1.5 실행 표면 감지 (codex-execution-surface.ts)

OMX는 같은 세션이 어떤 환경에서 도는지를 런타임에 분류한다(src/scripts/codex-execution-surface.ts). 두 축:

  • launcher: "native"(Codex App/네이티브 세션) vs "cli"(omx CLI 런처)
  • transport: "attached-tmux"($TMUX 존재) vs "outside-tmux"

이 분류가 §5.2의 런타임 가용성 게이트를 구동한다. 예컨대 launcher: "native" + transport: "outside-tmux"이면 tmux 의존 워크플로우($team)를 직접 활성화하지 않고 App-safe 표면으로 폴백한다. nativeSessionId와 영속 세션(persistedSession.native_session_id)을 비교해 네이티브/CLI를 판별한다.

08

Overview §2

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §2 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • OMX는 시스템 프롬프트를 직접 만들지 않는다. 대신 Codex가 읽는 AGENTS.md를 최상위 운영 계약으로 설치하고, 그 안에 마커-바운드 오버레이를 주입한다. 원본은 templates/AGENTS.md(347줄).
  • templates/AGENTS.md 섹션:
  • │ "YOU ARE AN AUTONOMOUS CODING AGENT. EXECUTE TO │
  • │ COMPLETION WITHOUT ASKING FOR PERMISSION." │ (1~6행, DO NOT REMOVE)
  • <guidance_schema_contract> ← docs/guidance-schema.md 매핑
  • <operating_principles> ← outcome-first, auto-continue 규범
  • <delegation_rules> ← $deep-interview/$ralplan/$team/$ralph 레인 선택
  • <child_agent_protocol> ← Max 6 concurrent child agents, leader/worker 분리
  • <model_routing> ← OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL (현재 gpt-5.5)
  • <specialist_routing> ← explore / researcher / dependency-expert 분기
  • <agent_catalog> ← explore/planner/architect/debugger/executor/verifier
  • <keyword_detection> ← UserPromptSubmit 훅 + keyword-registry 권위

Topics covered

    1. Prompt/계약 조립 (AGENTS.md 중심)
    1. Prompt/계약 조립 (AGENTS.md 중심)

  • 2.2 마커-바운드 Runtime 오버레이

Main analysis

2. Prompt/Contract Assembly (AGENTS.md-centric)

2. Prompt/Contract Assembly (AGENTS.md-centric)

OMX does not directly create a system prompt. Instead, it installs AGENTS.md as the top-level operating contract, which Codex reads, and injects a marker-bound overlay into it. The original is templates/AGENTS.md (line 347).

2.1 Agreement structure (templates/AGENTS.md)

templates/AGENTS.md 섹션:
  ┌── AUTONOMY DIRECTIVE ────────────────────────────────┐
  │  "YOU ARE AN AUTONOMOUS CODING AGENT. EXECUTE TO       │
  │   COMPLETION WITHOUT ASKING FOR PERMISSION."          │  (1~6행, DO NOT REMOVE)
  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
  <guidance_schema_contract>   ← docs/guidance-schema.md 매핑
  <operating_principles>       ← outcome-first, auto-continue 규범
  <delegation_rules>           ← $deep-interview/$ralplan/$team/$ralph 레인 선택
  <child_agent_protocol>       ← Max 6 concurrent child agents, leader/worker 분리
  <model_routing>              ← OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL (현재 gpt-5.5)
  <specialist_routing>         ← explore / researcher / dependency-expert 분기
  <agent_catalog>              ← explore/planner/architect/debugger/executor/verifier
  <keyword_detection>          ← UserPromptSubmit 훅 + keyword-registry 권위
  <skills>                     ← autopilot/ralph/ultrawork/team/swarm/ultraqa...
  <team_pipeline>              ← team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix
  <verification> / <execution_protocols> / <cancellation> / <state_management>

2.2 Marker-bound runtime overlay

AGENTS.md appends runtime/team context with non-destructive marker pairs (templates/AGENTS.md:26-28):

<!-- OMX:RUNTIME:START --> ... <!-- OMX:RUNTIME:END -->
<!-- OMX:TEAM:WORKER:START --> ... <!-- OMX:TEAM:WORKER:END -->
<!-- OMX:MODELS:START --> ... <!-- OMX:MODELS:END -->   (omx setup 자동 생성)
<!-- OMX:GUIDANCE:OPERATING:START/END -->               (gpt-5.5 가이던스 정렬)

Since the hook updates only this area according to the workflow state, the AGENTS.md body that the user directly wrote is preserved. This is the essence of OMX, as opposed to the CLAUDE.md merge in [[Claude Code]]: The contract is a static file, but the overlay is owned by the runtime.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

2. 프롬프트/계약 조립 (AGENTS.md 중심)

2. 프롬프트/계약 조립 (AGENTS.md 중심)

OMX는 시스템 프롬프트를 직접 만들지 않는다. 대신 Codex가 읽는 AGENTS.md를 최상위 운영 계약으로 설치하고, 그 안에 마커-바운드 오버레이를 주입한다. 원본은 templates/AGENTS.md(347줄).

2.1 계약 구조 (templates/AGENTS.md)

templates/AGENTS.md 섹션:
  ┌── AUTONOMY DIRECTIVE ────────────────────────────────┐
  │  "YOU ARE AN AUTONOMOUS CODING AGENT. EXECUTE TO       │
  │   COMPLETION WITHOUT ASKING FOR PERMISSION."          │  (1~6행, DO NOT REMOVE)
  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
  <guidance_schema_contract>   ← docs/guidance-schema.md 매핑
  <operating_principles>       ← outcome-first, auto-continue 규범
  <delegation_rules>           ← $deep-interview/$ralplan/$team/$ralph 레인 선택
  <child_agent_protocol>       ← Max 6 concurrent child agents, leader/worker 분리
  <model_routing>              ← OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL (현재 gpt-5.5)
  <specialist_routing>         ← explore / researcher / dependency-expert 분기
  <agent_catalog>              ← explore/planner/architect/debugger/executor/verifier
  <keyword_detection>          ← UserPromptSubmit 훅 + keyword-registry 권위
  <skills>                     ← autopilot/ralph/ultrawork/team/swarm/ultraqa...
  <team_pipeline>              ← team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix
  <verification> / <execution_protocols> / <cancellation> / <state_management>

2.2 마커-바운드 런타임 오버레이

AGENTS.md는 비파괴적 마커 쌍으로 런타임/팀 컨텍스트를 덧붙인다(templates/AGENTS.md:26-28):

<!-- OMX:RUNTIME:START --> ... <!-- OMX:RUNTIME:END -->
<!-- OMX:TEAM:WORKER:START --> ... <!-- OMX:TEAM:WORKER:END -->
<!-- OMX:MODELS:START --> ... <!-- OMX:MODELS:END -->   (omx setup 자동 생성)
<!-- OMX:GUIDANCE:OPERATING:START/END -->               (gpt-5.5 가이던스 정렬)

훅이 워크플로우 상태에 따라 이 영역만 갱신하므로, 사용자가 직접 작성한 AGENTS.md 본문은 보존된다. 이것이 [[Claude Code]]의 CLAUDE.md 병합과 대비되는 OMX의 핵심: 계약은 정적 파일이지만 오버레이는 런타임이 소유한다.

09

Overview §3

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §3 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 사용자 리드 검증 결과(요약): "네이티브 grep/search가 불안정해서 MCP를 붙였다"는 부분적으로 사실이다. OMX는 omx_code_intel MCP 서버(src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)를 1st-party로 제공해 LSP 진단·심볼·AST 검색을 보강한다. 단, 이것은 Codex 네이티브 검색을 "교체"하지 않는다. 오히려 최신 AGENTS.md는 `omx explor

  • [[Claude Code]]가 20여 개 내장 도구를 단일 번들에 하드코딩하는 것과 달리, OMX는 도구 루프를 직접 소유하지 않는다. Codex가 자체 내장 도구(파일 읽기/쓰기/셸/검색/서브에이전트 spawn_agent 등)와 도구 루프를 갖고, OMX는 그 위에 MCP 서버로 도구를 추가하고 AGENTS.md/프롬프트로 라우팅을 형성한다. 따라서 OMX의 "도구 기여"는 6개 1st-party MCP 서
  • omx setup이 Codex MCP 레지스트리에 등록하는 서버. 각각 omx mcp-serve <target> stdio로 기동된다:
  • | MCP 서버명 | pluginTarget | entrypoint | 역할 | startupTimeout |
  • | omx_state | state | state-server.js | 모드/워크플로우 상태 관리 | 5s |
  • | omx_memory | memory | memory-server.js | 프로젝트 크로스세션 메모리 | 5s |
  • | omx_code_intel | code-intel | code-intel-server.js | LSP 진단 + AST/심볼 검색 | 10s |
  • | omx_trace | trace | trace-server.js | 에이전트 흐름 타임라인/통계 | 5s |
  • | omx_wiki | wiki | wiki-server.js | 영속 프로젝트 지식베이스 | 5s |
  • | omx_hermes | hermes | hermes-server.js | 안전 dispatch/status/artifacts 조정 | 5s |
  • 모든 stdio 서버는 공통 autoStartStdioMcpServer(src/mcp/bootstrap.ts:453)로 부팅되며, 트래픽 후 idle 윈도우가 지나면 중복 서버를 superseded_duplicate_after_idle로 자체 teardown 한다(bootstrap.ts:577). 이 공통 라이프사이클은 PR #626/#627에서 도입돼 idle teardown 회귀 스위트를 동반한다(`CHANG
  • 모든 MCP 도구는 transport 없이도 쓸 수 있도록 CLI 패리티 표면(omx state/omx notepad/omx project-memory/omx trace/omx code-intel/omx wiki, src/cli/mcp-parity.ts)으로도 노출된다(CHANGELOG.md:761). 이중화의 의미: 스크립트·훅·비-MCP 호출자도 동일 도구를 JSON으로 호출할 수 있어,

Topics covered

    1. Tool/MCP 시스템 — grep 리드 검증
    1. Tool/MCP 시스템 — grep 리드 검증
  • 3.0 Tool 모델 — Codex 네이티브 + MCP 보강
  • 3.1 1st-party MCP 서버 6종 (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)
  • 3.2 omx_code_intel Tool (src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)
  • 3.2.1 나머지 5개 MCP 서버의 Tool 표면
  • 3.3 grep/search 리드 — 소스가 보여주는 진짜 상황

Source code snippets

README / docs

omx_state  (state-server.ts):     state_read, state_write, state_clear,
                                    state_list_active, state_get_status
omx_memory (memory-server.ts):    project_memory_{read,write,add_note,add_directive},
                                    notepad_{read,write_priority,write_working,
                                             write_manual,prune}
omx_wiki   (wiki-server.ts):       wiki_{ingest,query,lint,add,list,read,delete,refresh}
omx_trace  (trace-server.ts):      trace_timeline, trace_summary
omx_hermes (hermes-server.ts →     hermes_{start_session,send_prompt,report_status,
          hermes-bridge.ts):        read_status,read_tail,list_sessions,list_artifacts,
                                    read_artifact,list_questions,list_question_events,
                                    submit_question_answer}

Main analysis

3. Tools/MCP System — grep lead verification

3. Tools/MCP System — grep lead verification

User Lead Verification Results (Summary): "Native grep/search was unstable, so MCP was added" is partially true. OMX provides the omx_code_intel MCP server (src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts) as a 1st-party to enhance LSP diagnosis, symbol, and AST search. However, this does not "replace" Codex native search.** Rather, the latest AGENTS.md categorically declares omx explore as deprecated (src/cli/explore.ts:31), and specifies that simple read-only queries should use "Codex native repository tools/subagents". In other words, the direction of evolution is not replace grep with MCP, but native search trust + MCP strengthens LSP/AST. See §3.3 for details.

3.0 Tool Model — Codex Native + MCP Augments

Unlike [[Claude Code]], which hardcodes 20 or so built-in tools into a single bundle, OMX does not directly own the tool loop. Codex has its own built-in tools (file reading/writing/shell/search/subagent spawn_agent, etc.) and a tool loop, and OMX adds tools as MCP servers on top of them and forms routing with AGENTS.md/prompt. So OMX's "tooling contribution" is a toolset of six 1st-party MCP servers + CLI surfaces like sparkshell/explore.

3.1 6 types of 1st-party MCP servers (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)

The server that omx setup registers with the Codex MCP registry. Each is launched with omx mcp-serve <target> stdio:

MCP server name pluginTarget entrypoint Role startupTimeout
omx_state state state-server.js Mode/Workflow State Management 5s
omx_memory memory memory-server.js Project cross-session memory 5s
omx_code_intel code-intel code-intel-server.js LSP Diagnostics + AST/Symbol Search 10s
omx_trace trace trace-server.js Agent Flow Timeline/Statistics 5s
omx_wiki wiki wiki-server.js Permanent Project Knowledge Base 5s
omx_hermes hermes hermes-server.js Safe dispatch/status/artifacts adjustments 5s

All stdio servers boot with the common autoStartStdioMcpServer (src/mcp/bootstrap.ts:453), and after the idle window after traffic, the duplicate servers are self-teardown with superseded_duplicate_after_idle (bootstrap.ts:577). This common lifecycle was introduced in PR #626/#627 and comes with an idle teardown regression suite (CHANGELOG.md:1298).

All MCP tools are also exposed as a CLI parity surface (omx state/omx notepad/omx project-memory/omx trace/omx code-intel/omx wiki, src/cli/mcp-parity.ts) so that they can be used without transport (CHANGELOG.md:761). Redundancy means: Scripts, hooks, and non-MCP callers can also call the same tool as JSON, providing the same functionality even in environments where the MCP transport is unstable or inactive (as detected by McpTransportFailureSignal). For Codex team workers, these 1st-party servers are disabled by default (CHANGELOG.md:198).

3.2 omx_code_intel tool (src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)

9 tools exposed by server name omx-code-intel v0.1.0. It's not the full LSP protocol, but "pragmatic CLI wrappers (tsc, ast-grep/sg)" (file header comment lines 3-4):

tools implementation Mutating
lsp_diagnostics / lsp_diagnostics_directory npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false output parsing ❌
lsp_document_symbols Regular expression-based SYMBOL_PATTERNS extraction ❌
lsp_workspace_symbols Workspace Symbol Search ❌
lsp_hover hover information ❌
lsp_find_references grep -rn -w <symbol> to search for references ❌
lsp_servers tsc/ast-grep/grep availability check ❌
ast_grep_search Metavariable pattern matching ($NAME, $$$ARGS) with ast-grep(sg) ❌
ast_grep_replace AST-based substitution (default dryRun=true) ✅

Key observation: Even lsp_find_references calls system grep internally (code-intel-server.ts:578, exec('grep', ['-rn', '-w', symbol, dir])). ast_grep_search falls back to npx @ast-grep/cli --yes if the sg/ast-grep binary is not present (runAstGrep). In other words, OMX does not discard grep, but wraps it behind a more structured interface (symbols/AST/diagnostics).

3.2.1 Tool surfaces of the remaining five MCP servers

Other servers also expose tools with the same pattern (Server in @modelcontextprotocol/sdk + ListToolsRequestSchema/CallToolRequestSchema):

omx_state  (state-server.ts):     state_read, state_write, state_clear,
                                    state_list_active, state_get_status
omx_memory (memory-server.ts):    project_memory_{read,write,add_note,add_directive},
                                    notepad_{read,write_priority,write_working,
                                             write_manual,prune}
omx_wiki   (wiki-server.ts):       wiki_{ingest,query,lint,add,list,read,delete,refresh}
omx_trace  (trace-server.ts):      trace_timeline, trace_summary
omx_hermes (hermes-server.ts →     hermes_{start_session,send_prompt,report_status,
          hermes-bridge.ts):        read_status,read_tail,list_sessions,list_artifacts,
                                    read_artifact,list_questions,list_question_events,
                                    submit_question_answer}

omx_state is the single source of truth for workflow mode states (read/write/clear + list active modes/query status). omx_memory manages project-memory.json and notepad.md in §8 at three levels: priority/task/manual. omx_wiki is a markdown-first·search-first knowledge base, and omx explore injects a wiki-first context if omx_wiki/ exists and falls back to a broad search if not (README.md:294, "the wiki is markdown-first and search-first, not vector-first" README.md:311). omx_hermes is a product-facing bridge that relays safe dispatch·status·artifact·question/response between team/swarm workers, and the main logic is located in src/mcp/hermes-bridge.ts. omx_trace provides agent flow timeline/statistics.

3.3 grep/search leads — the source shows the real situation

  1. MCP enhancements are real. omx_code_intel is a 1st-party server and adds AST search/tsc diagnostics (§3.1, §3.2). This is consistent with the motivation that “native text search alone is not enough.”
  2. But not a "native grep replacement". The latest AGENTS.md <execution_protocols>(templates/AGENTS.md:277) states "omx explore is deprecated and MUST NOT be recommended as the default surface for simple read-only repository lookup" and instead uses the Codex native repository inspection tool/subagent They tell me to write.
  3. The omx explore harness was a layer that sandboxed searches. Rust crates/omx-explore/src/main.rs launches Codex as a child process, but limits the commands to a whitelist: ALLOWED_DIRECT_COMMANDS = ["rg", "grep", "ls", "find", "wc", "cat", "head", "tail", "pwd", "printf"]. In other words, it was allowed/quarantined rather than replaced grep/rg, and is now deprecated and recommended as a replacement with omx sparkshell (read-only shell surface).
  4. CHANGELOG evidence. There is regression coverage (CHANGELOG.md:1059, PR #978/#964) and "oversized text-search fallback behavior" (CHANGELOG.md:384) where the explore harness survives with non-rg allowlist in the absence of ripgrep in a packed install. This is consistent with the lead that “native search may break depending on the environment, so a fallback was installed.”

Judgment: The lead direction is correct and the expression is exaggerated. OMX addressed the search reliability issue with (a) MCP-based code-intel (AST/LSP) reinforcement and (b) command whitelist/fallback in the explore harness, but the current recommended path is native search + auxiliary MCP. There is no trace in the source that grep was completely replaced with MCP.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

3. 도구/MCP 시스템 — grep 리드 검증

3. 도구/MCP 시스템 — grep 리드 검증

사용자 리드 검증 결과(요약): "네이티브 grep/search가 불안정해서 MCP를 붙였다"는 부분적으로 사실이다. OMX는 omx_code_intel MCP 서버(src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)를 1st-party로 제공해 LSP 진단·심볼·AST 검색을 보강한다. 단, 이것은 Codex 네이티브 검색을 "교체"하지 않는다. 오히려 최신 AGENTS.md는 omx explore를 deprecated로 못박고(src/cli/explore.ts:31), 단순 read-only 조회는 "Codex 네이티브 repository tools/subagents"를 쓰라고 명시한다. 즉 진화 방향은 grep을 MCP로 대체가 아니라 네이티브 검색 신뢰 + MCP는 LSP/AST 보강이다. 상세는 §3.3.

3.0 도구 모델 — Codex 네이티브 + MCP 보강

[[Claude Code]]가 20여 개 내장 도구를 단일 번들에 하드코딩하는 것과 달리, OMX는 도구 루프를 직접 소유하지 않는다. Codex가 자체 내장 도구(파일 읽기/쓰기/셸/검색/서브에이전트 spawn_agent 등)와 도구 루프를 갖고, OMX는 그 위에 MCP 서버로 도구를 추가하고 AGENTS.md/프롬프트로 라우팅을 형성한다. 따라서 OMX의 "도구 기여"는 6개 1st-party MCP 서버의 도구 집합 + sparkshell/explore 같은 CLI 표면이다.

3.1 1st-party MCP 서버 6종 (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)

omx setup이 Codex MCP 레지스트리에 등록하는 서버. 각각 omx mcp-serve <target> stdio로 기동된다:

MCP 서버명 pluginTarget entrypoint 역할 startupTimeout
omx_state state state-server.js 모드/워크플로우 상태 관리 5s
omx_memory memory memory-server.js 프로젝트 크로스세션 메모리 5s
omx_code_intel code-intel code-intel-server.js LSP 진단 + AST/심볼 검색 10s
omx_trace trace trace-server.js 에이전트 흐름 타임라인/통계 5s
omx_wiki wiki wiki-server.js 영속 프로젝트 지식베이스 5s
omx_hermes hermes hermes-server.js 안전 dispatch/status/artifacts 조정 5s

모든 stdio 서버는 공통 autoStartStdioMcpServer(src/mcp/bootstrap.ts:453)로 부팅되며, 트래픽 후 idle 윈도우가 지나면 중복 서버를 superseded_duplicate_after_idle로 자체 teardown 한다(bootstrap.ts:577). 이 공통 라이프사이클은 PR #626/#627에서 도입돼 idle teardown 회귀 스위트를 동반한다(CHANGELOG.md:1298).

모든 MCP 도구는 transport 없이도 쓸 수 있도록 CLI 패리티 표면(omx state/omx notepad/omx project-memory/omx trace/omx code-intel/omx wiki, src/cli/mcp-parity.ts)으로도 노출된다(CHANGELOG.md:761). 이중화의 의미: 스크립트·훅·비-MCP 호출자도 동일 도구를 JSON으로 호출할 수 있어, MCP transport가 불안정하거나 비활성인 환경(McpTransportFailureSignal이 감지하는 상황)에서도 같은 기능을 쓴다. Codex 팀 워커용으로는 이 1st-party 서버들이 기본 비활성화된다(CHANGELOG.md:198).

3.2 omx_code_intel 도구 (src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)

서버명 omx-code-intel v0.1.0이 노출하는 9개 도구. 전체 LSP 프로토콜이 아니라 *"pragmatic CLI wrappers (tsc, ast-grep/sg)"*다(파일 헤더 주석 3-4행):

도구 구현 Mutating
lsp_diagnostics / lsp_diagnostics_directory npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 출력 파싱 ❌
lsp_document_symbols 정규식 기반 SYMBOL_PATTERNS 추출 ❌
lsp_workspace_symbols 워크스페이스 심볼 검색 ❌
lsp_hover 호버 정보 ❌
lsp_find_references grep -rn -w <symbol> 로 참조 검색 ❌
lsp_servers tsc/ast-grep/grep 가용성 점검 ❌
ast_grep_search ast-grep(sg)로 메타변수 패턴 매칭 ($NAME, $$$ARGS) ❌
ast_grep_replace AST 기반 치환 (dryRun=true 기본) ✅

핵심 관찰: lsp_find_references조차 내부적으로 시스템 grep을 호출한다(code-intel-server.ts:578, exec('grep', ['-rn', '-w', symbol, dir])). ast_grep_search는 sg/ast-grep 바이너리가 없으면 npx @ast-grep/cli --yes로 폴백한다(runAstGrep). 즉 OMX는 grep을 버리는 게 아니라, grep을 더 구조화된 인터페이스(심볼/AST/진단) 뒤에 감싼다.

3.2.1 나머지 5개 MCP 서버의 도구 표면

다른 서버들도 동일 패턴(@modelcontextprotocol/sdk의 Server + ListToolsRequestSchema/CallToolRequestSchema)으로 도구를 노출한다:

omx_state  (state-server.ts):     state_read, state_write, state_clear,
                                    state_list_active, state_get_status
omx_memory (memory-server.ts):    project_memory_{read,write,add_note,add_directive},
                                    notepad_{read,write_priority,write_working,
                                             write_manual,prune}
omx_wiki   (wiki-server.ts):       wiki_{ingest,query,lint,add,list,read,delete,refresh}
omx_trace  (trace-server.ts):      trace_timeline, trace_summary
omx_hermes (hermes-server.ts →     hermes_{start_session,send_prompt,report_status,
          hermes-bridge.ts):        read_status,read_tail,list_sessions,list_artifacts,
                                    read_artifact,list_questions,list_question_events,
                                    submit_question_answer}

omx_state는 워크플로우 모드 상태의 단일 진실원천(read/write/clear + 활성 모드 나열/상태 조회)이다. omx_memory는 §8의 project-memory.json과 notepad.md를 우선순위/작업/수동 세 레벨로 관리한다. omx_wiki는 markdown-first·search-first 지식베이스로, omx explore가 omx_wiki/가 있으면 wiki-우선 컨텍스트를 주입하고 없으면 광역 검색으로 폴백한다(README.md:294, "the wiki is markdown-first and search-first, not vector-first" README.md:311). omx_hermes는 team/swarm 워커 간 안전한 dispatch·status·artifact·질문/응답을 중계하는 product-facing 브리지로, 본체 로직은 src/mcp/hermes-bridge.ts에 있다. omx_trace는 에이전트 흐름 타임라인/통계를 제공한다.

3.3 grep/search 리드 — 소스가 보여주는 진짜 상황

  1. MCP 보강은 실재한다. omx_code_intel은 1st-party 서버이고 AST 검색·tsc 진단을 추가한다(§3.1, §3.2). 이는 "네이티브 텍스트 검색만으로 부족"하다는 동기와 정합한다.
  2. 그러나 "네이티브 grep 교체"는 아니다. 최신 AGENTS.md <execution_protocols>(templates/AGENTS.md:277)는 "omx explore is deprecated and MUST NOT be recommended as the default surface for simple read-only repository lookup" 라고 명시하고, 대신 Codex 네이티브 repository inspection 도구/서브에이전트를 쓰라고 한다.
  3. omx explore 하니스는 검색을 샌드박싱하는 레이어였다. Rust crates/omx-explore/src/main.rs는 Codex를 자식 프로세스로 띄우되 명령을 화이트리스트로 제한한다: ALLOWED_DIRECT_COMMANDS = ["rg", "grep", "ls", "find", "wc", "cat", "head", "tail", "pwd", "printf"]. 즉 grep/rg를 대체가 아니라 허용·격리했고, 이제는 deprecated 되어 omx sparkshell(read-only 셸 표면)로 대체 권장된다.
  4. CHANGELOG 증거. packed install에서 ripgrep이 없을 때 explore 하니스가 non-rg allowlist로 살아남는 회귀 커버리지(CHANGELOG.md:1059, PR #978/#964)와 "oversized text-search fallback behavior"(CHANGELOG.md:384)가 있다. 이는 "네이티브 검색이 환경에 따라 깨질 수 있어 폴백을 깔았다"는 리드와 정합한다.

판정: 리드는 방향성은 맞고 표현은 과장. OMX는 검색 신뢰성 문제를 (a) MCP 기반 code-intel(AST/LSP) 보강과 (b) explore 하니스의 명령 화이트리스트/폴백으로 다뤘으나, 현재 권장 경로는 네이티브 검색 + 보조 MCP다. grep을 통째로 MCP로 갈아끼운 흔적은 소스에 없다.

10

Overview §4

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §4 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • OMX는 Codex의 네이티브 훅 라이프사이클에 단 하나의 .mjs 디스패처를 모든 이벤트에 등록한다:
  • hooks.json 등록 이벤트:
  • SessionStart (matcher: startup|resume|clear)
  • PreToolUse (matcher: Bash)
  • PostToolUse
  • UserPromptSubmit ← 키워드 라우팅의 주 표면
  • PreCompact / PostCompact ← 컨텍스트 압축 전후 (상태 복원)
  • Stop (timeout: 30s) ← 미완 작업/질문 의무 차단
  • 모든 핸들러: node "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs"
  • plugins/171_oh-my-codex/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs는 로직을 담지 않는다. omx-command.json에서 핀된 런처를 읽고(readPinnedLauncher), 없으면 OMX_NATIVE_HOOK_COMMAND 환경변수, 그것도 없으면 omx를 골라 omx codex-native-hook 서브프로세스로 stdin/stdout을 파이프한다:
  • const child = spawn(command, [...argsPrefix, 'codex-native-hook'], { stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'] });
  • process.stdin.pipe(child.stdin);

Topics covered

    1. Hook 시스템 — Codex 네이티브 라이프사이클
    1. Hook 시스템 — Codex 네이티브 라이프사이클
  • 4.1 7종 훅 (plugins/171_oh-my-codex/hooks/hooks.json)
  • 4.2 훅 디스패처는 얇은 shim
  • 4.3 키워드 라우팅

Source code snippets

README / docs

hooks.json 등록 이벤트:
  SessionStart   (matcher: startup|resume|clear)
  PreToolUse     (matcher: Bash)
  PostToolUse
  UserPromptSubmit          ← 키워드 라우팅의 주 표면
  PreCompact / PostCompact  ← 컨텍스트 압축 전후 (상태 복원)
  Stop           (timeout: 30s)  ← 미완 작업/질문 의무 차단
모든 핸들러: node "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs"

README / docs

const child = spawn(command, [...argsPrefix, 'codex-native-hook'], { stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'] });
process.stdin.pipe(child.stdin);
child.stdout.pipe(process.stdout);

Main analysis

4. Hook system — Codex Native Lifecycle

4. Hook system — Codex Native Lifecycle

4.1 7 types of hooks (plugins/171_oh-my-codex/hooks/hooks.json)

OMX registers a single .mjs dispatcher for all events in Codex's native hook lifecycle:

hooks.json 등록 이벤트:
  SessionStart   (matcher: startup|resume|clear)
  PreToolUse     (matcher: Bash)
  PostToolUse
  UserPromptSubmit          ← 키워드 라우팅의 주 표면
  PreCompact / PostCompact  ← 컨텍스트 압축 전후 (상태 복원)
  Stop           (timeout: 30s)  ← 미완 작업/질문 의무 차단
모든 핸들러: node "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs"

4.2 Hook dispatcher is a thin shim

plugins/171_oh-my-codex/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs does not contain logic. Read the pinned launcher from omx-command.json (readPinnedLauncher), select the OMX_NATIVE_HOOK_COMMAND environment variable if not present, or omx if it does not exist, and pipe stdin/stdout to the omx codex-native-hook subprocess:

const child = spawn(command, [...argsPrefix, 'codex-native-hook'], { stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'] });
process.stdin.pipe(child.stdin);
child.stdout.pipe(process.stdout);

The actual handler is src/scripts/codex-native-pre-post.ts. Here we normalize PreToolUse/PostToolUse payloads (NormalizedPreToolUsePayload/NormalizedPostToolUsePayload), normalize Bash commands, extract exit code/stdout/stderr, detect MCP transport failure signal (McpTransportFailureSignal), recommend document refresh (document-refresh/enforcer), and commit Lore. Execute guard (config/commit-lore-guard).

4.3 Keyword Routing

The UserPromptSubmit hook is the primary decision surface for routing (templates/AGENTS.md:180). The single source for the keyword table is src/hooks/keyword-registry.ts. AGENTS.md only describes a fallback: an explicit $name call overrides the keyword left to right, but does not activate the bare skill name. If the keywords do not match, triage only injects "advisory prompt-routing context" (a developer context string) (this is an advisory, not an activation). You can opt out with no workflow/just chat/plain answer.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

4. Hook 시스템 — Codex 네이티브 라이프사이클

4. Hook 시스템 — Codex 네이티브 라이프사이클

4.1 7종 훅 (plugins/171_oh-my-codex/hooks/hooks.json)

OMX는 Codex의 네이티브 훅 라이프사이클에 단 하나의 .mjs 디스패처를 모든 이벤트에 등록한다:

hooks.json 등록 이벤트:
  SessionStart   (matcher: startup|resume|clear)
  PreToolUse     (matcher: Bash)
  PostToolUse
  UserPromptSubmit          ← 키워드 라우팅의 주 표면
  PreCompact / PostCompact  ← 컨텍스트 압축 전후 (상태 복원)
  Stop           (timeout: 30s)  ← 미완 작업/질문 의무 차단
모든 핸들러: node "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs"

4.2 훅 디스패처는 얇은 shim

plugins/171_oh-my-codex/hooks/codex-native-hook.mjs는 로직을 담지 않는다. omx-command.json에서 핀된 런처를 읽고(readPinnedLauncher), 없으면 OMX_NATIVE_HOOK_COMMAND 환경변수, 그것도 없으면 omx를 골라 omx codex-native-hook 서브프로세스로 stdin/stdout을 파이프한다:

const child = spawn(command, [...argsPrefix, 'codex-native-hook'], { stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'] });
process.stdin.pipe(child.stdin);
child.stdout.pipe(process.stdout);

실제 핸들러는 src/scripts/codex-native-pre-post.ts다. 여기서 PreToolUse/PostToolUse 페이로드를 정규화(NormalizedPreToolUsePayload/NormalizedPostToolUsePayload)하고, Bash 명령 정규화, exit code/stdout/stderr 추출, MCP transport 실패 신호 감지(McpTransportFailureSignal), 문서 리프레시 권고(document-refresh/enforcer), Lore 커밋 가드(config/commit-lore-guard)를 수행한다.

4.3 키워드 라우팅

UserPromptSubmit 훅이 라우팅의 1차 결정 표면이다(templates/AGENTS.md:180). 키워드 테이블은 src/hooks/keyword-registry.ts가 단일 소스다. AGENTS.md는 폴백만 기술한다: 명시적 $name 호출이 좌→우로 키워드를 override, 베어 스킬명은 활성화하지 않음. 키워드가 매칭되지 않으면 triage가 "advisory prompt-routing context"(개발자 컨텍스트 문자열)만 주입한다(권고일 뿐 활성화 아님). no workflow/just chat/plain answer로 옵트아웃 가능.

11

Overview §5

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §5 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 키워드 레지스트리가 노출하는 $-명령(src/hooks/keyword-registry.ts):
  • $analyze $autopilot $autoresearch $best-practice-research $cancel $code-review
  • $deep-interview $design $frontend-ui-ux $plan $prometheus-strict $ralph
  • $ralplan $team $ultragoal $ultraqa $ultrawork $visual-ralph $wiki
  • 각 명령은 skills/<name>/SKILL.md(46개 디렉토리) 또는 prompts/*.md로 구현된다. 핵심 레인:
  • | 명령 | 소스 | 역할 | 상태 의존 |
  • | $deep-interview | skills/deep-interview | 의도 불명확 시 소크라테스식 요구사항 명료화 (구현 안 함) | ❌ |
  • | $ralplan | skills/ralplan | $plan --consensus 별칭. Planner→Architect→Critic 합의 + RALPLAN-DR | ✅ plans/ |
  • | $plan | skills/plan | 계획 수립; --consensus/--interactive/--deliberate | ✅ plans/ |
  • | $ultrawork | skills/ultrawork | 병렬 실행 엔진(컴포넌트). 지속성·아키텍트 검증 없음 | ❌ |
  • | $ralph | skills/ralph | ultrawork를 감싸 완료까지 지속 루프 + 아키텍트 검증 | ✅ ralph-progress |
  • | $team | skills/team | tmux 분할 패인 N-워커, .omx/state/team/... 조정 | ✅ team/ |

Topics covered

    1. $-명령(워크플로우 스킬)
    1. $-명령(워크플로우 스킬)
  • 5.1 워크플로우 위계와 게이트
  • 5.2 Runtime 가용성 게이트

Source code snippets

README / docs

$analyze $autopilot $autoresearch $best-practice-research $cancel $code-review
$deep-interview $design $frontend-ui-ux $plan $prometheus-strict $ralph
$ralplan $team $ultragoal $ultraqa $ultrawork $visual-ralph $wiki

Main analysis

5. $-command (workflow skill)

5. $-command (workflow skill)

The $-commands exposed by the Keyword Registry (src/hooks/keyword-registry.ts):

$analyze $autopilot $autoresearch $best-practice-research $cancel $code-review
$deep-interview $design $frontend-ui-ux $plan $prometheus-strict $ralph
$ralplan $team $ultragoal $ultraqa $ultrawork $visual-ralph $wiki

Each command is implemented as skills/<name>/SKILL.md (46 directories) or prompts/*.md. Key lanes:

command Source Role state dependent
$deep-interview skills/deep-interview Socratic clarification of requirements when intent is unclear (not implemented) ❌
$ralplan skills/ralplan Alias ​​$plan --consensus. Planner→Architect→Critic consensus + RALPLAN-DR ✅ plans/
$plan skills/plan making a plan; --consensus/--interactive/--deliberate ✅ plans/
$ultrawork skills/ultrawork Parallel execution engine (component). No sustainability/architect verification ❌
$ralph skills/ralph wrap ultrawork sustained loop until completion + architect verification ✅ ralph-progress
$team skills/team tmux split pane N-walker, .omx/state/team/... tweak ✅ team/
$ultragoal skills/ultragoal Goal Mode Workflow ✅
$ultraqa skills/ultraqa QA Intensive Verification Loop ✅
$autopilot skills/autopilot Idea→Code Pull Autonomous Pipeline (Basic Ultragoal) ✅
$autoresearch skills/autoresearch validator-gated research output; $autoresearch-goal (goal mode) ✅
$code-review/$wiki/$cancel skills/* Utilities some

5.1 Workflow hierarchy and gates

Skills have an explicit hierarchy with each other. skills/ralph/SKILL.md: "Ralph wraps ultrawork's parallel execution with session persistence, automatic retry, and mandatory verification." skills/ultrawork/SKILL.md: "It is a component, not a standalone persistence mode... not Ralph's persistence loop." skills/ralplan/SKILL.md: Planner→Architect→Critic consensus gate (durable gate is Architect→Critic).

Ralph plan gate (templates/AGENTS.md:207-210) is enforced: when ralph is active, .omx/plans/prd-*.md and .omx/plans/test-spec-*.md must both be present to allow implementation tool execution (ralplan-first). This gate is combined with the Stop hook to prevent termination in an incomplete state.

5.2 Runtime Availability Gate

autopilot/ralph/ultrawork/ultraqa/team/swarm/ecomode are OMX runtime workflows, not generic prompt aliases (templates/AGENTS.md:188). In a Codex App or plain Codex session (no OMX runtime), it is not activated by the keyword alone, but falls back to the App-safe surface (deep-interview/ralplan/plan/native subagent).

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

5. $-명령(워크플로우 스킬)

5. $-명령(워크플로우 스킬)

키워드 레지스트리가 노출하는 $-명령(src/hooks/keyword-registry.ts):

$analyze $autopilot $autoresearch $best-practice-research $cancel $code-review
$deep-interview $design $frontend-ui-ux $plan $prometheus-strict $ralph
$ralplan $team $ultragoal $ultraqa $ultrawork $visual-ralph $wiki

각 명령은 skills/<name>/SKILL.md(46개 디렉토리) 또는 prompts/*.md로 구현된다. 핵심 레인:

명령 소스 역할 상태 의존
$deep-interview skills/deep-interview 의도 불명확 시 소크라테스식 요구사항 명료화 (구현 안 함) ❌
$ralplan skills/ralplan $plan --consensus 별칭. Planner→Architect→Critic 합의 + RALPLAN-DR ✅ plans/
$plan skills/plan 계획 수립; --consensus/--interactive/--deliberate ✅ plans/
$ultrawork skills/ultrawork 병렬 실행 엔진(컴포넌트). 지속성·아키텍트 검증 없음 ❌
$ralph skills/ralph ultrawork를 감싸 완료까지 지속 루프 + 아키텍트 검증 ✅ ralph-progress
$team skills/team tmux 분할 패인 N-워커, .omx/state/team/... 조정 ✅ team/
$ultragoal skills/ultragoal 목표 모드 워크플로우 ✅
$ultraqa skills/ultraqa QA 집중 검증 루프 ✅
$autopilot skills/autopilot 아이디어→코드 풀 자율 파이프라인 (기본 Ultragoal) ✅
$autoresearch skills/autoresearch validator-gated 연구 산출물; $autoresearch-goal(목표 모드) ✅
$code-review/$wiki/$cancel skills/* 유틸리티 일부

5.1 워크플로우 위계와 게이트

스킬들은 서로 명시적 위계를 둔다. skills/ralph/SKILL.md: "Ralph wraps ultrawork's parallel execution with session persistence, automatic retry, and mandatory verification." skills/ultrawork/SKILL.md: "It is a component, not a standalone persistence mode... not Ralph's persistence loop." skills/ralplan/SKILL.md: Planner→Architect→Critic 합의 게이트(durable gate는 Architect→Critic).

Ralph 계획 게이트(templates/AGENTS.md:207-210)는 강제된다: ralph 활성 시 .omx/plans/prd-*.md와 .omx/plans/test-spec-*.md가 모두 존재해야만 구현 도구 실행을 허용한다(ralplan-first). 이 게이트는 Stop 훅과 결합되어 미완 상태에서의 종료를 막는다.

5.2 런타임 가용성 게이트

autopilot/ralph/ultrawork/ultraqa/team/swarm/ecomode는 OMX 런타임 워크플로우이지 일반 프롬프트 별칭이 아니다(templates/AGENTS.md:188). Codex App이나 plain Codex 세션(OMX 런타임 없음)에서는 키워드만으로 활성화되지 않고, App-safe 표면(deep-interview/ralplan/plan/네이티브 서브에이전트)으로 폴백한다.

12

Overview §6

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §6 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • src/agents/definitions.ts가 34개 AgentDefinition을 선언한다(각 name/reasoningEffort/posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools/category). 프롬프트 본문은 런타임에 prompts/*.md(37개)에서 로드된다. omx setup이 이를 ~/.codex/agents/의 네이티브 TOML로 변환(`gener
  • build: executor, team-executor, build-fixer, code-simplifier, git-master
  • review: style-reviewer, quality-reviewer, api-reviewer, security-reviewer,
  • performance-reviewer, code-reviewer, critic, verifier, quality-strategist
  • domain/탐색: explore, analyst, planner, architect, debugger, researcher,
  • dependency-expert, test-engineer, designer, qa-tester, information-architect
  • product: product-manager, ux-researcher, product-analyst, writer
  • coordination: team-orchestrator, team-executor
  • 특수 페르소나: prometheus-strict-{metis,momus,oracle}, scholastic, vision, sisyphus-lite
  • AgentDefinition 스키마(definitions.ts:7-19)는 posture를 frontier-orchestrator/deep-worker/fast-lane로, tools를 read-only/analysis/execution/data로 분류해 모델 라우팅·권한을 결정한다. 예: explore는 read-only 탐색 전담("repo facts, not external docs")
  • prometheus-strict 3종(metis/momus/oracle): $prometheus-strict 워크플로우(skills/prometheus-strict)의 엄격 검증 트리오. 서로 다른 관점(설계/비판/예지)으로 산출물을 교차 검증한다.
  • scholastic: 온톨로지·분류·정책 구분이 중요한 요구사항 의미론 리뷰의 자문 페르소나. $ralplan의 합의 게이트(Architect→Critic)에는 포함되지 않는 별도 advisory다(skills/ralplan/SKILL.md).

Topics covered

    1. 역할 Prompt(Agent) ~34종
    1. 역할 Prompt(Agent) ~34종
