Source code snippets

README / docs

build:        executor, team-executor, build-fixer, code-simplifier, git-master
review:       style-reviewer, quality-reviewer, api-reviewer, security-reviewer,
              performance-reviewer, code-reviewer, critic, verifier, quality-strategist
domain/탐색:   explore, analyst, planner, architect, debugger, researcher,
              dependency-expert, test-engineer, designer, qa-tester, information-architect
product:      product-manager, ux-researcher, product-analyst, writer
coordination: team-orchestrator, team-executor
특수 페르소나: prometheus-strict-{metis,momus,oracle}, scholastic, vision, sisyphus-lite

Main analysis

6. Role prompt (agent) ~34 types

6. Role prompt (agent) ~34 types

src/agents/definitions.ts declares 34 AgentDefinition (each name/reasoningEffort/posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools/category). Prompt bodies are loaded from prompts/*.md (37) at runtime. omx setup converts this to native TOML in ~/.codex/agents/ (generateAgentToml).

build:        executor, team-executor, build-fixer, code-simplifier, git-master
review:       style-reviewer, quality-reviewer, api-reviewer, security-reviewer,
              performance-reviewer, code-reviewer, critic, verifier, quality-strategist
domain/탐색:   explore, analyst, planner, architect, debugger, researcher,
              dependency-expert, test-engineer, designer, qa-tester, information-architect
product:      product-manager, ux-researcher, product-analyst, writer
coordination: team-orchestrator, team-executor
특수 페르소나: prometheus-strict-{metis,momus,oracle}, scholastic, vision, sisyphus-lite

The AgentDefinition schema (definitions.ts:7-19) determines model routing and authority by classifying posture as frontier-orchestrator/deep-worker/fast-lane and tools as read-only/analysis/execution/data. Examples: explore is dedicated to read-only exploration ("repo facts, not external docs"), researcher is official documentation, and dependency-expert is package selection comparison (templates/AGENTS.md:155-158).

6.1 Special Persona

  • prometheus-strict trio (metis/momus/oracle): A strict validation trio for the $prometheus-strict workflow (skills/prometheus-strict). Cross-verify the output from different perspectives (design/criticism/forecast).
  • scholastic: Advisory persona for requirements semantics review where ontology, classification, and policy distinction are important. It is a separate advisory (skills/ralplan/SKILL.md) that is not included in the consensus gate (Architect → Critic) of $ralplan.
  • critic: A role that adversarially finds flaws in planning/implementation, and is a member of the $ralplan consensus loop (Planner → Architect → Critic).
  • sisyphus-lite / vision: Lightweight repetitive execution / visual verification (linked with $visual-verdict · $visual-ralph) persona.

6.2 Model routing conventions

<model_routing> (templates/AGENTS.md:142-150) maps roles to task difficulties: low complexity (explore/style-reviewer/writer), research/exploration (explore→repo, researcher→docs, dependency-expert→SDK), Standard (executor/debugger/test-engineer), high complexity (architect/executor/critic). Native child agents inherit models without explicit reason, and frontier defaults are not hard-coded but taken from OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL (currently gpt-5.5)·OMX_DEFAULT_SPARK_MODEL (templates/AGENTS.md:132,246). Prefer tuning reasoning_effort over model forcing.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

6. 역할 프롬프트(에이전트) ~34종

6. 역할 프롬프트(에이전트) ~34종

src/agents/definitions.ts가 34개 AgentDefinition을 선언한다(각 name/reasoningEffort/posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools/category). 프롬프트 본문은 런타임에 prompts/*.md(37개)에서 로드된다. omx setup이 이를 ~/.codex/agents/의 네이티브 TOML로 변환(generateAgentToml).

build:        executor, team-executor, build-fixer, code-simplifier, git-master
review:       style-reviewer, quality-reviewer, api-reviewer, security-reviewer,
              performance-reviewer, code-reviewer, critic, verifier, quality-strategist
domain/탐색:   explore, analyst, planner, architect, debugger, researcher,
              dependency-expert, test-engineer, designer, qa-tester, information-architect
product:      product-manager, ux-researcher, product-analyst, writer
coordination: team-orchestrator, team-executor
특수 페르소나: prometheus-strict-{metis,momus,oracle}, scholastic, vision, sisyphus-lite

AgentDefinition 스키마(definitions.ts:7-19)는 posture를 frontier-orchestrator/deep-worker/fast-lane로, tools를 read-only/analysis/execution/data로 분류해 모델 라우팅·권한을 결정한다. 예: explore는 read-only 탐색 전담("repo facts, not external docs"), researcher는 공식 문서, dependency-expert는 패키지 선택 비교(templates/AGENTS.md:155-158).

6.1 특수 페르소나

  • prometheus-strict 3종(metis/momus/oracle): $prometheus-strict 워크플로우(skills/prometheus-strict)의 엄격 검증 트리오. 서로 다른 관점(설계/비판/예지)으로 산출물을 교차 검증한다.
  • scholastic: 온톨로지·분류·정책 구분이 중요한 요구사항 의미론 리뷰의 자문 페르소나. $ralplan의 합의 게이트(Architect→Critic)에는 포함되지 않는 별도 advisory다(skills/ralplan/SKILL.md).
  • critic: 계획/구현의 결함을 적대적으로 찾는 역할로, $ralplan 합의 루프(Planner→Architect→Critic)의 일원.
  • sisyphus-lite / vision: 경량 반복 실행 / 시각 검증($visual-verdict·$visual-ralph 연동) 페르소나.

6.2 모델 라우팅 규약

<model_routing>(templates/AGENTS.md:142-150)은 역할을 작업 난이도에 매핑한다: 저복잡도(explore/style-reviewer/writer), 연구/탐색(explore→repo, researcher→docs, dependency-expert→SDK), 표준(executor/debugger/test-engineer), 고복잡도(architect/executor/critic). 네이티브 child agent는 명시적 이유 없이는 모델을 상속하고, frontier 기본값은 하드코딩이 아니라 OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL(현재 gpt-5.5)·OMX_DEFAULT_SPARK_MODEL에서 가져온다(templates/AGENTS.md:132,246). 모델 강제보다 reasoning_effort 조정을 선호한다.

13

Overview §7

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §7 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 워크스페이스 6개 크레이트(Cargo.toml, 모두 v0.18.6):
  • | 크레이트 | 바이너리/lib | 역할 |
  • | omx-runtime-core | lib | 이벤트 소싱 엔진 (authority/dispatch/mailbox/replay) |
  • | omx-runtime | bin | runtime-core를 tmux 트랜스포트로 구동하는 CLI |
  • | omx-mux | lib | tmux 어댑터(MuxAdapter/TmuxAdapter/build_capture_pane_args) |
  • | omx-sparkshell | bin | read-only 셸 실행 + Codex 요약 브리지 + 출력 redaction |
  • | omx-explore | bin (omx-explore-harness) | 명령 화이트리스트 샌드박스 탐색 하니스 (deprecated) |
  • | omx-api | bin+lib | JSON API 표면 |
  • crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs는 RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION = 1과 명령/이벤트 어휘를 정의한다:
  • RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES:
  • acquire-authority, renew-authority, ← 리더 권한 리스
  • queue-dispatch, mark-notified, mark-delivered, mark-failed, ← 디스패치 생명주기

Topics covered

    1. Rust Runtime 크레이트 — 턴을 넘는 실행의 심장
    1. Rust Runtime 크레이트 — 턴을 넘는 실행의 심장

  • 7.2 omx-sparkshell: read-only 셸 표면
  • 7.3 omx-explore 하니스 (deprecated)

Source code snippets

README / docs

RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES:
  acquire-authority, renew-authority,           ← 리더 권한 리스
  queue-dispatch, mark-notified, mark-delivered, mark-failed,  ← 디스패치 생명주기
  request-replay, capture-snapshot,             ← 복구/스냅샷
  create-mailbox-message, mark-mailbox-notified, mark-mailbox-delivered  ← 메일박스
RUNTIME_EVENT_NAMES:
  authority-acquired/renewed, dispatch-queued/notified/delivered/failed,
  replay-requested, snapshot-captured, mailbox-message-created, ...

Main analysis

7. Rust Runtime Crate — The Heart of Turn-Beyond Execution

7. Rust Runtime Crate — The Heart of Turn-Beyond Execution

Workspace 6 crates (Cargo.toml, all v0.18.6):

crate binary/lib Role
omx-runtime-core lib Event Sourcing Engine (authority/dispatch/mailbox/replay)
omx-runtime bin CLI running runtime-core with tmux transport
omx-mux lib tmux adapter(MuxAdapter/TmuxAdapter/build_capture_pane_args)
omx-sparkshell bin read-only shell execution + Codex summary bridge + output redaction
omx-explore bin(omx-explore-harness) Command Whitelist Sandbox Navigation Harness (deprecated)
omx-api bin+lib JSON API surface

7.1 omx-runtime-core: Event sourcing + permission leasing

crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs defines RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION = 1 and a command/event vocabulary:

RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES:
  acquire-authority, renew-authority,           ← 리더 권한 리스
  queue-dispatch, mark-notified, mark-delivered, mark-failed,  ← 디스패치 생명주기
  request-replay, capture-snapshot,             ← 복구/스냅샷
  create-mailbox-message, mark-mailbox-notified, mark-mailbox-delivered  ← 메일박스
RUNTIME_EVENT_NAMES:
  authority-acquired/renewed, dispatch-queued/notified/delivered/failed,
  replay-requested, snapshot-captured, mailbox-message-created, ...
  • AuthorityLease(authority.rs): Issue/renew a lease so that only one leader owns the global plan. Foundation for enforcing "Max 6 concurrent child agents" in <child_agent_protocol> and leader/worker separation at runtime.
  • DispatchLog / MailboxLog(dispatch.rs/mailbox.rs): Records tasks and messages sent to workers as an append-only log.
  • ReplayState(replay.rs): Maintains seen_event_ids: HashSet<String>, cursor, deferred_leader_notification, idempotently skips already processed events (returns whether record_event is new), and replays from the cursor after crash/compression.
  • RuntimeEngine(engine.rs): Grabs file locks with fs2::FileExt to serialize concurrent writes and persist snapshots.

This is the essence of OMX's "surviving beyond one local reasoning burst" execution (skills/team/SKILL.md: "long-running parallel execution that must survive beyond one local reasoning burst").

7.2 omx-sparkshell: read-only shell surface

crates/omx-sparkshell/src/main.rs is a recommended read-only surface replacement for omx explore. Module configuration: exec (execute command), codex_bridge (delegate summary to Codex with summarize_output), redaction (remove redact_output secret), threshold (visible line threshold), tmux integration (build_capture_pane_args, default 200 lines/MIN 100/MAX 1000). AGENTS.md specifies sparkshell as an explicit opt-in (templates/AGENTS.md:280).

Output safety (redaction): sparkshell does not pass shell output as is to the model, but masks the secret through the redaction module. The explore harness also scrubs the environment variables of child processes (EXPLORE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_VARS_TO_SCRUB) and blocks injection vectors such as BASH_ENV/NODE_OPTIONS. In other words, OMX's security model, unlike [[Claude Code]]'s Tengu-style command firewall/secret 25 type detection, is shell-isolated focused with read-only whitelist + output redaction + environment scrub. Destructive shell/editing/diagnostic tasks are left to the Codex native path, and sparkshell only handles read-only lookups (templates/AGENTS.md:280).

7.3 omx-explore harness (deprecated)

crates/omx-explore/src/main.rs launches Codex as a child process (OMX_EXPLORE_CODEX_BIN), scrubs environment variables (BASH_ENV/NODE_OPTIONS/GREP_OPTIONS, etc.) and limits commands to the ALLOWED_DIRECT_COMMANDS whitelist (rg/grep/ls/find/...). It is a POSIX sh/bash wrapper. Timeout 180s (DEFAULT_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS), limit of 96 processes (DEFAULT_PROCESS_LIMIT), output limit of 8MB (DEFAULT_CODEX_OUTPUT_LIMIT_BYTES). Not supported on Windows (WINDOWS_UNSUPPORTED_ALLOWLIST_MESSAGE). This is the key evidence crate for the grep read seen in §3.3.

7.4 HUD/sidecar — Observability Runtime

omx hud (src/hud/index.ts) is a HUD that renders the current workflow state on the terminal. Supports the --watch (1 second polling), --json (raw state), --preset={minimal, focused, full}, and --tmux (split pane) flags. Internally, .omx/ state is read with readAllState/readHudConfig, tmux pane registration/resize hook (registerHudResizeHook), leader pane tracking (OMX_TMUX_HUD_LEADER_PANE_ENV) are performed, and runHudAuthorityTick is used to link with AuthorityLease in §7.1. omx sidecar (src/sidecar/index.ts) and omx tmux-hook are surfaces that attach the OMX runtime as an auxiliary process on top of tmux.

7.5 autoresearch — validator-gated research output

$autoresearch (src/901_autoresearch/) scores research results with validation gates. AutoresearchEvaluatorContract in src/901_autoresearch/contracts.ts has command (external evaluation command), format: 'json', keep_policy: 'score_improvement' | Define 'pass_only'. That is, the output of each research iteration is run through a user-defined evaluator and retained only if the score improves (or passes) — this is an OMX-specific pattern that enforces verifiable output, unlike [[Claude Code]]'s free-statement memory. $autoresearch-goal is the goal mode variant, and $best-practice-research is the usual pre-planning formula/upstream evidence collection (README.md:109).

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

7. Rust 런타임 크레이트 — 턴을 넘는 실행의 심장

7. Rust 런타임 크레이트 — 턴을 넘는 실행의 심장

워크스페이스 6개 크레이트(Cargo.toml, 모두 v0.18.6):

크레이트 바이너리/lib 역할
omx-runtime-core lib 이벤트 소싱 엔진 (authority/dispatch/mailbox/replay)
omx-runtime bin runtime-core를 tmux 트랜스포트로 구동하는 CLI
omx-mux lib tmux 어댑터(MuxAdapter/TmuxAdapter/build_capture_pane_args)
omx-sparkshell bin read-only 셸 실행 + Codex 요약 브리지 + 출력 redaction
omx-explore bin (omx-explore-harness) 명령 화이트리스트 샌드박스 탐색 하니스 (deprecated)
omx-api bin+lib JSON API 표면

7.1 omx-runtime-core: 이벤트 소싱 + 권한 리스

crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs는 RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION = 1과 명령/이벤트 어휘를 정의한다:

RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES:
  acquire-authority, renew-authority,           ← 리더 권한 리스
  queue-dispatch, mark-notified, mark-delivered, mark-failed,  ← 디스패치 생명주기
  request-replay, capture-snapshot,             ← 복구/스냅샷
  create-mailbox-message, mark-mailbox-notified, mark-mailbox-delivered  ← 메일박스
RUNTIME_EVENT_NAMES:
  authority-acquired/renewed, dispatch-queued/notified/delivered/failed,
  replay-requested, snapshot-captured, mailbox-message-created, ...
  • AuthorityLease(authority.rs): 리더 한 명만 글로벌 계획을 소유하도록 리스를 발급/갱신. <child_agent_protocol>의 "Max 6 concurrent child agents"와 leader/worker 분리를 런타임에서 강제하는 토대.
  • DispatchLog / MailboxLog(dispatch.rs/mailbox.rs): 워커에게 보낸 작업과 메시지를 append-only 로그로 기록.
  • ReplayState(replay.rs): seen_event_ids: HashSet<String>, cursor, deferred_leader_notification을 유지해 이미 처리한 이벤트를 멱등 스킵(record_event가 신규 여부 반환)하고, 크래시/압축 후 커서부터 재생(replay) 한다.
  • RuntimeEngine(engine.rs): fs2::FileExt로 파일 락을 잡아 동시 쓰기를 직렬화하고 스냅샷을 영속화한다.

이것이 OMX의 "한 번의 로컬 추론 버스트를 넘어 살아남는" 실행의 정체다(skills/team/SKILL.md: "long-running parallel execution that must survive beyond one local reasoning burst").

7.2 omx-sparkshell: read-only 셸 표면

crates/omx-sparkshell/src/main.rs는 omx explore를 대체하는 권장 read-only 표면이다. 모듈 구성: exec(명령 실행), codex_bridge(summarize_output로 Codex에 요약 위임), redaction(redact_output 시크릿 제거), threshold(가시 라인 임계), tmux 통합(build_capture_pane_args, 기본 200줄/MIN 100/MAX 1000). AGENTS.md는 sparkshell을 명시적 opt-in으로 규정한다(templates/AGENTS.md:280).

출력 안전(redaction): sparkshell은 셸 출력을 그대로 모델에 넘기지 않고 redaction 모듈을 거쳐 시크릿을 마스킹한다. explore 하니스도 자식 프로세스의 환경변수를 스크럽(EXPLORE_SUBPROCESS_ENV_VARS_TO_SCRUB)해 BASH_ENV/NODE_OPTIONS 같은 주입 벡터를 차단한다. 즉 OMX의 보안 모델은 [[Claude Code]]의 Tengu식 명령 방화벽/시크릿 25종 탐지와 달리, read-only 화이트리스트 + 출력 redaction + 환경 스크럽이라는 셸-격리 중심이다. 파괴적 셸/편집/진단 작업은 Codex 네이티브 경로에 맡기고, sparkshell은 read-only 조회만 떠안는다(templates/AGENTS.md:280).

7.3 omx-explore 하니스 (deprecated)

crates/omx-explore/src/main.rs는 Codex를 자식 프로세스로 띄우되(OMX_EXPLORE_CODEX_BIN), 환경변수를 스크럽(BASH_ENV/NODE_OPTIONS/GREP_OPTIONS 등)하고 명령을 ALLOWED_DIRECT_COMMANDS 화이트리스트(rg/grep/ls/find/...)로 제한하는 POSIX sh/bash 래퍼다. 타임아웃 180s(DEFAULT_CODEX_TIMEOUT_MS), 프로세스 96개 한도(DEFAULT_PROCESS_LIMIT), 출력 8MB 한도(DEFAULT_CODEX_OUTPUT_LIMIT_BYTES). Windows 미지원(WINDOWS_UNSUPPORTED_ALLOWLIST_MESSAGE). §3.3에서 본 grep 리드의 핵심 증거 크레이트다.

7.4 HUD / sidecar — 관찰 가능성 런타임

omx hud(src/hud/index.ts)는 현재 워크플로우 상태를 터미널에 렌더링하는 HUD다. --watch(1초 폴링), --json(원시 상태), --preset={minimal,focused,full}, --tmux(분할 패인) 플래그를 지원한다. 내부적으로 readAllState/readHudConfig로 .omx/ 상태를 읽고, tmux 패인 등록·리사이즈 훅(registerHudResizeHook)·리더 패인 추적(OMX_TMUX_HUD_LEADER_PANE_ENV)을 수행하며, runHudAuthorityTick으로 §7.1의 AuthorityLease와 연동한다. omx sidecar(src/sidecar/index.ts)와 omx tmux-hook은 tmux 위에서 OMX 런타임을 보조 프로세스로 붙이는 표면이다.

7.5 autoresearch — validator-gated 연구 산출물

$autoresearch(src/901_autoresearch/)는 연구 결과를 검증 게이트로 채점한다. src/901_autoresearch/contracts.ts의 AutoresearchEvaluatorContract는 command(외부 평가 명령), format: 'json', keep_policy: 'score_improvement' | 'pass_only'를 정의한다. 즉 각 연구 반복 산출물을 사용자 정의 evaluator로 실행해 점수가 개선될 때만(또는 통과할 때만) 유지한다 — 이는 [[Claude Code]]의 자유서술 메모리와 달리 검증 가능한 산출물을 강제하는 OMX 특유의 패턴이다. $autoresearch-goal은 목표 모드 변형이고, $best-practice-research는 평소 사전계획용 공식/업스트림 증거 수집이다(README.md:109).

14

Overview §8

DEV

Overview §8 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • .omx/
  • state/ ← 모드/워크플로우 상태 (state-paths.ts:213)
  • {scope}/ralph-progress.json ← Ralph 반복 진행 + visual-verdict JSON (AGENTS.md:310)
  • team/... ← 팀 워커 조정 상태
  • notepad.md ← 세션 노트 (omx_memory)
  • project-memory.json ← 크로스세션 메모리 (omx_memory)
  • plans/
  • prd-*.md ← PRD (Ralph 게이트 필수)
  • test-spec-*.md ← 테스트 스펙 (Ralph 게이트 필수)
  • logs/ ← 로그
  • 경로 해석은 src/mcp/state-paths.ts: OMX_ROOT override → cwd 기준 .omx/state. 정리 시 stale MCP 엔트리포인트는 src/cli/cleanup.ts의 정규식으로 식별·제거.
  • <state_management>(templates/AGENTS.md:328)의 계약: "Hooks own normal skill-active and workflow-state persistence under .omx/state/." 에이전트는 명시적 라이프사이클 전이(복구/체크포인트/취소 정리/압축 복원)에만 state/MCP 도구를 쓰고, 훅이 소유한 활성화 상태를 수동 중복하지 말아야 한다. PreCompa

Main analysis

8. State persistence — .omx/

8. State persistence — .omx/

8.1 Directory layout (templates/AGENTS.md:327-336)

.omx/
  state/                       ← 모드/워크플로우 상태 (state-paths.ts:213)
    {scope}/ralph-progress.json   ← Ralph 반복 진행 + visual-verdict JSON (AGENTS.md:310)
    team/...                      ← 팀 워커 조정 상태
  notepad.md                   ← 세션 노트 (omx_memory)
  project-memory.json          ← 크로스세션 메모리 (omx_memory)
  plans/
    prd-*.md                      ← PRD (Ralph 게이트 필수)
    test-spec-*.md                ← 테스트 스펙 (Ralph 게이트 필수)
  logs/                        ← 로그

Path interpretation is src/mcp/state-paths.ts: OMX_ROOT override → .omx/state based on cwd. When cleaning, stale MCP entry points are identified and removed using regular expressions in src/cli/cleanup.ts.

8.2 State owned by hooks

Contract from <state_management> (templates/AGENTS.md:328): "Hooks own normal skill-active and workflow-state persistence under .omx/state/." Agents should use state/MCP tools only for explicit lifecycle transitions (recovery/checkpoint/undo cleanup/compress restore) and not manually duplicate activation state owned by hooks. Combining PreCompact/PostCompact hooks + ReplayState allows workflow to resume even after context compression.

8.3 Team runtime adjustments (src/team/)

$team is not a simple fan-out, but a state machine. The contract in skills/team/SKILL.md is strong: the agent must (1) call omx team ... directly, (2) not fallback to in-process spawn_agent fanout, (3) check for evidence of startup/failure, (4) initialize/synchronize in the canonical runtime state if there is no active team state, (5) maintain state until the worker enters the shutdown state, and (6) recover from stale fanout. If omx team is not present, it stops with a hard error.

The src/team/ modules underpin this runtime: dag-schema.ts (task DAG), allocation-policy.ts/delegation-policy.ts (worker distribution), approved-execution.ts (approved execution gates), delivery-log.ts (delivery log), commit-hygiene.ts (commit hygiene), api-interop.ts (omx team api ... CLI interop), current-task-baseline.ts. Worker state flows to .omx/state/team/..., and messages between workers flow to the omx_hermes bridge in §3.2.1 + MailboxLog in §7.1.

The canonical pipeline is team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix(loop) and the exit status is complete/failed/cancelled (templates/AGENTS.md:230-233). The calling contract is omx team [N:agent-type] "<task>" (e.g. omx team 3:executor "..."). omx team ralph ... has been removed, and if a persistent single-ownership loop is needed, a separate omx ralph ... is launched.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

8. 상태 영속화 — .omx/

8. 상태 영속화 — .omx/

8.1 디렉토리 레이아웃 (templates/AGENTS.md:327-336)

.omx/
  state/                       ← 모드/워크플로우 상태 (state-paths.ts:213)
    {scope}/ralph-progress.json   ← Ralph 반복 진행 + visual-verdict JSON (AGENTS.md:310)
    team/...                      ← 팀 워커 조정 상태
  notepad.md                   ← 세션 노트 (omx_memory)
  project-memory.json          ← 크로스세션 메모리 (omx_memory)
  plans/
    prd-*.md                      ← PRD (Ralph 게이트 필수)
    test-spec-*.md                ← 테스트 스펙 (Ralph 게이트 필수)
  logs/                        ← 로그

경로 해석은 src/mcp/state-paths.ts: OMX_ROOT override → cwd 기준 .omx/state. 정리 시 stale MCP 엔트리포인트는 src/cli/cleanup.ts의 정규식으로 식별·제거.

8.2 훅이 소유하는 상태

<state_management>(templates/AGENTS.md:328)의 계약: "Hooks own normal skill-active and workflow-state persistence under .omx/state/." 에이전트는 명시적 라이프사이클 전이(복구/체크포인트/취소 정리/압축 복원)에만 state/MCP 도구를 쓰고, 훅이 소유한 활성화 상태를 수동 중복하지 말아야 한다. PreCompact/PostCompact 훅 + ReplayState가 결합해 컨텍스트 압축 후에도 워크플로우가 재개된다.

8.3 Team 런타임 조정 (src/team/)

$team은 단순 fan-out이 아니라 상태 머신이다. skills/team/SKILL.md의 계약은 강하다: 에이전트는 (1) omx team ...을 직접 호출, (2) in-process spawn_agent fanout으로 대체 금지, (3) 시작·패인 증거 확인, (4) 활성 팀 상태가 없으면 canonical 런타임 상태에서 초기화/동기화, (5) 워커가 종료 상태가 될 때까지 상태 유지, (6) stale 패인 복구를 해야 한다. omx team이 없으면 hard error로 멈춘다.

src/team/ 모듈은 이 런타임을 떠받친다: dag-schema.ts(작업 DAG), allocation-policy.ts/delegation-policy.ts(워커 배분), approved-execution.ts(승인된 실행 게이트), delivery-log.ts(전달 로그), commit-hygiene.ts(커밋 위생), api-interop.ts(omx team api ... CLI interop), current-task-baseline.ts. 워커 상태는 .omx/state/team/...에, 워커 간 메시지는 §3.2.1의 omx_hermes 브리지 + §7.1의 MailboxLog로 흐른다.

캐노니컬 파이프라인은 team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix(loop)이며 종료 상태는 complete/failed/cancelled다(templates/AGENTS.md:230-233). 호출 계약은 omx team [N:agent-type] "<task>"(예: omx team 3:executor "...")다. omx team ralph ...는 제거되었고, 지속 단일소유 루프가 필요하면 별도 omx ralph ...를 띄운다.

15

9. Entire operation flow

9. Entire operation flow

graph TD
    subgraph Install["설치 (omx setup)"]
        Setup["omx setup"]
        Codex_assets["~/.codex/{skills,prompts,agents}"]
        Agents["AGENTS.md (운영 계약 + 마커 오버레이)"]
        McpReg["MCP 레지스트리 (6 서버)"]
        HookCfg["Codex hooks 설정 (7 이벤트)"]
    end

    subgraph CodexSession["Codex CLI 세션"]
        Prompt["사용자 프롬프트"]
        UPS["UserPromptSubmit 훅"]
        KW["keyword-registry.ts (라우팅)"]
        Triage["triage (advisory)"]
        Loop["Codex 에이전트 루프"]
    end

    subgraph MCP["1st-party MCP (omx mcp-serve)"]
        State["omx_state"]
        Memory["omx_memory"]
        CodeIntel["omx_code_intel (tsc/ast-grep/grep)"]
        Trace["omx_trace"]
        Wiki["omx_wiki"]
        Hermes["omx_hermes"]
    end

    subgraph Runtime["Rust 런타임 (tmux)"]
        RuntimeCore["omx-runtime-core (authority/dispatch/mailbox/replay)"]
        Mux["omx-mux (tmux 패인)"]
        Spark["omx-sparkshell (read-only 셸)"]
        Workers["team 워커 N (Codex/Claude)"]
    end

    subgraph StateDir[".omx/ 상태"]
        Plans["plans/{prd,test-spec}"]
        Progress["state/{scope}/ralph-progress.json"]
        TeamState["state/team/..."]
        Notepad["notepad.md / project-memory.json"]
    end

    Setup --> Codex_assets & Agents & McpReg & HookCfg
    Prompt --> UPS --> KW
    KW -->|no match| Triage
    KW -->|"$ralph/$team/..."| Loop
    Triage --> Loop
    Loop --> MCP
    Loop -->|"team/ralph"| RuntimeCore
    RuntimeCore --> Mux --> Workers
    RuntimeCore --> StateDir
    Workers --> Spark
    Loop --> StateDir
    CodeIntel -.LSP/AST 보강.-> Loop

Flow summary: omx setup plants OMX assets on the Codex surface → User prompt through UserPromptSubmit hook → keyword-registry routing (triage recommended in case of mismatch) → Codex loop leverages 6 MCPs and .omx/ state → Runtime workflows such as $ralph/$team run by Rust omx-runtime-core on top of tmux Coordinate multiple workers and persist state with lease, dispatch, mailbox, and replay → Stop hooks and Ralph gates block incomplete termination.

    end

    subgraph Runtime["Rust 런타임 (tmux)"]
        RuntimeCore["omx-runtime-core (authority/dispatch/mailbox/replay)"]
        Mux["omx-mux (tmux 패인)"]
        Spark["omx-sparkshell (read-only 셸)"]
        Workers["team 워커 N (Codex/Claude)"]
    end

    subgraph StateDir[".omx/ 상태"]
        Plans["plans/{prd,test-spec}"]
        Progress["state/{scope}/ralph-progress.json"]
        TeamState["state/team/..."]
        Notepad["notepad.md / project-memory.json"]
    end

    Setup --> Codex_assets & Agents & McpReg & HookCfg
    Prompt --> UPS --> KW
    KW -->|no match| Triage
    KW -->|"$ralph/$team/..."| Loop
    Triage --> Loop
    Loop --> MCP
    Loop -->|"team/ralph"| RuntimeCore
    RuntimeCore --> Mux --> Workers
    RuntimeCore --> StateDir
    Workers --> Spark
    Loop --> StateDir
    CodeIntel -.LSP/AST 보강.-> Loop

흐름 요약: omx setup이 Codex 표면에 OMX 자산을 심는다 → 사용자 프롬프트는 UserPromptSubmit 훅 → keyword-registry 라우팅(미매칭 시 triage 권고) → Codex 루프가 6개 MCP와 .omx/ 상태를 활용 → $ralph/$team 같은 런타임 워크플로우는 Rust omx-runtime-core가 tmux 위에서 권한 리스·디스패치·메일박스·리플레이로 다중 워커를 조정하고 상태를 영속화 → Stop 훅과 Ralph 게이트가 미완 종료를 차단.

16

Overview §10

DEV

000_overview/00_omx_overview.md

Overview

Overview §10 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • (검색/grep/MCP 레이어) OMX는 검색 불안정 문제를 교체가 아니라 계층화로 풀었다: omx_code_intel MCP가 tsc 진단·ast-grep·grep을 구조화된 도구(lsp_*/ast_grep_*) 뒤에 감싸되, 권장 1차 표면은 여전히 네이티브 검색이다(omx explore deprecated). [[cli-jaw]]가 자체 grep/search 도구를 보강한다면, "네이티브를
  • (턴-생존 실행 + 상태 영속) OMX의 가장 이식 가치 높은 자산은 omx-runtime-core의 이벤트 소싱 + ReplayState다(seen_event_ids 멱등 + cursor 재생 + 파일 락). cli-jaw가 "턴을 넘어 살아남는 실행"을 원한다면, 모든 상태 전이를 append-only 이벤트로 기록하고 압축/크래시 후 커서부터 재생하는 이 구조가 정석이다.
  • (상태 소유권 분리) OMX는 훅이 워크플로우 활성화 상태를 소유하고 에이전트는 명시적 라이프사이클 전이에만 개입한다(<state_management>). 이 분리는 에이전트가 자기 상태를 헷갈려 중복/오염시키는 것을 막는다 — cli-jaw의 hook/agent 상태 경계 설계에 직접 참고.
  • (게이트로 강제하는 품질) Ralph의 PRD+test-spec 파일 존재 게이트 + Stop 훅 차단(templates/AGENTS.md:207)은 "계획 없이 구현 금지"를 파일시스템 사실로 강제한다. 프롬프트 권고가 아니라 실행 차단이라는 점이 핵심.
  • (tmux를 트랜스포트로) OMX는 멀티에이전트 조정 트랜스포트로 tmux를 택했다(omx-mux, build_capture_pane_args). 패인 캡처·tmux-hook 기반 HUD는 가볍고 관찰 가능하지만 POSIX 의존(Windows 미지원)이라는 트레이드오프 — cli-jaw가 크로스플랫폼을 노린다면 트랜스포트 추상화를 더 둬야 한다.
  • (MCP-CLI 이중화) OMX는 모든 MCP 도구를 CLI/JSON 패리티 표면으로도 노출한다(src/cli/mcp-parity.ts). transport가 죽거나 비활성인 환경에서도 같은 도구를 호출할 수 있는 이 폴백 설계는, MCP 의존이 단일 실패점이 되지 않게 한다 — cli-jaw가 MCP를 핵심 도구 경로로 쓴다면 동일한 비-MCP 폴백을 갖추는 게 안전하다.

Topics covered

    1. cli-jaw Comparison 시사점
    1. cli-jaw Comparison 시사점

Source code snippets

171_oh-my-codex/README.md

Quick start

Requirements

  • Node.js 20+
  • Codex CLI installed, verified with codex --version, and authenticated (Homebrew or npm are both fine; do not reinstall @openai/codex with npm if Homebrew already owns codex)
  • Codex auth configured and visible in the same shell/profile that will run OMX
  • tmux on macOS/Linux if you want the recommended durable team runtime
  • psmux on native Windows only if you intentionally want the less-supported Windows team path

A good first session

After install, check both boundaries:

omx doctor
codex login status
omx exec --skip-git-repo-check -C . "Reply with exactly OMX-EXEC-OK"

omx doctor catches missing OMX files, hooks, and runtime prerequisites. The real smoke test catches auth, profile, and provider/base-URL problems that only appear when Codex performs an actual request.

Launch OMX the recommended way from a git project:

omx --worktree=feat/task --madmax --high

On macOS/Linux interactive terminals with tmux available, this starts the leader in OMX-managed detached tmux by default so the HUD/runtime panes can be created and recovered. --worktree also moves the launch into a separate git checkout, which is the safer default when using --madmax. Replace feat/task with a branch-like name for the task.

Madmax and worktree launch safety

--madmax is OMX shorthand for Codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox. It removes the normal approval and sandbox guardrails, so only use it in trusted repositories and environments. --high is shorthand for -c model_reasoning_effort="high".

When you use --madmax from a git repository, prefer a worktree launch instead of running directly in the current checkout. For repeatable or concurrent work, use a named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high

If you are outside a git repository, omit --worktree; worktree launches require Git.

For concurrent --madmax sessions, do not run them all in the same directory. Give each session its own named worktree:

omx --worktree=feature/auth --madmax --high
omx --worktree=fix/flaky-tests --madmax --high

--worktree / -w with no name creates or reuses a detached launch worktree at ../.omx-worktrees/launch-detached. --worktree=, --worktree , or -w creates or reuses a named launch worktree under ../.omx-worktrees/ and checks out that branch name. OMX consumes the worktree flag before starting Codex; it is not forwarded to Codex itself. Treat the unnamed detached form as a one-off convenience: if the source checkout advances after that worktree is created, a later unnamed launch can fail with worktree_target_mismatch because launch-detached still points at the old HEAD. Use a named worktree for repeated work, or remove the old detached worktree before retrying. If the target launch worktree is already dirty, OMX warns and launches as-is, so clean, commit, or stash that worktree before relying on it for isolation.

For omx team, workers already use dedicated worktrees automatically by default; --worktree on omx team is only a legacy-compatible override.

If you want a one-off launch with no OMX tmux/HUD management, use --direct:

omx --direct --yolo

For a persistent shell/profile preference, set an environment policy:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --yolo

Return to the auto/default behavior with:

unset OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY

CLI policy flags win over the environment, and the last CLI policy flag before -- wins:

OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct omx --tmux --yolo

Use OMX_LAUNCH_POLICY=direct|tmux|detached-tmux|auto. This iteration only adds CLI and environment controls; it intentionally does not add a config-file setting. If you run --direct from inside an existing tmux pane, OMX will not create HUD splits, enable mouse mode, or wrap extended-key handling, but the process still runs inside that already-open terminal pane.

Then try the canonical workflow:

$deep-interview "clarify the authentication change"
$ralplan "approve the safest implementation path"
$ultragoal "turn the approved path into durable Codex goals"

Use $team when an active Ultragoal story needs coordinated parallel work, or $ralph when one persistent owner should keep pushing to completion without a multi-goal ledger.

Main analysis

10. Implications of cli-jaw comparison

10. Implications of cli-jaw comparison

  • (search/grep/MCP layer) OMX solves the search instability problem by layering rather than replacement: the omx_code_intel MCP wraps tsc diagnostic·ast-grep·grep behind structured tools (lsp_*/ast_grep_*), but the recommended primary surface is still native search (omx explore deprecated). If [[cli-jaw]] augments its own grep/search tools, this additive pattern of "trust native, but add LSP/AST as MCP" (with fallback whitelist, crates/omx-explore) is more operationally stable than an outright replacement.

  • (turn-surviving execution + state persistence) OMX's most portable asset is omx-runtime-core's event sourcing + ReplayState (seen_event_ids idempotent + cursor play + file lock). If cli-jaw wants to "survive execution beyond turns," this structure of recording all state transitions as append-only events and playing from the cursor after compression/crash is standard.

  • (State Ownership Separation) OMX hooks own the workflow activation state and agents only intervene in explicit lifecycle transitions (<state_management>). This separation prevents agents from confusingly duplicating/contaminating their own state — see directly in cli-jaw's hook/agent state boundary design.

  • (quality of forcing with gate) Ralph's PRD+test-spec file existence gate + Stop hook blocking (templates/AGENTS.md:207) forces "no implementation without plan" as a filesystem fact. The key is not to recommend a prompt, but to block execution.

  • (Runtime Availability Gate) OMX ensures that workflow keywords are activated only when the runtime is actually running (Codex App/plain sessions fallback). cli-jaw also gates the available surfaces on a per-environment basis, reducing “imitating modes that don’t exist” failures.

  • (tmux as transport) OMX chose tmux as the multi-agent coordination transport (omx-mux, build_capture_pane_args). Pane capture/tmux-hook based HUD is lightweight and observable, but the trade-off is POSIX dependency (no Windows support) — if cli-jaw is targeting cross-platform, it needs to have more transport abstraction.

  • (MCP-CLI redundancy) OMX also exposes all MCP tools as a CLI/JSON parity surface (src/cli/mcp-parity.ts). This fallback design, which allows the same tool to be called even in environments where transport is dead or inactive, ensures that MCP dependence is not a single point of failure — if cli-jaw uses MCP as its core toolpath, it is safe to have the same non-MCP fallback.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_omx_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

10. cli-jaw 비교 시사점

10. cli-jaw 비교 시사점

  • (검색/grep/MCP 레이어) OMX는 검색 불안정 문제를 교체가 아니라 계층화로 풀었다: omx_code_intel MCP가 tsc 진단·ast-grep·grep을 구조화된 도구(lsp_*/ast_grep_*) 뒤에 감싸되, 권장 1차 표면은 여전히 네이티브 검색이다(omx explore deprecated). [[cli-jaw]]가 자체 grep/search 도구를 보강한다면, "네이티브를 신뢰하되 LSP/AST를 MCP로 추가"하는 이 additive 패턴(폴백 화이트리스트 포함, crates/omx-explore)이 통째 교체보다 운영 안정적이다.

  • (턴-생존 실행 + 상태 영속) OMX의 가장 이식 가치 높은 자산은 omx-runtime-core의 이벤트 소싱 + ReplayState다(seen_event_ids 멱등 + cursor 재생 + 파일 락). cli-jaw가 "턴을 넘어 살아남는 실행"을 원한다면, 모든 상태 전이를 append-only 이벤트로 기록하고 압축/크래시 후 커서부터 재생하는 이 구조가 정석이다.

  • (상태 소유권 분리) OMX는 훅이 워크플로우 활성화 상태를 소유하고 에이전트는 명시적 라이프사이클 전이에만 개입한다(<state_management>). 이 분리는 에이전트가 자기 상태를 헷갈려 중복/오염시키는 것을 막는다 — cli-jaw의 hook/agent 상태 경계 설계에 직접 참고.

  • (게이트로 강제하는 품질) Ralph의 PRD+test-spec 파일 존재 게이트 + Stop 훅 차단(templates/AGENTS.md:207)은 "계획 없이 구현 금지"를 파일시스템 사실로 강제한다. 프롬프트 권고가 아니라 실행 차단이라는 점이 핵심.

  • (런타임 가용성 게이트) OMX는 워크플로우 키워드가 런타임이 실제로 떠 있을 때만 활성화되게 한다(Codex App/plain 세션은 폴백). cli-jaw도 환경별로 사용 가능한 표면을 게이트하면 "있지도 않은 모드를 흉내내는" 실패를 줄인다.

  • (tmux를 트랜스포트로) OMX는 멀티에이전트 조정 트랜스포트로 tmux를 택했다(omx-mux, build_capture_pane_args). 패인 캡처·tmux-hook 기반 HUD는 가볍고 관찰 가능하지만 POSIX 의존(Windows 미지원)이라는 트레이드오프 — cli-jaw가 크로스플랫폼을 노린다면 트랜스포트 추상화를 더 둬야 한다.

  • (MCP-CLI 이중화) OMX는 모든 MCP 도구를 CLI/JSON 패리티 표면으로도 노출한다(src/cli/mcp-parity.ts). transport가 죽거나 비활성인 환경에서도 같은 도구를 호출할 수 있는 이 폴백 설계는, MCP 의존이 단일 실패점이 되지 않게 한다 — cli-jaw가 MCP를 핵심 도구 경로로 쓴다면 동일한 비-MCP 폴백을 갖추는 게 안전하다.

17

Axis 01: TUI design

AXIS

001_tui-design/01_omx_tui.md

Overview

Axis 01: TUI design — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: /Users/jun/Developer/codex/171_oh-my-codex/ (TS + Rust crates; Codex host TUI delegation).

  • 이 문서는 Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex(OMX) v0.18.6의 TUI/입력 표면 차원을 실제 소스(src/, crates/, templates/AGENTS.md)에 근거해 분석한다. 결론부터: OMX는 대화형 TUI를 소유하지 않는다. Codex CLI가 사용자와의 REPL/대화/스트리밍 렌더링을 전적으로 소유하고, OMX는 그 위에 얇은 보조 표면(statusline HUD

  • 전체 시스템 맥락은 [[00_omx_overview]]를 참조한다.
  • | 하위 차원 | OMX의 위치 | 근거 |
  • | 대화형 REPL / 입력 라인 | 의도적 부재 — Codex CLI에 위임 | 런타임 의존성에 ink/react/blessed/inquirer 없음(package.json deps = @iarna/toml, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod 3종) |
  • | 메시지/스트리밍 표시 | 부재 — Codex가 소유 | OMX는 stdout에 한 줄짜리 statusline/패널을 console.log로 찍을 뿐, 토큰 스트림 렌더러가 없음 |
  • | TUI 프레임워크 | 없음 (Ink/Ratatui/Yoga 전무) | crates/*/Cargo.toml에 ratatui/crossterm/tui 없음; Rust 바이너리는 println!/io::stdout().lock() 직접 출력 |
  • | 상태 표시(HUD) | 얹는다 — ANSI statusline 컴포저 | src/hud/render.ts, src/hud/colors.ts(SGR 코드 직접) |
  • | 보조 시각화(sidecar) | 얹는다 — ASCII 패널 렌더러 | src/sidecar/render.ts(panel(), box-drawing) |
  • | 진짜 키보드 입력 표면 | 딱 한 곳: omx question --ui | src/question/ui.ts(readline.emitKeypressEvents + setRawMode) |
  • | 슬래시 커맨드 | 부재 — $-키워드는 훅이 본문 텍스트에서 감지 | src/hooks/keyword-registry.ts(UserPromptSubmit 훅), 슬래시 REPL 파서 없음 |

README / docs

graph TD
    subgraph Host["Codex CLI (호스트 — 입력/대화/스트리밍 소유)"]
        REPL["Codex REPL 입력 라인"]
        Stream["Codex 응답 스트리밍 렌더링"]
        Pane["leader 페인 (TMUX_PANE)"]
    end

    subgraph OMX["oh-my-codex 보조 표면 (호스트 위에 얹음)"]
        HUD["omx hud — ANSI statusline 컴포저<br/>(src/hud/render.ts)"]
        Side["omx sidecar — ASCII 패널 렌더러<br/>(src/sidecar/render.ts)"]
        QUI["omx question --ui — 유일한 raw-mode 키 입력 UI<br/>(src/question/ui.ts)"]
        Spark["omx sparkshell — read-only 셸 출력 브리지<br/>(crates/omx-sparkshell)"]
    end

    subgraph IO["I/O 메커니즘 (TUI 프레임워크 아님)"]
        ANSI["raw ANSI/SGR 문자열 + 1초 폴링 watch"]
        Tmux["tmux split-window / send-keys"]
        Stdio["stdin readline keypress / stdout println"]
    end

    REPL --> Pane
    Stream --> Pane
    HUD -->|"--watch: \x1b[H 재그리기"| ANSI
    HUD -->|"--tmux: split-window -v"| Tmux
    Side -->|"--watch / --tmux"| ANSI
    Side --> Tmux
    QUI -->|"split-window 팝업 + 답변 주입"| Tmux
    QUI --> Stdio
    Spark --> Stdio
    Tmux -->|"send-keys C-m (답변/알림 주입)"| Pane

"dependencies": {
  "@iarna/toml": "^2.2.5",
  "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.26.0",
  "zod": "^4.3.6"
}

// src/hud/colors.ts:9-16
export const RESET = '\x1b[0m';
const DIM = '\x1b[2m';
const BOLD = '\x1b[1m';
const RED = '\x1b[31m';
const GREEN = '\x1b[32m';
const YELLOW = '\x1b[33m';
const MAGENTA = '\x1b[35m';
const CYAN = '\x1b[36m';

stdout.write_all(compact_text(&summary, options.budget).as_bytes())?;
// ...
stdout.flush()?;

README / docs

// src/hud/render.ts:431-447 (발췌)
const elements = getElements(preset);          // minimal/focused/full
const parts = elements
  .map(fn => fn(ctx))
  .filter((s): s is string => s !== null);
const ver = ctx.version ? `#${ctx.version.replace(/^v/, '')}` : '';
const label = bold(`[OMX${ver}]`);
return wrapHudParts(label, parts, renderOptions);

README / docs

// src/hud/render.ts:67-69
if (!isColorEnabled()) return `ralph:${safeIteration}/${safeMaxIterations}`;
const color = getRalphColor(safeIteration, safeMaxIterations);  // 70%→yellow, 90%→red
return `${color}ralph:${safeIteration}/${safeMaxIterations}${RESET}`;

README / docs

// src/hud/render.ts:24-30
function stripAnsi(value: string): string { return value.replace(ANSI_SGR_RE, ''); }
function visibleLength(value: string): number { return stripAnsi(value).length; }
