team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix (loop)
Terminal states: complete, failed, cancelled.

README / docs

pub const RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION: u32 = 1;
pub const RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES: &[&str] = &[
    "acquire-authority", "renew-authority",                          // 리더 권한 리스
    "queue-dispatch", "mark-notified", "mark-delivered", "mark-failed", // 디스패치 생명주기
    "request-replay", "capture-snapshot",                            // 복구/스냅샷
    "create-mailbox-message", "mark-mailbox-notified", "mark-mailbox-delivered", // 메일박스
];
pub const RUNTIME_EVENT_NAMES: &[&str] = &[
    "authority-acquired", "authority-renewed",
    "dispatch-queued", "dispatch-notified", "dispatch-delivered", "dispatch-failed",
    "replay-requested", "snapshot-captured",
    "mailbox-message-created", "mailbox-notified", "mailbox-delivered",
];

README / docs

pub fn acquire(&mut self, owner, lease_id, leased_until) -> Result<(), AuthorityError> {
    if let Some(ref current) = self.owner {
        if *current != owner {
            return Err(AuthorityError::AlreadyHeldByOther { current_owner: current.clone() });
        }
    }
    self.owner = Some(owner.into()); ...
}

README / docs

pub struct ReplayState {
    cursor: Option<String>,
    seen_event_ids: HashSet<String>,
    deferred_leader_notification: bool,
}
/// Returns true if the event is new, false if already seen.
pub fn record_event(&mut self, event_id) -> bool {
    self.seen_event_ids.insert(event_id.into())  // HashSet → 멱등
}

Main analysis

oh-my-codex (omx) subagent / collaboration

Analysis Snapshot: 171_oh-my-codex/ — subagent/collaboration dispatch.

Unlike [[Claude Code]], which packs all fork/teammate/worktree into a single Agent tool (internal name Task), and [[Codex]] puts child-thread control tools like spawn_agent/send_input/wait_agent in a built-in bundle, oh-my-codex(omx) does not have its own agent loop. omx is an OpenAI Codex. It is an orchestration control plane on top of the CLI that separates collaboration into three layers:

  1. Declaration layer (static assets) — 34 AgentDefinition in src/agents/definitions.ts and 37 prompt bodies in prompts/*.md. omx setup compiles this into the ~/.codex/agents/*.toml native agent (generateAgentToml). The collaboration of this layer is the "role catalog" consumed by the Codex native spawn_agent.
  2. Contract layer (runtime norms) — <child_agent_protocol>/<delegation_rules>/<team_pipeline> in templates/AGENTS.md. Who is the leader and who is the worker, the maximum number of concurrent children, and mode selection rules are nailed down through an operating contract, not a prompt.
  3. Coordination Layer (Event Sourcing Runtime) — Rust crates/omx-runtime-core. When the $team N:executor parallel team and the $ralph persistent loop launch multiple workers on top of tmux, they coordinate "surviving beyond one inference burst" with AuthorityLease, DispatchLog, MailboxLog, and ReplayState.

Key difference: Claude Code's subagent is a fork/inProcessRunner in the same process, while Codex's subagent is a child thread in the same session. omx's workers are independent full Codex/Claude CLI sessions running in the tmux pane - separate processes, sessions, and often git worktrees. Coordination takes place not in-memory, but in the .omx/state/team/... file + append-only event log.

Reliability: ■■■■□ (high) — definitions.ts, native-config.ts, crates/omx-runtime-core/src/*.rs, crates/omx-mux/src/*.rs, skills/{team,ralph,ultrawork,autopilot}/SKILL.md, Consistently checked against actual source in templates/AGENTS.md.

graph TD
    subgraph Decl["선언 층 (src/agents/definitions.ts)"]
        Defs["34 AgentDefinition<br/>posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools"]
        Prompts["prompts/*.md (37)"]
        Toml["generateAgentToml<br/>→ ~/.codex/agents/*.toml"]
    end
    subgraph Contract["계약 층 (templates/AGENTS.md)"]
        CAP["child_agent_protocol<br/>Max 6 concurrent / leader↔worker"]
        DR["delegation_rules<br/>deep-interview/ralplan/team/ralph/solo"]
        TP["team_pipeline<br/>plan→prd→exec→verify→fix"]
    end
    subgraph Exec["실행 위계 (skills/)"]
        Auto["$autopilot (풀 자율)"]
        Ralph["$ralph (지속 단일소유 루프)"]
        Ulw["$ultrawork (병렬 엔진·컴포넌트)"]
        Team["$team N:type (tmux 병렬 팀)"]
    end
    subgraph Runtime["조정 층 (crates/omx-runtime-core)"]
        Auth["AuthorityLease<br/>리더 1명 권한 리스"]
        Disp["DispatchLog<br/>워커 작업 append-only"]
        Mail["MailboxLog<br/>워커간 메시지"]
        Replay["ReplayState<br/>멱등 + 커서 재생"]
    end
    Defs --> Toml
    Prompts --> Toml
    Toml -.spawn_agent.-> Contract
    Auto --> Ralph
    Auto --> Team
    Ralph --> Ulw
    Team --> Runtime
    Ralph --> Runtime
    CAP & DR & TP --> Exec
    Mux["omx-mux (tmux send-keys/capture-pane)"] --> Workers["워커 패인 N (Codex/Claude CLI)"]
    Runtime --> Mux

1. Declaration layer — 34 AgentDefinition

The AgentDefinition interface in src/agents/definitions.ts:7-18 defines the metadata vocabulary for collaborative routing. The routing dimension is more explicit than Claude Code's agentType/whenToUse/tools/model schema:

export interface AgentDefinition {
  name: string;
  description: string;
  reasoningEffort: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
  posture: 'frontier-orchestrator' | 'deep-worker' | 'fast-lane';
  modelClass: 'frontier' | 'standard' | 'fast';
  routingRole: 'leader' | 'specialist' | 'executor';
  tools: 'read-only' | 'analysis' | 'execution' | 'data';
  category: 'build' | 'review' | 'domain' | 'product' | 'coordination';
}

The role these four pillars play in collaboration:

axis value collaboration meaning
posture frontier-orchestrator / deep-worker / fast-lane Propensity to delegate vs. direct execution. orchestrator is “first decision is a routing problem”, deep-worker is “bias toward direct execution”, fast-lane is “escalate rather than bluff” (native-config.ts:27-62 POSTURE_OVERLAYS)
modelClass frontier / standard / fast model class guidance overlay (native-config.ts:64-92)
routingRole leader / specialist / executor Directly related to the leader↔worker separation of <child_agent_protocol>. Leader owns planning, integration, and verification, executor executes slices, specialist provides narrow advice
tools read-only / analysis / execution / data Permission pattern. explore/architect/critic is read-only, executor/test-engineer/build-fixer is execution

1.1 Distribution by routing role (definitions.ts)

routingRole Representative Agent Collaboration Award Position
leader analyst, planner, architect, verifier, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, product-manager, critic, scholastic, prometheus-strict-{metis,momus,oracle} Planning/Verification/Integration/Consensus Gate subject
executor executor, team-executor, debugger, test-engineer, build-fixer, designer, qa-tester, git-master, code-simplifier Responsible for actual implementation/modification slice
specialist explore, style-reviewer, dependency-expert, researcher, writer, vision, ux-researcher, information-architect, product-analyst narrow and deep short hair

Key pairs:

  • explore vs researcher vs dependency-expert — explore(fast-lane/read-only) is “repo facts, not external docs”, researcher(fast-lane/analysis) is official document, dependency-expert(frontier-orchestrator/analysis) is package/SDK comparison (templates/AGENTS.md:155-160). In collaboration, when a leader needs external evidence, he or she routes it to one of these three without relying on recall.
  • executor vs team-executor — Both are execution/deep-worker, but team-executor is modelClass: frontier, which is “supervised team execution for conservative delivery lanes”. That is, non-team lane is executor, team lane is team-executor(definitions.ts:31-40).

1.2 Special collaboration persona

  • prometheus-strict 3 types (metis/momus/oracle, category: coordination, all leader): Verification trio for the $prometheus-strict workflow. metis=requirements interviewer/ambiguity mapper, momus=adversarial planning critic, oracle=implementation readiness verification/handoff referee (definitions.ts:315-344). The three cross-verify the output from different perspectives.
  • critic(coordination/leader/read-only): Adversarial reviewer of the $ralplan consensus loop (Planner→Architect→Critic).
  • scholastic: "ontology-first reasoning reviewer" — Advisory reviewing category errors, hidden assumptions, and modality separation (definitions.ts:356-364). Separate advisory not included in $ralplan durable gate (Architect → Critic).
  • vision(frontier/fast-lane/read-only): Image/screenshot/diagram analysis, $visual-ralph integration.

2. Declaration → Compile native agent (native-config.ts)

omx setup converts each AgentDefinition + prompts/<name>.md to Codex native TOML. This is the collaborative unit that Codex spawn_agent actually sees.

2.1 generateAgentToml (native-config.ts:308-324)

export function generateAgentToml(agent, promptContent, options = {}) {
  const resolvedModel = resolveAgentModel(agent, options);
  return generateStandaloneAgentToml({
    name: agent.name,
    description: agent.description,
    developerInstructions: composeRoleInstructions(promptContent, agent, resolvedModel),
    model: resolvedModel,
    modelProvider: getCodexConfigRootModelProvider(options.codexHomeOverride),
    reasoningEffort: getAgentReasoningOverride(agent.name, ...) ?? agent.reasoningEffort,
  });
}

installNativeAgentConfigs(native-config.ts:330-390) uses only agents allowed by the catalog manifest in ~/.codex/agents/<name>.toml. If the prompt file does not exist, skip(existsSync(promptPath)). If it already exists, skip it without --force.

2.2 composeRoleInstructions — Compose prompt overlays (native-config.ts:186-228)

Collaboration behavior is injected into the developer_instructions not just the prompt body, but also a composite of posture/model_class overlays:

[prompts/<name>.md 본문 (frontmatter 제거)]
+ POSTURE_OVERLAYS[posture]          ← 위임/직접실행 성향
+ MODEL_CLASS_OVERLAYS[modelClass]   ← 모델 클래스 가이던스
+ (gpt-5.4-mini면 EXACT_MINI_MODEL_OVERLAY)
+ ## OMX Agent Metadata
    - role / posture / model_class / routing_role / resolved_model

In other words, even if the same executor.md prompt is synthesized as a frontier-orchestrator, “default to delegation” is added, and if it is synthesized as a deep-worker, “bias toward direct execution and end-to-end completion” is added. Collaboration tendencies are determined at the time of composition, not as a static prompt. This is more assembly than Claude Code's single getSystemPrompt() function.

3. Collaboration Agreement — templates/AGENTS.md

omx does not create a system prompt directly, but installs AGENTS.md, which Codex reads, as the top-level operating contract. Collaboration rules are embedded here as marker-bound.

3.1 delegation_rules — Lane selection (AGENTS.md:97-112)

The default posture is "Default posture: work directly." Delegation is formalized as a mode selection decision:

lane trigger condition Collaborative personality
$deep-interview Unclear intent/Missing boundaries/"don't assume" Handoff after disambiguation (not implemented)
$ralplan Demand is clear, planning/trade-off/test configuration needs to be reviewed Planner→Architect→Critic consensus
$team Approved plan requires multi-lane parallel execution tmux coordination
$ralph Approved Plan Requires Continuing Single Ownership Completion/Verification Loop persistence loop
Solo execute Already scoped + completed + verifiable with one agent No delegation

Explicit rules: "Delegate only when it materially improves quality, speed, or safety. Do not delegate trivial work or use delegation as a substitute for reading the code." In non-team mode, use executor (or standard role), and worker is reserved only in active team/swarm sessions (AGENTS.md:109-110).

3.2 child_agent_protocol — leader↔worker separation (AGENTS.md:114-134)

Core contract of collaboration. Contrast Claude Code's "teammate flat roster":

Leader Responsibilities: (1) Select mode + maintain user-facing brief, (2) Delegate only bounded·verifiable subtasks with clear ownership, (3) Consolidate results·make subsequent decisions·Own final verification.

Worker Responsibilities: (1) Execute only allocation slices, do not rewrite global plan/mode switch, (2) Stay within allocated write scope and report blocker/shared-file conflicts/handoffs upwards, (3) Request scope expansion/resolution of ambiguity to leader instead of silently freelancing.

Rules:

  • Max 6 concurrent child agents (AGENTS.md:126) — Concurrency limit different from Claude Code's fork turn limit of 200.
  • Child prompt is under AGENTS.md authority.
  • Child agent "finish their assigned role, not recursively orchestrate unless explicitly told" — Recursive orchestration is prohibited by default (Similar to Claude Code teammate not being able to spawn other teammates).
  • The model prefers leader inheritance by omitting spawn_agent.model. If frontier override is needed, use OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL (currently gpt-5.5) and prohibit stale values ​​(gpt-5.2). Prefer reasoning_effort adjustment to model forcing (AGENTS.md:131-133).

4. Execution hierarchy — autopilot / ralph / ultrawork / team

omx's collaboration is not a single tool, but a hierarchy of skills that surround each other. The essence of collaboration is how each skill spawns/coordinates other skills and agents.

4.1 Hierarchy relationship (skills/*/SKILL.md)

$autopilot  →  deep-interview → ralplan → ultragoal (+team if needed) → code-review → ultraqa
   │           (풀 자율 파이프라인. 기본 Ultragoal, 필요시 Team/병렬)
   │
$ralph      →  ultrawork를 감싸 + 세션 지속 + 자동 재시도 + 강제 architect 검증
   │           "wraps ultrawork's parallel execution with session persistence,
   │            automatic retry, and mandatory verification"
   │
$ultrawork  →  병렬 실행 엔진. "It is a component, not a standalone persistence mode...
   │            not Ralph's persistence loop." (컴포넌트일 뿐, 지속성 없음)
   │
$team       →  tmux 병렬 워커 N. ralph/ultrawork와 직교 — 같은 프로세스 in-session
                fanout이 아니라 *독립 CLI 세션* 코디네이션

The description of autopilot itself is a pipeline (skills/autopilot/SKILL.md:3): "Strict autonomous loop: $deep-interview -> $ralplan -> $ultragoal (+ $team if needed) -> $code-review -> $ultraqa". In other words, autopilot is a meta-orchestrator that sequentially calls other skills.

4.2 ultrawork — in-session parallel (spawn_agent fanout)

$ultrawork (skills/ultrawork/SKILL.md) is Codex native spawn_agent based in-session parallel. Don't use tmux:

  • "Fire independent agent calls simultaneously — never serialize independent work."
  • "Use run_in_background: true for operations over ~30 seconds."
  • "Always pass the model parameter explicitly when delegating."
  • 1 direct-tool lane + multiple background evidence lanes (docs/tests/regression) at the same time.
  • Force definition of pass/fail acceptance criteria before execution.

This is the closest surface to Claude Code's fork/parallel subagent in omx. However, there is no persistence/architect sign-off(component).

4.3 ralph — persistent singly-owned loop + force gate

$ralph (skills/ralph/SKILL.md) wraps the parallel execution of ultrawork and guarantees completion. The prompt body itself contains the loop state (SKILL.md:6):

[RALPH + ULTRAWORK - ITERATION {{ITERATION}}/{{MAX}}]
Your previous attempt did not output the completion promise. Continue working on the task.

How ralph coordinates other agents (SKILL.md:42-90):

  1. Pre-context intake gate — Prevent execution from starting without a .omx/context/{slug}-{ts}.md snapshot.
  2. Parallel delegation — Routing tasks to specialists by tier (LOW/STANDARD/THOROUGH). If it is a follow-up to ralplan, specify the implementation/evidence/sign-off lane in the approved roster.
  3. Visual task gate — If there is a screenshot, the $visual-ralph verdict (score>=90) is persistent in .omx/state/{scope}/ralph-progress.json before each edit.
  4. Fresh evidence verification → tiered architect verification (role=architect, Ralph floor=STANDARD).
  5. Mandatory deslop → regression re-verification.
  6. When approved, clear the status with /cancel, and when rejected, re-verify the same tier.

4.4 PRD + test-spec gate (force blocking)

The strongest coercion in collaboration is the ralph gate (AGENTS.md:207-210), which blocks implementation with filesystem facts:

- Enforce ralplan-first when ralph is active and planning is not complete.
- Planning is complete only after both .omx/plans/prd-*.md and .omx/plans/test-spec-*.md exist.
- Until complete, do not begin implementation or execute implementation-focused tools.

This gate is combined with the Stop hook (hooks.json, timeout 30s) to prevent incomplete state termination. The key point is that it is execution blocking rather than a prompt recommendation — if the leader delegates implementation to an executor without a PRD/test-spec, the tool execution itself is refused.

5. $team — tmux parallel team

$team (skills/team/SKILL.md) is the pinnacle of omx collaboration. It is a state machine, not a simple fan-out, and replacement with in-process spawn_agent fanout is prohibited (SKILL.md:24-33).

5.1 native subagent vs team (SKILL.md:12-16)

Situation Select
bounded, in-session parallel — one leader fanouts several independent subtasks and waits for them directly Codex native subagents (spawn_agent)
durable tmux workers, shared task state, mailbox/dispatch coordination, worktree, explicit lifecycle, long-term parallelism beyond one inference burst omx team

Specifies: "Native subagents can complement team/ralph execution, but they do not replace the tmux team runtime's stateful coordination contract."

5.2 Invocation Contract — $team N:executor (SKILL.md:35-39)

omx team [N:agent-type] "<task description>"
omx team 3:executor "analyze feature X and report flaws"

Bottom line: N:agent-type selects the worker role prompt, not the worker CLI (SKILL.md:68). CLI (codex vs claude) is selected as a separate env:

  • OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI=claude — The entire Claude team.
  • OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI_MAP=codex,claude — Mixed (Worker1=Codex, Worker2=Claude)

That is, omx can mix Codex and Claude workers in one team (WorkerCli::{Codex,Claude,Other} in crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs:45-67). submit_presses_for_worker_cli handles different submit semantics with Enter Claude=1 time and Codex/other=2 times.

5.3 Walker Bootstrap (SKILL.md:138-163)

The procedure for team launch to bring up the worker pane:

  1. Team state initialization: .omx/state/team/<team>/{config.json,manifest.v2.json,tasks/task-<id>.json}
  2. Worker-agents.md synthesis: Project AGENTS.md + worker overlay (Original AGENTS.md remains unchanged)
  3. Canonical shared state root interpretation: <leader-cwd>/.omx/state
  4. Split current tmux window into worker pane
  5. Inject worker launch env:
    • OMX_TEAM_WORKER=<team>/worker-<n>
    • OMX_TEAM_STATE_ROOT=<leader-cwd>/.omx/state
    • OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD=<leader-cwd>
    • Worker CLI is selected as OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI/_MAP
  6. Wait for worker readiness by polling capture-pane
  7. Create per-worker inbox.md and trigger with tmux send-keys
  8. The leader maintains the existing pattern; Follow-up is status/resume/shutdown

IMPORTANT (SKILL.md:159-164): Leaders remain in their own pane, worker panes are independent full Codex/Claude CLI sessions, and workers can run on a separate git worktree with omx team --worktree, but share one team state root. Worker ACK goes to mailbox/leader-fixed.json.

5.4 Canonical Pipeline (AGENTS.md:227-234)

team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix (loop)
Terminal states: complete, failed, cancelled.

The src/team/ modules underpin this state machine: dag-schema.ts (task DAG), allocation-policy.ts/delegation-policy.ts (worker distribution), approved-execution.ts (approval execution gates), delivery-log.ts, phase-controller.ts, role-router.ts, worker-bootstrap.ts, worktree.ts, mcp-comm.ts. omx team ralph ... has been removed, and if a persistent single-ownership loop is needed, a separate omx ralph ... is launched (SKILL.md:55-58).

6. Coordination Layer — Event Sourcing Rust Runtime

Since team/ralph workers are separate processes/sessions, coordination is not possible in-memory. crates/omx-runtime-core solves this with append-only event sourcing — the most portable asset of the omx collaboration.

6.1 Command/event vocabulary (lib.rs:17-43)

pub const RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION: u32 = 1;
pub const RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES: &[&str] = &[
    "acquire-authority", "renew-authority",                          // 리더 권한 리스
    "queue-dispatch", "mark-notified", "mark-delivered", "mark-failed", // 디스패치 생명주기
    "request-replay", "capture-snapshot",                            // 복구/스냅샷
    "create-mailbox-message", "mark-mailbox-notified", "mark-mailbox-delivered", // 메일박스
];
pub const RUNTIME_EVENT_NAMES: &[&str] = &[
    "authority-acquired", "authority-renewed",
    "dispatch-queued", "dispatch-notified", "dispatch-delivered", "dispatch-failed",
    "replay-requested", "snapshot-captured",
    "mailbox-message-created", "mailbox-notified", "mailbox-delivered",
];

RuntimeEngine::process(engine.rs:103) receives a command, updates domain state, and returns the corresponding event — the command → event transformation is the single path for all collaborative state transitions.

6.2 AuthorityLease — Enforce one leader (authority.rs)

Foundation for enforcing the "one leader" norm of <child_agent_protocol> at runtime. AuthorityLease::acquire(authority.rs:50-70) returns AlreadyHeldByOther if it is already held by another owner:

pub fn acquire(&mut self, owner, lease_id, leased_until) -> Result<(), AuthorityError> {
    if let Some(ref current) = self.owner {
        if *current != owner {
            return Err(AuthorityError::AlreadyHeldByOther { current_owner: current.clone() });
        }
    }
    self.owner = Some(owner.into()); ...
}

renew is OwnerMismatch in case of owner mismatch. Leases expire with leased_until and are marked with the stale flag — if the leader dies, another node can take over authority.

6.3 DispatchLog — Worker tasks (dispatch.rs)

The work sent by the leader to the worker is append-only recorded with DispatchRecord (dispatch.rs:27-38). State Machine: Pending → Notified → Delivered (or Failed). Invalid transitions are rejected as InvalidTransition (dispatch.rs:45).

The actual delivery result is sorted into DispatchOutcomeReason (lib.rs:84-94) — modeling the uncertainty of tmux send-keys:

  • DeliveredConfirmed / DeliveredConfirmedActiveTask / DeliveredUnconfirmed
  • DeferredLeaderPaneMissing / DeferredShellNotInjectable (pane missing or shell injection not possible → pending)
  • FailedMissingTarget / FailedTargetResolution / FailedPreflight / FailedSend

QueueTransition (lib.rs:116-130) maps this to KeepPending/MarkNotified/MarkFailed. In other words, distinguishing between “sent but not confirmed” and “on hold due to lack of confirmation” is the key to collaboration reliability.

6.4 MailboxLog — Inter-worker messages (mailbox.rs)

MailboxRecord (mailbox.rs:5-14) records communication between workers by containing from_worker/to_worker/body. mark_delivered prevents duplicate delivery with AlreadyDelivered (mailbox.rs:78-87). This is the substructure of mailbox/leader-fixed.json ACK and team mcp-comm.ts in §5.3. Claude Code The role is the same as inProcessRunner's mailbox polling, but the difference here is that it is a persistent log that goes beyond the process.

6.5 ReplayState — Idempotent + cursor playback (replay.rs)

Mechanism to resume collaboration after crash/context compression (replay.rs:7-26):

pub struct ReplayState {
    cursor: Option<String>,
    seen_event_ids: HashSet<String>,
    deferred_leader_notification: bool,
}
/// Returns true if the event is new, false if already seen.
pub fn record_event(&mut self, event_id) -> bool {
    self.seen_event_ids.insert(event_id.into())  // HashSet → 멱등
}

Idempotently skips events already processed with seen_event_ids and plays them starting from cursor. deferred_leader_notification is a flag that withholds notification when there is no leader pane and delivers it later. omx's PreCompact/PostCompact hooks combine with this ReplayState to ensure that team collaboration resumes even after context compression.

6.6 RuntimeEngine — File lock serialization (engine.rs:232-252)

Since multiple workers write to the same state dir simultaneously, persist holds engine.lock with fs2::FileExt::lock_exclusive and writes snapshot.json/events.json/mailbox.json. write_compatibility_view(engine.rs:256) writes accompanying section files for legacy TS readers (team/doctor/HUD) — Rust runtime and TS control plane communicate via files.

7. omx-mux — tmux transport

The physical manipulation of the worker pane is handled by crates/omx-mux (MuxAdapter trait + TmuxAdapter implementation).

7.1 send-keys / capture-pane (tmux.rs)

  • build_send_keys_args(tmux.rs:49) — Inject literal text into worker pane. InputEnvelope(types.rs:72-79) encapsulates text + SubmitPolicy(enter(presses, delay_ms)). The number of Enters (Claude 1/Codex 2) for each CLI in §5.2 flows here.
  • build_capture_pane_args(tmux.rs:59) — Capture pane output tail with tmux capture-pane -t <target> -p -S -<lines>. Used for worker readiness polling and dispatch confirmation.

7.2 confirmation policy (types.rs:185-201)

ConfirmationPolicy distinguishes between narrow/wide capture lines (narrow_capture_lines: 8, wide_capture_lines: 80). In other words, quick confirmation captures 8 lines and detailed confirmation captures 80 lines to see whether the dispatch actually arrived. DispatchTransportKind::Tmux (lib.rs:69-72) is the only transport — with the tradeoff of POSIX/tmux dependency (not supported on Windows).

8. Comparison of collaboration with Claude Code / Codex

perspective omx Claude Code Codex
Sub-Agent Unit Independent CLI session in tmux pane (team) + spawn_agent (ultrawork) Same process fork / inProcessRunner teammate Same session child thread
Declaration Method 34 AgentDefinition → TOML compilation builtin + .claude/agents/*.{md,toml} config-based
Adjustable transport tmux send-keys/capture-pane + file event log polling in-memory mailbox (AsyncLocalStorage) Arc/Weak in-process
Turn-Survival ✅ Event Sourcing + ReplayState Cursor Replay ❌ (Process life cycle only) ❌
Leader Force AuthorityLease (Runtime) flat roster (contract) None
Concurrency Limit Max 6 concurrent children fork 200 turns config
Heterogeneous CLI Mix ✅ Codex+Claude team ❌ ❌
Quality Gate PRD+test-spec file exists + Stop hook blocking handoff sorter (shouldBlock) None
Quarantine git worktree (omx team --worktree) isolation: "worktree" same cwd

cli-jaw comparison implications

  • (Turn-Survival Collaboration = Event Sourcing) The most portable asset of omx is the command→event conversion + ReplayState (seen_event_ids idempotent + cursor play + engine.lock file lock) in crates/omx-runtime-core. If the dispatch of [[cli-jaw]] is in-memory within a single turn/process, the structure of recording all collaborative state transitions as append-only events like omx and playing from the cursor after crash/compression is the standard for "multi-agents that survive beyond turns." As cli-jaw drags the background job (run_in_background) beyond the turn boundary, the model that subdivides the dispatch result into confirmed/unconfirmed/pending/failed like DispatchOutcomeReason is directly referenced.

  • (leader enforcement at runtime, not contract) Claude Code places leader↔worker separation in a prompted contract (flat roster), but omx enforces "one leader" at runtime with AuthorityLease (acquire returns AlreadyHeldByOther). When cli-jaw dispatches multiple agents, enforcing which agent owns the global plan by lease/lock rather than prompt recommendation structurally prevents conflicts where "two agents rewrite the plan at the same time".

  • (quality gated by filesystem fact) ralph of omx allows execution of implementation tools only if .omx/plans/prd-*.md + test-spec-*.md both exist, and the Stop hook blocks incomplete termination. This is a pattern that forces "no implementation without planning" to be an execution block rather than a prompt — when trusting the completion of subagents dispatched by cli-jaw, checking prerequisite file existence as a gate in addition to the handoff classifier (Claude Code method) reduces the failure of "reporting half-done work as done."

  • (Mixing heterogeneous workers + transport abstraction) omx mixes Codex and Claude workers in one team (WorkerCli, OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI_MAP), and the runtime absorbs the submit semantics (Enter once vs. twice) for each CLI. However, the transport is only tmux (DispatchTransportKind::Tmux), so it is not supported on Windows. If cli-jaw uses a heterogeneous agent (different model/different CLI) as the dispatch target, it is advantageous for cross-platform/scalability to abstract transport into a trait/interface like omx's MuxAdapter trait — omx's binding to tmux should be left as an explicit trade-off.

Technical Reference

Core files

file Role
src/agents/definitions.ts 34 AgentDefinition (posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools/category)
src/agents/native-config.ts generateAgentToml, composeRoleInstructions, POSTURE/MODEL_CLASS overlay

templates/AGENTS.md <delegation_rules>/<child_agent_protocol>/<team_pipeline> Collaboration Agreement
skills/team/SKILL.md tmux parallel team operation contract (native subagent vs team, worker bootstrap)
skills/ralph/SKILL.md persistent single-ownership loop + architect verification + PRD/test-spec gate
skills/ultrawork/SKILL.md in-session parallel engine (spawn_agent fanout, component)
skills/autopilot/SKILL.md Fully autonomous pipeline meta-orchestrator
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs Command/Event Vocabulary, WorkerCli, DispatchOutcomeReason, QueueTransition
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/authority.rs AuthorityLease (leader authority lease)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/dispatch.rs DispatchLog/DispatchRecord (worker task append-only)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/mailbox.rs MailboxLog/MailboxRecord (inter-worker messages)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/replay.rs ReplayState (idempotent + cursor playback)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/engine.rs RuntimeEngine (command→event, file lock persistent)
crates/omx-mux/src/{tmux,types}.rs MuxAdapter/TmuxAdapter, send-keys/capture-pane
src/team/*.ts DAG/allocation/role-router/worker-bootstrap/worktree state machine

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

Change history

  • 2026-05-29: First written based on oh-my-codex(omx) v0.18.6 source. 34 AgentDefinition (posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools) with native TOML compilation (generateAgentToml/composeRoleInstructions overlay composition), AGENTS.md collaboration contract (delegation_rules/child_agent_protocol Max 6 concurrent/leader↔worker), $autopilot→$ralph→$ultrawork/$team execution hierarchy and spawn/coordinate method, PRD+test-spec gate and Stop hook blocking, $team N:executor tmux parallel team (mix of worker bootstrap and heterogeneous CLI), event sourcing Rust runtime (AuthorityLease/DispatchLog/MailboxLog/ReplayState/RuntimeEngine file lock), omx-mux Implications of tmux transport (send-keys/capture-pane), Claude Code/Codex collaboration comparison, cli-jaw dispatch comparison Section 4.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 005_subagents-collab/05_omx_subagent.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

oh-my-codex (omx) 서브에이전트 / 협업

분석 스냅샷: 171_oh-my-codex/ — subagent/collaboration dispatch.

[[Claude Code]]가 단일 Agent 도구(내부명 Task)에 fork/teammate/worktree를 모두 욱여넣고, [[Codex]]가 spawn_agent/send_input/wait_agent 같은 child-thread 제어 도구를 내장 번들에 두는 것과 달리, oh-my-codex(omx)는 자체 에이전트 루프를 갖지 않는다. omx는 OpenAI Codex CLI 위에 얹는 오케스트레이션 컨트롤 플레인으로, 협업을 세 층위로 분리해 구현한다:

  1. 선언 층 (정적 자산) — src/agents/definitions.ts의 34개 AgentDefinition과 prompts/*.md(37개) 프롬프트 본문. omx setup이 이를 ~/.codex/agents/*.toml 네이티브 에이전트로 컴파일한다(generateAgentToml). 이 층의 협업은 Codex 네이티브 spawn_agent가 소비하는 "역할 카탈로그"다.
  2. 계약 층 (런타임 규범) — templates/AGENTS.md의 <child_agent_protocol>/<delegation_rules>/<team_pipeline>. 누가 leader이고 누가 worker인지, 최대 동시 child 수, 모드 선택 규칙을 프롬프트가 아니라 운영 계약으로 못박는다.
  3. 조정 층 (이벤트 소싱 런타임) — Rust crates/omx-runtime-core. $team N:executor 병렬 팀과 $ralph 지속 루프가 tmux 위에서 다중 워커를 띄울 때, 권한 리스(AuthorityLease)·디스패치 로그(DispatchLog)·메일박스(MailboxLog)·리플레이(ReplayState)로 "한 번의 추론 버스트를 넘어 살아남는" 조정을 한다.

핵심 차이: Claude Code의 서브에이전트는 같은 프로세스 안의 fork/inProcessRunner이고, Codex의 서브에이전트는 같은 세션 안의 child thread다. omx의 워커는 tmux 패인에서 도는 독립 full Codex/Claude CLI 세션이다 — 프로세스도, 세션도, 종종 git worktree도 분리된다. 조정은 in-memory가 아니라 .omx/state/team/... 파일 + append-only 이벤트 로그로 일어난다.

신뢰도: ■■■■□ (높음) — definitions.ts, native-config.ts, crates/omx-runtime-core/src/*.rs, crates/omx-mux/src/*.rs, skills/{team,ralph,ultrawork,autopilot}/SKILL.md, templates/AGENTS.md의 실제 소스에서 일관 확인.

graph TD
    subgraph Decl["선언 층 (src/agents/definitions.ts)"]
        Defs["34 AgentDefinition<br/>posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools"]
        Prompts["prompts/*.md (37)"]
        Toml["generateAgentToml<br/>→ ~/.codex/agents/*.toml"]
    end
    subgraph Contract["계약 층 (templates/AGENTS.md)"]
        CAP["child_agent_protocol<br/>Max 6 concurrent / leader↔worker"]
        DR["delegation_rules<br/>deep-interview/ralplan/team/ralph/solo"]
        TP["team_pipeline<br/>plan→prd→exec→verify→fix"]
    end
    subgraph Exec["실행 위계 (skills/)"]
        Auto["$autopilot (풀 자율)"]
        Ralph["$ralph (지속 단일소유 루프)"]
        Ulw["$ultrawork (병렬 엔진·컴포넌트)"]
        Team["$team N:type (tmux 병렬 팀)"]
    end
    subgraph Runtime["조정 층 (crates/omx-runtime-core)"]
        Auth["AuthorityLease<br/>리더 1명 권한 리스"]
        Disp["DispatchLog<br/>워커 작업 append-only"]
        Mail["MailboxLog<br/>워커간 메시지"]
        Replay["ReplayState<br/>멱등 + 커서 재생"]
    end
    Defs --> Toml
    Prompts --> Toml
    Toml -.spawn_agent.-> Contract
    Auto --> Ralph
    Auto --> Team
    Ralph --> Ulw
    Team --> Runtime
    Ralph --> Runtime
    CAP & DR & TP --> Exec
    Mux["omx-mux (tmux send-keys/capture-pane)"] --> Workers["워커 패인 N (Codex/Claude CLI)"]
    Runtime --> Mux

1. 선언 층 — 34개 AgentDefinition

src/agents/definitions.ts:7-18의 AgentDefinition 인터페이스는 협업 라우팅의 메타데이터 어휘를 정의한다. Claude Code의 agentType/whenToUse/tools/model 스키마보다 라우팅 차원이 명시적이다:

export interface AgentDefinition {
  name: string;
  description: string;
  reasoningEffort: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
  posture: 'frontier-orchestrator' | 'deep-worker' | 'fast-lane';
  modelClass: 'frontier' | 'standard' | 'fast';
  routingRole: 'leader' | 'specialist' | 'executor';
  tools: 'read-only' | 'analysis' | 'execution' | 'data';
  category: 'build' | 'review' | 'domain' | 'product' | 'coordination';
}

이 네 축이 협업에서 하는 역할:

축 값 협업 의미
posture frontier-orchestrator / deep-worker / fast-lane 위임 vs 직접 실행 성향. orchestrator는 "first decision is a routing problem", deep-worker는 "bias toward direct execution", fast-lane은 "escalate rather than bluff" (native-config.ts:27-62 POSTURE_OVERLAYS)
modelClass frontier / standard / fast 모델 클래스 가이던스 오버레이(native-config.ts:64-92)
routingRole leader / specialist / executor <child_agent_protocol>의 leader↔worker 분리와 직결. leader는 계획·통합·검증을 소유, executor는 슬라이스 실행, specialist는 좁은 자문
tools read-only / analysis / execution / data 권한 패턴. explore/architect/critic은 read-only, executor/test-engineer/build-fixer는 execution

1.1 라우팅 역할별 분포 (definitions.ts)

routingRole 대표 에이전트 협업상 위치
leader analyst, planner, architect, verifier, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, product-manager, critic, scholastic, prometheus-strict-{metis,momus,oracle} 계획·검증·통합·합의 게이트의 주체
executor executor, team-executor, debugger, test-engineer, build-fixer, designer, qa-tester, git-master, code-simplifier 실제 구현/수정 슬라이스 담당
specialist explore, style-reviewer, dependency-expert, researcher, writer, vision, ux-researcher, information-architect, product-analyst 좁고 깊은 단발 자문

핵심 페어:

  • explore vs researcher vs dependency-expert — explore(fast-lane/read-only)는 "repo facts, not external docs", researcher(fast-lane/analysis)는 공식 문서, dependency-expert(frontier-orchestrator/analysis)는 패키지/SDK 비교(templates/AGENTS.md:155-160). 협업에서 leader가 외부 증거가 필요하면 recall에 의존하지 않고 이 셋 중 하나로 라우팅한다.
  • executor vs team-executor — 둘 다 execution/deep-worker이지만 team-executor는 modelClass: frontier로 "supervised team execution for conservative delivery lanes"다. 즉 비-팀 단발은 executor, 팀 레인은 team-executor(definitions.ts:31-40).

1.2 특수 협업 페르소나

  • prometheus-strict 3종(metis/momus/oracle, category: coordination, 모두 leader): $prometheus-strict 워크플로우의 검증 트리오. metis=요구사항 인터뷰어/모호성 매퍼, momus=적대적 계획 비판가, oracle=구현 준비도 검증/핸드오프 심판(definitions.ts:315-344). 셋이 서로 다른 관점으로 산출물을 교차 검증한다.
  • critic(coordination/leader/read-only): $ralplan 합의 루프(Planner→Architect→Critic)의 적대적 검토자.
  • scholastic: "ontology-first reasoning reviewer" — 카테고리 오류·숨은 가정·양상(modality) 분리를 검토하는 자문(definitions.ts:356-364). $ralplan durable gate(Architect→Critic)에는 들지 않는 별도 advisory.
  • vision(frontier/fast-lane/read-only): 이미지/스크린샷/다이어그램 분석, $visual-ralph 연동.

2. 선언 → 네이티브 에이전트 컴파일 (native-config.ts)

omx setup이 각 AgentDefinition + prompts/<name>.md를 Codex 네이티브 TOML로 변환한다. 이것이 Codex spawn_agent가 실제로 보는 협업 단위다.

2.1 generateAgentToml (native-config.ts:308-324)

export function generateAgentToml(agent, promptContent, options = {}) {
  const resolvedModel = resolveAgentModel(agent, options);
  return generateStandaloneAgentToml({
    name: agent.name,
    description: agent.description,
    developerInstructions: composeRoleInstructions(promptContent, agent, resolvedModel),
    model: resolvedModel,
    modelProvider: getCodexConfigRootModelProvider(options.codexHomeOverride),
    reasoningEffort: getAgentReasoningOverride(agent.name, ...) ?? agent.reasoningEffort,
  });
}

installNativeAgentConfigs(native-config.ts:330-390)는 카탈로그 매니페스트가 허용한 에이전트만 ~/.codex/agents/<name>.toml로 쓴다. prompt 파일이 없으면 skip(existsSync(promptPath)), 이미 존재하면 --force 없이는 skip한다.

2.2 composeRoleInstructions — 프롬프트 오버레이 합성 (native-config.ts:186-228)

협업 행동은 prompt 본문만이 아니라 posture/model_class 오버레이가 합성된 developer_instructions로 주입된다:

[prompts/<name>.md 본문 (frontmatter 제거)]
+ POSTURE_OVERLAYS[posture]          ← 위임/직접실행 성향
+ MODEL_CLASS_OVERLAYS[modelClass]   ← 모델 클래스 가이던스
+ (gpt-5.4-mini면 EXACT_MINI_MODEL_OVERLAY)
+ ## OMX Agent Metadata
    - role / posture / model_class / routing_role / resolved_model

즉 같은 executor.md 프롬프트라도 frontier-orchestrator로 합성되면 "default to delegation", deep-worker로 합성되면 "bias toward direct execution and end-to-end completion"이 추가된다. 협업 성향은 정적 프롬프트가 아니라 합성 시점에 결정된다. 이는 Claude Code의 getSystemPrompt() 단일 함수보다 조립적이다.

3. 협업 계약 — templates/AGENTS.md

omx는 시스템 프롬프트를 직접 만들지 않고, Codex가 읽는 AGENTS.md를 최상위 운영 계약으로 설치한다. 협업 규칙은 여기에 마커-바운드로 박혀 있다.

3.1 delegation_rules — 레인 선택 (AGENTS.md:97-112)

기본 자세는 "Default posture: work directly." 위임은 모드 선택 결정으로 정형화된다:

레인 트리거 조건 협업 성격
$deep-interview 의도 불명확/경계 누락/"don't assume" 명료화 후 핸드오프(구현 안 함)
$ralplan 요구는 명확, 계획/트레이드오프/테스트형상 검토 필요 Planner→Architect→Critic 합의
$team 승인된 계획이 다중 레인 병렬 실행 필요 tmux 코디네이션
$ralph 승인된 계획이 지속 단일소유 완료/검증 루프 필요 persistence loop
Solo execute 이미 스코프됨 + 한 에이전트로 완결+검증 가능 위임 안 함

명시 규칙: "Delegate only when it materially improves quality, speed, or safety. Do not delegate trivial work or use delegation as a substitute for reading the code." 비-팀 모드에선 executor(또는 표준 역할)를 쓰고, worker는 오직 활성 team/swarm 세션에서만 예약된다(AGENTS.md:109-110).

3.2 child_agent_protocol — leader↔worker 분리 (AGENTS.md:114-134)

협업의 핵심 계약. Claude Code의 "teammate flat roster"와 대비된다:

Leader 책임: (1) 모드 선택 + user-facing 브리프 유지, (2) bounded·verifiable 서브태스크만 명확한 소유권으로 위임, (3) 결과 통합·후속 결정·최종 검증 소유.

Worker 책임: (1) 할당 슬라이스만 실행, 글로벌 계획 재작성/모드 전환 금지, (2) 할당된 write scope 안에 머물고 blocker·shared-file 충돌·핸드오프를 위로 보고, (3) silently freelancing 대신 leader에게 scope 확대/모호성 해소 요청.

규칙:

  • Max 6 concurrent child agents (AGENTS.md:126) — Claude Code의 fork 200턴 한도와 다른 동시성 한도.
  • Child prompt는 AGENTS.md 권위 아래.
  • Child agent는 "finish their assigned role, not recursively orchestrate unless explicitly told" — 재귀 오케스트레이션 기본 금지 (Claude Code teammate가 다른 teammate를 spawn 못 하는 것과 유사).
  • 모델은 spawn_agent.model 생략으로 leader 상속 선호. frontier 오버라이드가 필요하면 OMX_DEFAULT_FRONTIER_MODEL(현재 gpt-5.5)을 쓰고 stale 값(gpt-5.2) 금지. 모델 강제보다 reasoning_effort 조정 선호(AGENTS.md:131-133).

4. 실행 위계 — autopilot / ralph / ultrawork / team

omx의 협업은 단일 도구가 아니라 서로를 감싸는 스킬 위계다. 각 스킬이 어떻게 다른 스킬과 에이전트를 spawn/coordinate하는지가 협업의 본질이다.

4.1 위계 관계 (skills/*/SKILL.md)

$autopilot  →  deep-interview → ralplan → ultragoal (+team if needed) → code-review → ultraqa
   │           (풀 자율 파이프라인. 기본 Ultragoal, 필요시 Team/병렬)
   │
$ralph      →  ultrawork를 감싸 + 세션 지속 + 자동 재시도 + 강제 architect 검증
   │           "wraps ultrawork's parallel execution with session persistence,
   │            automatic retry, and mandatory verification"
   │
$ultrawork  →  병렬 실행 엔진. "It is a component, not a standalone persistence mode...
   │            not Ralph's persistence loop." (컴포넌트일 뿐, 지속성 없음)
   │
$team       →  tmux 병렬 워커 N. ralph/ultrawork와 직교 — 같은 프로세스 in-session
                fanout이 아니라 *독립 CLI 세션* 코디네이션

autopilot의 description 자체가 파이프라인이다(skills/autopilot/SKILL.md:3): "Strict autonomous loop: $deep-interview -> $ralplan -> $ultragoal (+ $team if needed) -> $code-review -> $ultraqa". 즉 autopilot은 다른 스킬들을 순차 호출하는 메타-오케스트레이터다.

4.2 ultrawork — in-session 병렬 (spawn_agent fanout)

$ultrawork(skills/ultrawork/SKILL.md)는 Codex 네이티브 spawn_agent 기반 in-session 병렬이다. tmux를 쓰지 않는다:

  • "Fire independent agent calls simultaneously — never serialize independent work."
  • "Use run_in_background: true for operations over ~30 seconds."
  • "Always pass the model parameter explicitly when delegating."
  • direct-tool 레인 1개 + background evidence 레인(docs/tests/regression) 여러 개를 동시에.
  • 실행 전 pass/fail acceptance criteria 정의 강제.

이것이 omx에서 Claude Code의 fork/병렬 서브에이전트에 가장 가까운 표면이다. 단 지속성/architect sign-off가 없다(component).

4.3 ralph — 지속 단일소유 루프 + 강제 게이트

$ralph(skills/ralph/SKILL.md)는 ultrawork의 병렬 실행을 감싸 완료를 보장한다. 프롬프트 본문 자체가 루프 상태를 담는다(SKILL.md:6):

[RALPH + ULTRAWORK - ITERATION {{ITERATION}}/{{MAX}}]
Your previous attempt did not output the completion promise. Continue working on the task.

ralph가 다른 에이전트를 coordinate하는 방식(SKILL.md:42-90):

  1. Pre-context intake 게이트 — .omx/context/{slug}-{ts}.md 스냅샷 없이는 실행 시작 금지.
  2. 병렬 위임 — 작업을 tier별 specialist로 라우팅(LOW/STANDARD/THOROUGH). ralplan 후속이면 승인된 roster에서 implementation/evidence/sign-off 레인을 명시.
  3. Visual task 게이트 — 스크린샷 있으면 매 편집 전 $visual-ralph verdict(score>=90)를 .omx/state/{scope}/ralph-progress.json에 영속.
  4. Fresh evidence 검증 → tiered architect 검증(역할=architect, Ralph floor=STANDARD).
  5. Mandatory deslop → regression 재검증.
  6. 승인 시 /cancel로 상태 정리, 거부 시 같은 tier 재검증.

4.4 PRD + test-spec 게이트 (강제 차단)

협업에서 가장 강한 강제는 파일시스템 사실로 구현을 막는 ralph 게이트다(AGENTS.md:207-210):

- Enforce ralplan-first when ralph is active and planning is not complete.
- Planning is complete only after both .omx/plans/prd-*.md and .omx/plans/test-spec-*.md exist.
- Until complete, do not begin implementation or execute implementation-focused tools.

이 게이트는 Stop 훅(hooks.json, timeout 30s)과 결합돼 미완 상태 종료를 막는다. 프롬프트 권고가 아니라 실행 차단이라는 점이 핵심 — leader가 PRD/test-spec 없이 executor에게 구현을 위임하면 도구 실행 자체가 거부된다.

5. $team — tmux 병렬 팀

$team(skills/team/SKILL.md)은 omx 협업의 정점이다. 단순 fan-out이 아니라 상태 머신이며, in-process spawn_agent fanout으로 대체가 금지된다(SKILL.md:24-33).

5.1 native subagent vs team (SKILL.md:12-16)

상황 선택
bounded, in-session 병렬 — 한 leader가 몇 독립 서브태스크를 fanout하고 직접 대기 Codex native subagents (spawn_agent)
durable tmux 워커, 공유 task state, mailbox/dispatch 코디네이션, worktree, 명시적 lifecycle, 한 추론 버스트를 넘는 장기 병렬 omx team

명시: "Native subagents can complement team/ralph execution, but they do not replace the tmux team runtime's stateful coordination contract."

5.2 호출 계약 — $team N:executor (SKILL.md:35-39)

omx team [N:agent-type] "<task description>"
omx team 3:executor "analyze feature X and report flaws"

핵심: N:agent-type은 워커 역할 프롬프트를 고르는 것이지 워커 CLI가 아니다(SKILL.md:68). CLI(codex vs claude)는 별도 env로 선택:

  • OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI=claude — 전체 Claude 팀
  • OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI_MAP=codex,claude — 혼합(워커1=Codex, 워커2=Claude)

즉 omx는 Codex와 Claude 워커를 한 팀에서 섞을 수 있다(crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs:45-67의 WorkerCli::{Codex,Claude,Other}). submit_presses_for_worker_cli는 Claude=1회, Codex/기타=2회 Enter로 다른 submit 시맨틱을 처리한다.

5.3 워커 부트스트랩 (SKILL.md:138-163)

team launch가 워커 패인을 띄우는 절차:

  1. team state 초기화: .omx/state/team/<team>/{config.json,manifest.v2.json,tasks/task-<id>.json}
  2. worker-agents.md 합성: 프로젝트 AGENTS.md + worker overlay (원본 AGENTS.md는 비변경)
  3. canonical 공유 state root 해석: <leader-cwd>/.omx/state
  4. 현재 tmux 윈도우를 워커 패인으로 분할
  5. 워커 launch env 주입:
    • OMX_TEAM_WORKER=<team>/worker-<n>
    • OMX_TEAM_STATE_ROOT=<leader-cwd>/.omx/state
    • OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD=<leader-cwd>
    • 워커 CLI는 OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI/_MAP으로 선택
  6. capture-pane 폴링으로 워커 readiness 대기
  7. per-worker inbox.md 작성 후 tmux send-keys로 트리거
  8. leader는 기존 패인 유지; 후속은 status/resume/shutdown

중요(SKILL.md:159-164): leader는 자기 패인에 남고, 워커 패인은 독립 full Codex/Claude CLI 세션이며, 워커는 omx team --worktree로 별도 git worktree에서 돌 수 있되 한 team state root를 공유한다. 워커 ACK는 mailbox/leader-fixed.json으로 간다.

5.4 캐노니컬 파이프라인 (AGENTS.md:227-234)

team-plan → team-prd → team-exec → team-verify → team-fix (loop)
Terminal states: complete, failed, cancelled.

src/team/ 모듈이 이 상태 머신을 떠받친다: dag-schema.ts(작업 DAG), allocation-policy.ts/delegation-policy.ts(워커 배분), approved-execution.ts(승인 실행 게이트), delivery-log.ts, phase-controller.ts, role-router.ts, worker-bootstrap.ts, worktree.ts, mcp-comm.ts. omx team ralph ...는 제거됐고, 지속 단일소유 루프가 필요하면 별도 omx ralph ...를 띄운다(SKILL.md:55-58).

6. 조정 층 — 이벤트 소싱 Rust 런타임

team/ralph 워커가 별개 프로세스/세션이므로, 조정은 in-memory가 불가능하다. crates/omx-runtime-core가 이를 append-only 이벤트 소싱으로 해결한다 — omx 협업의 가장 이식 가치 높은 자산.

6.1 명령/이벤트 어휘 (lib.rs:17-43)

pub const RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION: u32 = 1;
pub const RUNTIME_COMMAND_NAMES: &[&str] = &[
    "acquire-authority", "renew-authority",                          // 리더 권한 리스
    "queue-dispatch", "mark-notified", "mark-delivered", "mark-failed", // 디스패치 생명주기
    "request-replay", "capture-snapshot",                            // 복구/스냅샷
    "create-mailbox-message", "mark-mailbox-notified", "mark-mailbox-delivered", // 메일박스
];
pub const RUNTIME_EVENT_NAMES: &[&str] = &[
    "authority-acquired", "authority-renewed",
    "dispatch-queued", "dispatch-notified", "dispatch-delivered", "dispatch-failed",
    "replay-requested", "snapshot-captured",
    "mailbox-message-created", "mailbox-notified", "mailbox-delivered",
];

RuntimeEngine::process(engine.rs:103)가 command를 받아 도메인 상태를 갱신하고 대응 event를 반환한다 — command → event 변환이 모든 협업 상태 전이의 단일 경로다.

6.2 AuthorityLease — 리더 한 명 강제 (authority.rs)

<child_agent_protocol>의 "leader 1명" 규범을 런타임에서 강제하는 토대. AuthorityLease::acquire(authority.rs:50-70)는 이미 다른 owner가 쥐고 있으면 AlreadyHeldByOther를 반환한다:

pub fn acquire(&mut self, owner, lease_id, leased_until) -> Result<(), AuthorityError> {
    if let Some(ref current) = self.owner {
        if *current != owner {
            return Err(AuthorityError::AlreadyHeldByOther { current_owner: current.clone() });
        }
    }
    self.owner = Some(owner.into()); ...
}

renew는 owner 불일치 시 OwnerMismatch. 리스는 leased_until로 만료되고 stale 플래그로 표시된다 — 리더가 죽으면 다른 노드가 권한을 넘겨받을 수 있다.

6.3 DispatchLog — 워커 작업 (dispatch.rs)

leader가 워커에게 보낸 작업은 DispatchRecord(dispatch.rs:27-38)로 append-only 기록된다. 상태 머신: Pending → Notified → Delivered(또는 Failed). 무효 전이는 InvalidTransition으로 거부(dispatch.rs:45).

실제 전달 결과는 DispatchOutcomeReason(lib.rs:84-94)으로 분류된다 — tmux send-keys의 불확실성을 모델링:

  • DeliveredConfirmed / DeliveredConfirmedActiveTask / DeliveredUnconfirmed
  • DeferredLeaderPaneMissing / DeferredShellNotInjectable (패인이 없거나 셸 주입 불가 → 보류)
  • FailedMissingTarget / FailedTargetResolution / FailedPreflight / FailedSend

QueueTransition(lib.rs:116-130)이 이를 KeepPending/MarkNotified/MarkFailed로 매핑한다. 즉 "보냈지만 확인 못 함"과 "패인 없어 보류"를 구분하는 게 협업 신뢰성의 핵심.

6.4 MailboxLog — 워커간 메시지 (mailbox.rs)

MailboxRecord(mailbox.rs:5-14)는 from_worker/to_worker/body를 담아 워커 간 통신을 기록. mark_delivered는 중복 전달을 AlreadyDelivered로 막는다(mailbox.rs:78-87). 이것이 §5.3의 mailbox/leader-fixed.json ACK와 team mcp-comm.ts의 하부 구조다. Claude Code inProcessRunner의 mailbox 폴링과 역할은 같으나, 여기선 프로세스를 넘는 영속 로그라는 점이 다르다.

6.5 ReplayState — 멱등 + 커서 재생 (replay.rs)

크래시/컨텍스트 압축 후 협업을 재개하는 메커니즘(replay.rs:7-26):

pub struct ReplayState {
    cursor: Option<String>,
    seen_event_ids: HashSet<String>,
    deferred_leader_notification: bool,
}
/// Returns true if the event is new, false if already seen.
pub fn record_event(&mut self, event_id) -> bool {
    self.seen_event_ids.insert(event_id.into())  // HashSet → 멱등
}

seen_event_ids로 이미 처리한 이벤트를 멱등 스킵하고, cursor부터 재생한다. deferred_leader_notification은 리더 패인이 없을 때 알림을 보류했다가 나중에 전달하는 플래그. omx의 PreCompact/PostCompact 훅이 이 ReplayState와 결합해 컨텍스트 압축 후에도 팀 협업이 재개된다.

6.6 RuntimeEngine — 파일 락 직렬화 (engine.rs:232-252)

다중 워커가 같은 state dir에 동시 쓰기를 하므로, persist는 fs2::FileExt::lock_exclusive로 engine.lock을 잡고 snapshot.json/events.json/mailbox.json을 쓴다. write_compatibility_view(engine.rs:256)는 레거시 TS 리더(team/doctor/HUD)용 섹션 파일을 곁들여 쓴다 — Rust 런타임과 TS 컨트롤 플레인이 파일로 통신한다.

7. omx-mux — tmux 트랜스포트

워커 패인의 물리적 조작은 crates/omx-mux가 담당한다(MuxAdapter trait + TmuxAdapter 구현).

7.1 send-keys / capture-pane (tmux.rs)

  • build_send_keys_args(tmux.rs:49) — 워커 패인에 literal text 주입. InputEnvelope(types.rs:72-79)는 텍스트 + SubmitPolicy(enter(presses, delay_ms))를 캡슐화. §5.2의 CLI별 Enter 횟수(Claude 1/Codex 2)가 여기로 흐른다.
  • build_capture_pane_args(tmux.rs:59) — tmux capture-pane -t <target> -p -S -<lines>로 패인 출력 tail 캡처. 워커 readiness 폴링과 dispatch 확인에 쓰인다.

7.2 confirmation 정책 (types.rs:185-201)

ConfirmationPolicy는 narrow/wide 캡처 라인을 구분한다(narrow_capture_lines: 8, wide_capture_lines: 80). 즉 빠른 확인은 8줄, 정밀 확인은 80줄을 캡처해 dispatch가 실제 도달했는지 본다. DispatchTransportKind::Tmux(lib.rs:69-72)가 유일한 트랜스포트 — **POSIX/tmux 의존(Windows 미지원)**이라는 트레이드오프.

8. Claude Code / Codex와의 협업 비교

관점 omx Claude Code Codex
서브에이전트 단위 tmux 패인의 독립 CLI 세션 (team) + spawn_agent (ultrawork) 같은 프로세스 fork / inProcessRunner teammate 같은 세션 child thread
선언 방식 34 AgentDefinition → TOML 컴파일 내장 + .claude/agents/*.{md,toml} config 기반
조정 transport tmux send-keys/capture-pane + 파일 이벤트 로그 in-memory mailbox 폴링 (AsyncLocalStorage) Arc/Weak in-process
턴-생존 ✅ 이벤트 소싱 + ReplayState 커서 재생 ❌ (프로세스 생명주기 한정) ❌
리더 강제 AuthorityLease (런타임) flat roster (계약) 없음
동시성 한도 Max 6 concurrent child fork 200턴 config
이종 CLI 혼합 ✅ Codex+Claude 한 팀 ❌ ❌
품질 게이트 PRD+test-spec 파일 존재 + Stop 훅 차단 핸드오프 분류기 (shouldBlock) 없음
격리 git worktree (omx team --worktree) isolation: "worktree" 같은 cwd

cli-jaw 비교 시사점

  • (턴-생존 협업 = 이벤트 소싱) omx의 가장 이식 가치 높은 자산은 crates/omx-runtime-core의 command→event 변환 + ReplayState(seen_event_ids 멱등 + cursor 재생 + engine.lock 파일 락)다. [[cli-jaw]]의 dispatch가 단일 턴/프로세스 내 in-memory라면, omx처럼 모든 협업 상태 전이를 append-only 이벤트로 기록하고 크래시/압축 후 커서부터 재생하는 구조가 "턴을 넘어 살아남는 멀티에이전트"의 정석이다. cli-jaw가 백그라운드 잡(run_in_background)을 턴 경계 너머로 끌고 가는 만큼, dispatch 결과를 DispatchOutcomeReason처럼 확정/미확정/보류/실패로 세분하는 모델이 직접 참고된다.

  • (leader 강제는 계약이 아니라 런타임으로) Claude Code는 leader↔worker 분리를 프롬프트 계약(flat roster)으로 두지만, omx는 AuthorityLease로 런타임에서 "리더 1명"을 강제한다(acquire가 AlreadyHeldByOther 반환). cli-jaw가 다중 에이전트를 dispatch할 때, 어느 에이전트가 글로벌 계획을 소유하는지를 프롬프트 권고가 아니라 리스/락으로 강제하면 "두 에이전트가 동시에 계획을 재작성"하는 충돌을 구조적으로 막는다.

  • (품질을 파일시스템 사실로 게이트) omx의 ralph는 .omx/plans/prd-*.md + test-spec-*.md가 둘 다 존재해야만 구현 도구 실행을 허용하고, Stop 훅이 미완 종료를 차단한다. 이는 "계획 없이 구현 금지"를 프롬프트가 아니라 실행 차단으로 강제하는 패턴 — cli-jaw가 dispatch한 서브에이전트의 완료를 신뢰할 때, 핸드오프 분류기(Claude Code 방식)에 더해 전제 조건 파일 존재를 게이트로 검사하면 "절반만 한 작업을 done으로 보고"하는 실패를 줄인다.

  • (이종 워커 혼합 + transport 추상화) omx는 한 팀에서 Codex와 Claude 워커를 섞고(WorkerCli, OMX_TEAM_WORKER_CLI_MAP), CLI별 submit 시맨틱(Enter 1회 vs 2회)을 런타임이 흡수한다. 단 트랜스포트는 tmux 단일(DispatchTransportKind::Tmux)이라 Windows 미지원이다. cli-jaw가 이종 에이전트(다른 모델/다른 CLI)를 dispatch 대상으로 삼는다면, omx의 MuxAdapter trait처럼 transport를 trait/인터페이스로 추상화해 두는 게 크로스플랫폼·확장성에 유리하다 — omx가 tmux에 결합한 것은 명시적 트레이드오프로 남겨둘 것.

기술 참조

핵심 파일

파일 역할
src/agents/definitions.ts 34 AgentDefinition (posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools/category)
src/agents/native-config.ts generateAgentToml, composeRoleInstructions, POSTURE/MODEL_CLASS 오버레이
prompts/*.md (37) 역할 프롬프트 본문
templates/AGENTS.md <delegation_rules>/<child_agent_protocol>/<team_pipeline> 협업 계약
skills/team/SKILL.md tmux 병렬 팀 운영 계약 (native subagent vs team, 워커 부트스트랩)
skills/ralph/SKILL.md 지속 단일소유 루프 + architect 검증 + PRD/test-spec 게이트
skills/ultrawork/SKILL.md in-session 병렬 엔진 (spawn_agent fanout, component)
skills/autopilot/SKILL.md 풀 자율 파이프라인 메타-오케스트레이터
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs 명령/이벤트 어휘, WorkerCli, DispatchOutcomeReason, QueueTransition
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/authority.rs AuthorityLease (리더 권한 리스)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/dispatch.rs DispatchLog/DispatchRecord (워커 작업 append-only)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/mailbox.rs MailboxLog/MailboxRecord (워커간 메시지)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/replay.rs ReplayState (멱등 + 커서 재생)
crates/omx-runtime-core/src/engine.rs RuntimeEngine (command→event, 파일 락 영속)
crates/omx-mux/src/{tmux,types}.rs MuxAdapter/TmuxAdapter, send-keys/capture-pane
src/team/*.ts DAG/allocation/role-router/worker-bootstrap/worktree 상태 머신

이전 문서: [[05_cc_subagent]] 다음 문서: [[06_omx_surface]]

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

변경 기록

  • 2026-05-29: oh-my-codex(omx) v0.18.6 소스 기반 최초 작성. 34개 AgentDefinition(posture/modelClass/routingRole/tools)과 네이티브 TOML 컴파일(generateAgentToml/composeRoleInstructions 오버레이 합성), AGENTS.md 협업 계약(delegation_rules/child_agent_protocol Max 6 concurrent/leader↔worker), $autopilot→$ralph→$ultrawork/$team 실행 위계와 spawn/coordinate 방식, PRD+test-spec 게이트와 Stop 훅 차단, $team N:executor tmux 병렬 팀(워커 부트스트랩·이종 CLI 혼합), 이벤트 소싱 Rust 런타임(AuthorityLease/DispatchLog/MailboxLog/ReplayState/RuntimeEngine 파일 락), omx-mux tmux 트랜스포트(send-keys/capture-pane), Claude Code/Codex 협업 비교, cli-jaw dispatch 비교 시사점 4항.
22

Axis 06: App surfaces

AXIS

006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_omx_surface.md

Overview

Axis 06: App surfaces — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 171_oh-my-codex/ — app/server/client surfaces.

  • 이 문서는 Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex(OMX) v0.18.6의 앱-서버 프로토콜 / 클라이언트 표면(웹·IDE·SDK·게이트웨이) / 세션 표면 차원을 실제 소스로 분석한다. 분석 기반: TypeScript src/, Rust crates/, package.json, README.md, docs/. 결론을 먼저 말하면, OMX는 [[06_cc_surface|Claude Code]

  • graph TD
  • subgraph Host["호스트: OpenAI Codex CLI (LLM 루프 소유)"]
  • CodexLoop["Codex 에이전트 루프 + 내장 도구"]
  • end
  • subgraph OmxControl["OMX 컨트롤 플레인 (omx 바이너리)"]

  • Hooks["codex-native-hook 디스패처"]
  • end
  • subgraph StdioMCP["앱-서버 표면 1: stdio MCP 6종"]
  • S1["omx_state / omx_memory"]

Topics covered

    1. 앱-서버 프로토콜 — "wire protocol 없음 + stdio MCP"
  • 1.1 의도적 부재: 클라이언트-서버 RPC가 없다
  • 1.2 1st-party MCP 서버 = 사실상의 "앱-서버"
  • 1.2.1 omx_hermes — 세션 조정 앱-서버
  • 1.3 omx-api — 로컬 OpenAI-호환 HTTP 게이트웨이 (선택 빌드, 실험적)
    1. 클라이언트 표면 — 웹/IDE/SDK는 부재, 표면은 CLI·메신저·tmux
  • 2.1 웹 UI / IDE 확장 / SDK — 모두 부재
  • 2.2 게이트웨이 표면 1: OpenClaw 알림 게이트웨이 (push, 아웃바운드)
  • 2.3 클라이언트 표면 2: Discord/Telegram 회신 리스너 (양방향 원격 제어)
  • 2.4 클라이언트 표면 요약
    1. 세션 표면 — 파일·tmux 기반, 네트워크 세션 없음
  • 3.1 세션 모델: native_session_id ↔ omx session_id 이중 식별
  • 3.2 실행 표면 분류 — 세션이 어디서 도는가
  • 3.3 세션 영속화 — .omx/ 파일 + ~/.codex 히스토리

    [*] --> Classified: SessionStart 훅
    Classified --> CliTmux: launcher=cli + attached-tmux
    Classified --> NativeSafe: launcher=native + outside-tmux
    CliTmux --> RuntimeActive: omx team/ralph → runtime-core 권한 리스
