README / docs

omx_state  (state-server):  state_read/write/clear, state_list_active, state_get_status
omx_memory (memory-server): project_memory_{read,write,add_note,add_directive},
                            notepad_{read,write_priority,write_working,write_manual,prune,stats}
omx_wiki   (wiki-server):   wiki_{ingest,query,lint,add,list,read,delete,refresh}
omx_trace  (trace-server):  trace_{timeline,summary}
omx_hermes (hermes-server): hermes_{start_session,send_prompt,report_status,read_status,
                            read_tail,list_sessions,list_artifacts,read_artifact, ...}

README / docs

type McpParityCommandName =
  "state" | "notepad" | "project-memory" | "trace" | "code-intel" | "wiki";   // mcp-parity.ts:33

README / docs

async function importWithAutoStartDisabled<T>(envName, importer) {
  const previous = process.env[envName];
  process.env[envName] = "1";        // 예: OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START=1
  try { return await importer(); }   // 그 다음 import('../mcp/code-intel-server.js')
  finally { /* 원복 */ }
}

README / docs

const mcpTransportFailure = normalized.isBash ? null : detectMcpTransportFailure(payload);
if (mcpTransportFailure) {
  const fallbackCommand = buildOmxParityFallbackCommand(payload, mcpTransportFailure.toolName);
  // -> "Retry via CLI parity with `omx state read --input '{...}' --json`."
  return { decision: "block", reason: "...lost its transport/server connection...",
           hookSpecificOutput: { hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "..." } };
}

README / docs

toolName.match(/^mcp__omx_(state|memory|trace|code_intel)__([a-z0-9_]+)$/i)
//  state       -> omx state <tool(state_ 제거, _→-)>
//  trace       -> omx trace <tool>
//  code_intel  -> omx code-intel <tool>
//  memory + notepad_*        -> omx notepad <tool>
//  memory + project_memory_* -> omx project-memory <tool>

README / docs

graph TD
    subgraph Spec["단일 진실원천 (omx-first-party-mcp.ts)"]
        Specs["OMX_FIRST_PARTY_MCP_SPECS<br/>(6 servers, startupTimeout)"]
    end

    subgraph Setup["omx setup (mcpMode 기본 none)"]
        Compat["--mcp compat 일 때만"]
        Reg["mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock<br/>→ ~/.codex/config.toml [mcp_servers.omx_*]"]
    end

    subgraph Servers["stdio 서버 (autoStartStdioMcpServer)"]
        State["omx_state (5s)"]
        Memory["omx_memory (5s)"]
        CodeIntel["omx_code_intel (10s)<br/>tsc / ast-grep / grep"]
        Trace["omx_trace (5s)"]
        Wiki["omx_wiki (5s)"]
        Hermes["omx_hermes (5s)<br/>hermes-bridge"]
    end

    subgraph Parity["CLI 패리티 (mcp-parity.ts)"]
        PState["omx state"]
        PNote["omx notepad / project-memory"]
        PTrace["omx trace"]
        PCode["omx code-intel"]
        PWiki["omx wiki"]
        NoHermes["(hermes 패리티 없음)"]
    end

    subgraph Hook["PostToolUse 훅 (codex-native-pre-post.ts)"]
        Detect["detectMcpTransportFailure"]
        Fallback["buildOmxParityFallbackCommand<br/>(state/memory/trace/code_intel만)"]
    end

    Specs --> Compat --> Reg
    Specs --> Servers
    Specs --> Parity
    Reg -.MCP transport.-> Servers
    Parity -.autoStart-disabled import<br/>in-process handle().-> Servers
    Servers -->|transport 죽음| Detect
    Detect --> Fallback
    Fallback -.-> Parity
    Hermes -.폴백 매핑 없음.-> NoHermes
    Wiki -.폴백 매핑 없음.-> PWiki

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as Codex 모델
    participant MCP as omx_code_intel (stdio)
    participant Hook as PostToolUse 훅
    participant CLI as omx code-intel (parity)
    participant Tool as tsc/ast-grep/grep

    Model->>MCP: mcp__omx_code_intel__lsp_diagnostics
    alt transport 정상
        MCP->>Tool: npx tsc --noEmit
        Tool-->>MCP: 진단 출력
        MCP-->>Model: { diagnostics, command }
    else transport 죽음 (EPIPE 등)
        MCP-->>Hook: "transport closed" 응답
        Hook->>Hook: detectMcpTransportFailure → signal
        Hook-->>Model: block + "Retry via `omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input ... --json`"
        Model->>CLI: omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input '{...}' --json
        Note over CLI: OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START=1<br/>로 import (stdio 미기동)
        CLI->>Tool: 동일 handleCodeIntelToolCall → npx tsc
        Tool-->>CLI: 동일 진단 출력
        CLI-->>Model: 동일 JSON
    end

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as omx setup
    participant Pref as setup-preferences
    participant Gen as generator
    participant Cfg as ~/.codex/config.toml

    U->>Pref: resolveMcpMode (기본 none)
    alt mcpMode === "compat"
        U->>Gen: mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock(getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers)
        Gen->>Cfg: [mcp_servers.omx_*] + startup_timeout_sec 마커 블록
    else mcpMode === "none" (기본)
        U->>U: CLI-first; 기존 first-party MCP 등록 제거 제안
        Note over U: 도구는 omx <command> --json 로만 사용
    end

Main analysis

oh-my-codex (omx) MCP Orchestration

Analysis Snapshot: 171_oh-my-codex/ — MCP orchestration.

This document provides a source-based dissection of how Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex (OMX) v0.18.6 defines, registers, starts, and falls back on MCP on OpenAI Codex CLI. Unlike [[Claude Code]], which treats MCP as a product-level integration (Configuration 6 source merging, resource blob storage, DiagnosticsManager IDE bridge) in 162 files ([[09_cc_mcp]]), OMX does not directly own the tool loop. Instead, it defines six 1st-party MCP servers to stdio (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts), omx setup registers them (optionally) in the Codex MCP registry, and most importantly **redundates all MCP tools to the non-MCP CLI parity surface (src/cli/mcp-parity.ts) to ensure that the MCP transport is not a single point of failure. Do it. In other words, OMX's MCP philosophy is "add, but keep the same functionality alive as CLI even if it dies." For full system context, see [[00_omx_overview]].

Three core propositions:

  1. OMX solved the search instability problem not by replacing grep, but by additive reinforcement called omx_code_intel MCP (§3) — However, even that MCP only wraps grep/tsc/ast-grep internally.
  2. Almost all MCP tools can also be called with omx <command> <tool> --input <json> CLI (§4). This is the key to single-point-of-failure mitigation.
  3. Only omx_hermes does not have CLI parity (§4.3), and the transport failure detection of the hook (McpTransportFailureSignal) does not map hermes/wiki as a fallback (§5).

1. Tool Model — Codex Native + MCP Augmentation

[[Claude Code]] hardcodes about 20 built-in tools into a single bundle and merges external MCPs on top of them with the mcp__server__tool namespace ([[09_cc_mcp]] §1). OMX stands in the exact opposite position. Codex has its own built-in tools (file R/W, shell, search, spawn_agent subagent) and tool loop, and OMX adds tools to the MCP server on top of them and forms routing** with the AGENTS.md/prompt. Therefore, OMX contributes exactly two things to the MCP layer.

  • Toolset exposed by 6 1st-party MCP servers (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)
  • CLI/JSON parity surface of the tools (src/cli/mcp-parity.ts)

OMX does not have Claude Code-style OAuth/SSE/HTTP transport, claude.ai account server, resource blob disk storage, or read-only resource tools such as listMcpResources/ReadMcpResourceTool. All 1st-party servers only use a single transport — the local stdio Node process. This simplicity is the design premise that enables CLI parity fallback in §4 (since the handler function of the stdio process can be imported directly in-process).

2. 6 1st-party MCP servers (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)

The set of standard servers that omx setup registers in the Codex MCP registry is declared as the single source of truth in the OMX_FIRST_PARTY_MCP_SPECS array (omx-first-party-mcp.ts:15-58). Each spec has 5 fields: name/title/entrypoint/pluginTarget/startupTimeoutSec.

MCP server name pluginTarget entrypoint Role startupTimeout
omx_state state state-server.js Mode/Workflow Status Single Source of Truth 5s
omx_memory memory memory-server.js Project cross-session memory + notepad 5s
omx_code_intel code-intel code-intel-server.js LSP Diagnostics + AST/Symbol Search 10s
omx_trace trace trace-server.js Agent Flow Timeline/Statistics 5s
omx_wiki wiki wiki-server.js Permanent Project Knowledge Base 5s
omx_hermes hermes hermes-server.js Safe dispatch/status/artifacts adjustments 5s

**The startupTimeout of 10 seconds only for omx_code_intel is intentional (omx-first-party-mcp.ts:35). The remaining five servers are centered on pure file I/O (.omx/ state, memory, trace, wiki markdown) and are started immediately, but code-intel is accompanied by external toolchain booting such as npx tsc, ast-grep/sg binary search, and npx @ast-grep/cli fallback on the first call, as shown in §3. Since findSgBinary() finds the binary with which/where and falls back to npx @ast-grep/cli --version (15 second timeout) in case of failure (code-intel-server.ts:185-203), the startup window is doubled to prevent Codex from mistaking the server as dead when it does not receive a stdio handshake response within 5 seconds. In other words, 10 seconds is the “tsc/ast-grep cold start budget.”

2.1 Two types of registration — for setup vs. for plugin manifest

The same spec array is converted to two functions.

// 직접(legacy) 설치: node 절대경로 + dist 엔트리포인트 절대경로
getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers(pkgRoot)  // omx-first-party-mcp.ts:90
//  -> { name, title, command: process.execPath,
//       args: [<pkgRoot>/dist/mcp/state-server.js], enabled: true, startupTimeoutSec }

// plugin manifest: omx mcp-serve <pluginTarget> 로 우회 기동
buildOmxPluginMcpManifest({ enabled })    // omx-first-party-mcp.ts:103
//  -> mcpServers["omx_state"] = { command: "omx",
//       args: ["mcp-serve", "state"], enabled }
  • setup form (getCurrentNodeExecutablePath() = process.execPath) inserts the currently executing node binary and the absolute path of dist/mcp/<entrypoint> inside the package. Resistant to PATH contamination and node version mismatch.
  • plugin manifest form is bypassed with command: "omx", args: ["mcp-serve", <target>] (OMX_PLUGIN_MCP_COMMAND/OMX_PLUGIN_MCP_SERVE_SUBCOMMAND, omx-first-party-mcp.ts:4-5). This is why the omx mcp-serve subcommand described in [[00_omx_overview]] must be alive (src/cli/omx.ts does process.exit() immediately if it is not mcp-serve).

resolveOmxFirstPartyMcpEntrypointForPluginTarget()(omx-first-party-mcp.ts:72) plays a dispatch role by receiving a pluginTarget such as state or an entrypoint such as state-server.js when calling mcp-serve <target> and interpreting it as an actual dist entry point.

3. omx_code_intel — additive answer to grep reliability story (src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)

[[00_omx_overview]] The conclusion of §3's grep read verification was "LSP/AST augmentation, not native search replacement". The single file that implements the augmentation at the MCP layer is code-intel-server.ts. The file header nails itself (code-intel-server.ts:1-5):

"Provides LSP-like diagnostics, symbol search, and AST pattern matching. Uses pragmatic CLI wrappers (tsc, ast-grep/sg) rather than full LSP protocol."

In other words, this is not a real language server, but a practical layer that wraps the CLI wrapper into an MCP tool. The server identifier is { name: 'omx-code-intel', version: '0.1.0' }(code-intel-server.ts:319) and 9 tools are configured as Server + ListToolsRequestSchema/CallToolRequestSchema in @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Expose (buildCodeIntelServerTools(), code-intel-server.ts:323).

tools Internal Implementation Mutating
lsp_diagnostics npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project <tsconfig> output regular expression parsing ❌
lsp_diagnostics_directory Same, entire project → grouping by file ❌
lsp_document_symbols Extract regular expression SYMBOL_PATTERNS (TS/JS/Py/Go/Rust) ❌
lsp_workspace_symbols Workspace walk(depth≤6) + symbol substring matching ❌
lsp_hover Regular expression based word extraction + local definition approximation ❌
lsp_find_references Parsing results after calling grep -rn -w <symbol> ❌
lsp_servers tsc/ast-grep/grep availability check ❌
ast_grep_search ast-grep(sg) metavariable pattern matching ($NAME/$$$ARGS) ❌
ast_grep_replace AST substitution, dryRun=true default ✅

3.1 Key observation: Wrap grep, not abandon it

The implementation of lsp_find_references is conclusive evidence. The body of the LSP semantic tool called "reference finding" is actually the system grep (code-intel-server.ts:576):

const { stdout } = await exec('grep', [
  '-rn', '--include=*.ts', '--include=*.tsx', '--include=*.js', '--include=*.jsx',
  '--include=*.py', '--include=*.go', '--include=*.rs',
  '-w', symbol, dir,
], { timeout: 15000 });

Afterwards, the declaration line is identified with extractSymbols, and if includeDeclaration=false, only post-processing is performed to remove the declaration (code-intel-server.ts:587-598). In other words, OMX's "reference search" is grep + regular expression post-processing. Similarly, in tsc, if a type error is thrown to stdout (even if it is exit code 2), it is parsed as is (if the exec helper is e.stdout !== undefined, the error is swallowed, code-intel-server.ts:38-45).

ast_grep_search takes the enhancement one step further. If the sg/ast-grep binary is not present, it falls back to npx @ast-grep/cli --yes (runAstGrep, code-intel-server.ts:246-252), parses the --json output and returns structured matches. ast_grep_replace is the only mutating tool, and dryRun !== false is the default, so you must explicitly give dryRun: false to fix the actual file (code-intel-server.ts:663, --update-all flag is added only when it is not dryRun in buildAstGrepRunArgs, :222).

Judgment (MCP perspective): code-intel MCP accurately implements the additive half of the story of “native grep was unstable, so it was replaced with MCP.” Wrap grep/tsc/ast-grep behind a more structured tool interface (lsp_*/ast_grep_*) to give the model consistent JSON, but still call the same CLI tool underneath. In contrast to [[09_cc_mcp]]'s DiagnosticsManager, which reads the IDE's LSP into the MCP, OMX imitates the LSP with a CLI tool in an environment without an LSP.

3.2 Tool surface of the remaining 5 servers (summary)

omx_state  (state-server):  state_read/write/clear, state_list_active, state_get_status
omx_memory (memory-server): project_memory_{read,write,add_note,add_directive},
                            notepad_{read,write_priority,write_working,write_manual,prune,stats}
omx_wiki   (wiki-server):   wiki_{ingest,query,lint,add,list,read,delete,refresh}
omx_trace  (trace-server):  trace_{timeline,summary}
omx_hermes (hermes-server): hermes_{start_session,send_prompt,report_status,read_status,
                            read_tail,list_sessions,list_artifacts,read_artifact, ...}

The tool name prefix convention (state_/project_memory_/notepad_/trace_/wiki_/hermes_) is the basis for both the CLI parity mapping in §4 and the transport failure detection regular expression in §5.

4. MCP-CLI Parity Layer — Single Point of Failure Mitigation (src/cli/mcp-parity.ts)

The really key to the OMX MCP design is this parity layer, not the six servers. Makes it possible to call the same tool with omx <command> <tool> --input <json> [--json] without MCP transport (usage string in mcp-parity.ts:60). This is the mechanism pointed out by [[00_omx_overview]] §10 to "ensure that MCP dependence does not become a single point of failure"*.

6 CLI commands covered by 4.1 parity

type McpParityCommandName =
  "state" | "notepad" | "project-memory" | "trace" | "code-intel" | "wiki";   // mcp-parity.ts:33

memory-server branches into two CLI commands (omx notepad, omx project-memory) depending on the tool prefix (notepad_ vs project_memory_) (loadMemoryDescriptor, mcp-parity.ts:204). That is, 6 CLI commands cover 5 servers (state/memory/trace/code-intel/wiki).

Each CLI command is described with a McpCliDescriptor (mcp-parity.ts:17): commandName/title/tools/aliases/handle. User-friendly aliases are mapped to full tool names (e.g. omx state read → state_read, omx notepad write-priority → notepad_write_priority, mcp-parity.ts:193-200, 219-233).

4.2 Core trick: autoStart-disabled import → non-MCP in-process execution

The precise method is that parity does not go through the MCP transport at all. Each descriptor loader temporarily turns on an environment variable that turns off auto-start for the server just before importing the server module (importWithAutoStartDisabled, mcp-parity.ts:40-52):

async function importWithAutoStartDisabled<T>(envName, importer) {
  const previous = process.env[envName];
  process.env[envName] = "1";        // 예: OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START=1
  try { return await importer(); }   // 그 다음 import('../mcp/code-intel-server.js')
  finally { /* 원복 */ }
}

Why do you need it? As shown in §6, all stdio server modules execute autoStartStdioMcpServer(...) at the end of the file immediately at the time of import (code-intel-server.ts:679). Parity is not trying to run this server, but just take the pure handler functions (handleCodeIntelToolCall, buildCodeIntelServerTools) within it and call them directly in-process. Therefore, turn on disable env before import to prevent the stdio loop from booting. The disable env name maps exactly per server (mcp-parity.ts:185, 209, 239, 256, 269):

CLI loader disable env import target
loadStateDescriptor OMX_STATE_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START state-server.js
loadMemoryDescriptor OMX_MEMORY_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START memory-server.js
loadTraceDescriptor OMX_TRACE_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START trace-server.js
loadCodeIntelDescriptor OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START code-intel-server.js
loadWikiDescriptor OMX_WIKI_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START wiki-server.js

Execution path: executeDescriptorCommand unpacks the alias (mcp-parity.ts:142), verifies the allowed tools set (allowedTools Set, :143-148), calls descriptor.handle({ params: { name, arguments } }) directly (:150), and then extractPayload. Extract JSON from content[].text (:117-130). The result is normalized to { ok, data } or { ok: false, error }, and if --json, it is serialized and output as is (runDescriptorCommand, :162). The same logic is also exposed programmatically (executeMcpParityCommand, :327) — the hook calls this (§5).

Meaning: Even in an environment where the MCP transport (stdio pipe) is dead or inactive — Codex App, plain Codex session, transport disconnected — the exactly the same handler code is executed with one line: omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input '{"file":"..."}' --json. Even if transport dies, the code path survives. This is the essence of single point-of-failure mitigation.

4.3 omx_hermes has no CLI parity

There is no hermes in the table above. There is no hermes case in the McpParityCommandName union (mcp-parity.ts:33) and mcpParityCommand switch (:291-325), and mcp-parity.ts does not import hermes even once in the entire source (check grep). So:

  • There are no non-MCP CLI surfaces such as omx hermes ....
  • hermes tools (hermes_start_session/hermes_send_prompt/...) can be called only via MCP transport.

This is not a coincidence, but comes from role differences. state/memory/trace/wiki/code-intel are all local files/stateless-ish inquiry/record tools on top of local tools, so direct in-process calls are natural. On the other hand, hermes is a live coordination bridge (main body src/mcp/hermes-bridge.ts) that relays real-time dispatch·status·question/answer between team/swarm workers. Live transport with session lifetime and mailbox state Parity replication of the above tools with a "one-shot CLI call" is meaningless (since it only makes sense if the other worker is alive). Tradeoff: The hermes route leaves the transport single point of failure. The hook fallback in §5 also doesn't map hermes (below), so there is no automatic CLI fallback if the hermes MCP dies.

5. Processing of McpTransportFailureSignal in hook (src/scripts/codex-native-pre-post.ts)

[[00_omx_overview]] The PostToolUse hook (codex-native-pre-post.ts) seen in §4 detects a situation where the MCP transport is interrupted, and instructs the model to fall back to CLI parity rather than blindly retry. This is the link that connects the parity layer and the hook in §4.

5.1 Detect: detectMcpTransportFailure

detectMcpTransportFailure(payload) (codex-native-pre-post.ts:180) normalizes the PostToolUse payload (normalizePostToolUsePayload, :100) and then looks at two things.

  1. Is it an MCP-like tool(isMcpLikeToolName, :132): Determined by regular expression ^(mcp__|omx_(?:state|memory|trace|code_intel)\b|state_|project_memory_|notepad_|trace_).
  2. Is it a transport death pattern(MCP_TRANSPORT_FAILURE_PATTERNS, :136): transport (closed|error|failed), server disconnected, connection (closed|reset|lost), \beconnreset\b, \bepipe\b, broken pipe, stream ended unexpectedly, 10 regular expressions, including stdio .*closed, pipe closed, and mcp.* closed.

If it is an MCP tool, it combines raw stderr/stdout + structured text, and even if it is a non-MCP tool, it checks if there is a \bmcp\b or omx-(state|memory|trace|code-intel)-server context in the structured response (hasMcpTransportContext, :171). When matched, McpTransportFailureSignal(:37) of { toolName, summary } is returned.

5.2 Fallback prescription: buildOmxParityFallbackCommand

If the signal is caught, buildNativePostToolUseOutput(:1226) issues a block decision and prescribes the correct CLI parity command (:1230-1244):

const mcpTransportFailure = normalized.isBash ? null : detectMcpTransportFailure(payload);
if (mcpTransportFailure) {
  const fallbackCommand = buildOmxParityFallbackCommand(payload, mcpTransportFailure.toolName);
  // -> "Retry via CLI parity with `omx state read --input '{...}' --json`."
  return { decision: "block", reason: "...lost its transport/server connection...",
           hookSpecificOutput: { hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "..." } };
}

resolveOmxParityTarget(:206) resolves the parity command from toolname mcp__omx_<server>__<tool>:

toolName.match(/^mcp__omx_(state|memory|trace|code_intel)__([a-z0-9_]+)$/i)
//  state       -> omx state <tool(state_ 제거, _→-)>
//  trace       -> omx trace <tool>
//  code_intel  -> omx code-intel <tool>
//  memory + notepad_*        -> omx notepad <tool>
//  memory + project_memory_* -> omx project-memory <tool>

And buildOmxParityFallbackCommand(:230) serializes the original tool_input as is and assembles omx <command> <tool> --input '<json>' --json (:234). If a fallback cannot be created (tool that does not map), it is replaced with a general advisory string (:1235).

Additional prescription text (:1242) contains operational knowledge: "OMX MCP server is a plain Node stdio process, so it dies when stdin/transport is closed", If team runtime, capture the status first with omx team status <team> or omx team api read-stall-state ..., and advise to reproduce the root cause with OMX_MCP_TRANSPORT_DEBUG=1.

5.3 Blind spots in fallback mapping — hermes·wiki

The regular expression in resolveOmxParityTarget catches only (state|memory|trace|code_intel) (:207). That is:

  • omx_wiki: There is CLI parity (§4.1), but not in the automatic fallback mapping of the hook → Only general recommendations without automatic command prescription in case of transport failure.
  • omx_hermes: There is no CLI parity itself (§4.3) and no fallback mapping → double absence of fallback.

The server lists of isMcpLikeToolName(:132) and hasMcpTransportContext(:171) also list only state|memory|trace|code_intel. As a result, the transport automatic restoration safety net is complete only for the four types of state·memory·trace·code-intel. This, along with the differential startup-timeout in §2 (10s for code_intel only), reveals the design intention of OMX to treat 4 types of query/record series as core fallback targets and hermes/wiki as auxiliary.

6. Server startup/life cycle (src/mcp/bootstrap.ts)

All 1st-party stdio servers are booted with the common bootstrap autoStartStdioMcpServer(serverName, server) (bootstrap.ts:453). Called at the end of each server file (e.g., autoStartStdioMcpServer('code_intel', server) in code-intel-server.ts:679).

6.1 auto-start gate

shouldAutoStartMcpServer(bootstrap.ts:444) determines whether to boot using two environment variables:

  • Global: OMX_MCP_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START(GLOBAL_DISABLE_ENV, :17)
  • By server: SERVER_DISABLE_ENV(:8-15) — 6 including OMX_STATE_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START.

If either one is "1", the stdio loop is not started. This is the flag that the CLI parity in §4.2 turns on before importing — parity borrows this gate to create a “load server code but no transport” state.

6.2 Parent/duplicate sibling watchdog + idle teardown

At boot time, two watchdogs are used (bootstrap.ts:513-599).

  • Parent watchdog (:513, default 1 second): shutdown('parent_gone') when the parent process (process.ppid) disappears — When Codex dies, orphaned stdio servers are also cleaned up.
  • Duplicate Sibling Watchdog(:524): Detects newer sibling processes of the same entrypoint with analyzeDuplicateSiblingState, and self-teardowns itself as superseded_duplicate_after_idle after an idle window (default 60 seconds, DEFAULT_DUPLICATE_SIBLING_POST_TRAFFIC_IDLE_MS, :30) after traffic. (:575-579). In the pre-traffic phase, if the maximum number of siblings per entry point (DEFAULT_MAX_SIBLINGS_PER_ENTRYPOINT = 4, :32) is exceeded, it terminates immediately with superseded_hard_cap_pre_traffic.

All lifecycle events are recorded with writeMcpLifecycleTelemetry (bootstrap.ts:485) and, if OMX_MCP_TRANSPORT_DEBUG=1, they are also written to stderr (:475). This telemetry links directly to the debug advisory in §5.2 (OMX_MCP_TRANSPORT_DEBUG=1).

6.3 Registration with Codex registry (omx setup)

omx setup does not always register the MCP. The mcpMode setting has two values ​​(SETUP_MCP_MODES = ["none", "compat"], setup-preferences.ts:11) and the default is none (DEFAULT_SETUP_MCP_MODE = "none", setup.ts:237). In other words, OMX is CLI-first by default, and actual registration of [mcp_servers.omx_*] in ~/.codex/config.toml occurs only when you opt in with --mcp compat:

  • Only when mcpMode === "compat" does mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock(generator.ts:2296) merge the servers of getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers(pkgRoot) (§2.1) into marker-bound blocks (SHARED_MCP_REGISTRY_MARKER, Synchronize to generator.ts:106) (shouldSyncSharedMcpRegistry, setup.ts:2084).
  • If not compat, setup proposes to remove existing first-party MCP registrations (promptForFirstPartyMcpRemoval, setup.ts:651; removeFirstPartyMcpRegistrations, :1796-1810).

This policy promotes the CLI parity in §4 to default path. MCP registration is an opt-in for compatibility scenarios that require a true MCP client, and normally omx <command> --json is the primary surface. mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock writes startup_timeout_sec to each server (generator.ts:2286) so that the code_intel 10 second budget in §2 is also reflected in config.toml.

7. Architecture

graph TD
    subgraph Spec["단일 진실원천 (omx-first-party-mcp.ts)"]
        Specs["OMX_FIRST_PARTY_MCP_SPECS<br/>(6 servers, startupTimeout)"]
    end

    subgraph Setup["omx setup (mcpMode 기본 none)"]
        Compat["--mcp compat 일 때만"]
        Reg["mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock<br/>→ ~/.codex/config.toml [mcp_servers.omx_*]"]
    end

    subgraph Servers["stdio 서버 (autoStartStdioMcpServer)"]
        State["omx_state (5s)"]
        Memory["omx_memory (5s)"]
        CodeIntel["omx_code_intel (10s)<br/>tsc / ast-grep / grep"]
        Trace["omx_trace (5s)"]
        Wiki["omx_wiki (5s)"]
        Hermes["omx_hermes (5s)<br/>hermes-bridge"]
    end

    subgraph Parity["CLI 패리티 (mcp-parity.ts)"]
        PState["omx state"]
        PNote["omx notepad / project-memory"]
        PTrace["omx trace"]
        PCode["omx code-intel"]
        PWiki["omx wiki"]
        NoHermes["(hermes 패리티 없음)"]
    end

    subgraph Hook["PostToolUse 훅 (codex-native-pre-post.ts)"]
        Detect["detectMcpTransportFailure"]
        Fallback["buildOmxParityFallbackCommand<br/>(state/memory/trace/code_intel만)"]
    end

    Specs --> Compat --> Reg
    Specs --> Servers
    Specs --> Parity
    Reg -.MCP transport.-> Servers
    Parity -.autoStart-disabled import<br/>in-process handle().-> Servers
    Servers -->|transport 죽음| Detect
    Detect --> Fallback
    Fallback -.-> Parity
    Hermes -.폴백 매핑 없음.-> NoHermes
    Wiki -.폴백 매핑 없음.-> PWiki

8. Data flow

8.1 Normal call vs CLI parity fallback

sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as Codex 모델
    participant MCP as omx_code_intel (stdio)
    participant Hook as PostToolUse 훅
    participant CLI as omx code-intel (parity)
    participant Tool as tsc/ast-grep/grep

    Model->>MCP: mcp__omx_code_intel__lsp_diagnostics
    alt transport 정상
        MCP->>Tool: npx tsc --noEmit
        Tool-->>MCP: 진단 출력
        MCP-->>Model: { diagnostics, command }
    else transport 죽음 (EPIPE 등)
        MCP-->>Hook: "transport closed" 응답
        Hook->>Hook: detectMcpTransportFailure → signal
        Hook-->>Model: block + "Retry via `omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input ... --json`"
        Model->>CLI: omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input '{...}' --json
        Note over CLI: OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START=1<br/>로 import (stdio 미기동)
        CLI->>Tool: 동일 handleCodeIntelToolCall → npx tsc
        Tool-->>CLI: 동일 진단 출력
        CLI-->>Model: 동일 JSON
    end

8.2 setup registration branch

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as omx setup
    participant Pref as setup-preferences
    participant Gen as generator
    participant Cfg as ~/.codex/config.toml

    U->>Pref: resolveMcpMode (기본 none)
    alt mcpMode === "compat"
        U->>Gen: mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock(getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers)
        Gen->>Cfg: [mcp_servers.omx_*] + startup_timeout_sec 마커 블록
    else mcpMode === "none" (기본)
        U->>U: CLI-first; 기존 first-party MCP 등록 제거 제안
        Note over U: 도구는 omx <command> --json 로만 사용
    end

9. Technical Reference

Core file mapping

file Role Reliability
src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts 6Server spec single source of truth, setup/plugin two registration types, code_intel 10s river
src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts omx-code-intel v0.1.0, 9tools, tsc/ast-grep/grep wrapper, lsp_find_references=grep river
src/cli/mcp-parity.ts CLI parity 6command, importWithAutoStartDisabled, alias, in-process handle() river
src/scripts/codex-native-pre-post.ts McpTransportFailureSignal, detection regular expression, buildOmxParityFallbackCommand, block decision river
src/mcp/bootstrap.ts autoStartStdioMcpServer, disable env gate, parent/redundant watchdog, idle teardown river
src/config/generator.ts Write mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock, config.toml marker block, startup_timeout_sec middle class
src/cli/setup-preferences.ts SETUP_MCP_MODES = ["none","compat"] river
src/cli/setup.ts DEFAULT_SETUP_MCP_MODE="none", compat gate, proposed to remove first-party river
src/mcp/hermes-bridge.ts hermes coordination body (no parity) Middle

Parity/Fallback Coverage Matrix

server MCP Tools CLI parity hook auto fallback mapping
omx_state ✅ ✅ omx state ✅
omx_memory ✅ ✅ omx notepad / project-memory ✅
omx_trace ✅ ✅ omx trace ✅
omx_code_intel ✅ ✅ omx code-intel ✅
omx_wiki ✅ ✅ omx wiki ❌ (regular expression not included)
omx_hermes ✅ ❌ None ❌ None

Contrast with Claude Code MCP (vs [[09_cc_mcp]])

axis Claude Code oh-my-codex
MCP file size 162 File 6 servers + parity/bootstrap prime
transport stdio/sse/http/claudeai-proxy (4 types) Local stdio only
settings source 6Source merge (including claude.ai account) spec 1 source, config.toml opt-in
resource surface listMcpResources/ReadMcpResourceTool, blob disk storage None
IDE integration DiagnosticsManager (MCP=LSP bridge) code-intel imitates tsc/grep
Non-MCP Fallback None CLI parity + hook automatic prescription
default activation MCP registration is the primary route CLI-first(none), MCP compat opt-in

10. Limits and judgment

Limits

  1. The tool signatures of hermes-server.ts/hermes-bridge.ts are summarized in §3.2, but this document does not deeply trace the hermes internal dispatch state machine (only confirms the absence of parity/fallback).
  2. The exact TOML layout of the config.toml block generated by mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock in generator.ts was confirmed only up to marker/timeout writing, and the conflict merge edge case was not verified.
  3. The regular expression approximation of lsp_workspace_symbols/lsp_hover is inherently inaccurate (note: 'Regex-based approximation', code-intel-server.ts:547), so the name "LSP" is an overrepresentation — the documentation clearly states that it is not a real LSP.

Judgment

OMX's MCP has a "6 thin servers + thick fallback" structure. In direct contrast to Claude Code's elevation of MCP itself to the surface of the product ([[09_cc_mcp]]), OMX downgraded MCP to an optional compatible transport and promoted CLI parity (mcp-parity.ts) to the primary path. Thanks to this design:

  • Even if transport dies (EPIPE/disconnect), the hook automatically prescribes CLI commands for the same code path (state/memory/trace/code_intel 4 types).
  • code-intel MCP implements an additive answer to the grep reliability story, but still calls grep/tsc/ast-grep underneath — it doesn't replace native search.
  • Weaknesses are concentrated in hermes (lack of both parity and fallback) and wiki (lack of fallback mapping).

11. Implications of cli-jaw comparison

  • (MCP-CLI redundancy to code path sharing) OMX's most portable pattern is importWithAutoStartDisabled, which calls the same handler function in-process without transport (mcp-parity.ts:40). If cli-jaw uses MCP as its core toolpath, the MCP handler and CLI handler should be designed to share the same function to really guarantee "the same result with CLI if MCP dies" (two separate implementations will cause drift).

  • (so that the hook prescribes a transport failure) When OMX detects a transport death, it creates an exact fallback command string for the model and injects it with a block-decision (buildOmxParityFallbackCommand). cli-jaw can also prevent MCP failures from spreading into infinite retry loops by enforcing "prohibit blind retry + provide specific alternative commands" at the hook layer.

  • (managing the fallback coverage matrix explicitly) OMX's blind spot (lack of hermes/wiki fallbacks) comes from the fact that the fallback mapping regex hardcodes the server list (/^mcp__omx_(state|memory|trace|code_intel)__/). In cli-jaw, it is safe to manage server ↔ parity ↔ fallback coverage in a single table like §9 matrix and have a lint that updates all three at the same time when adding a new server.

  • (startup-timeout to tool coldstart budget) Differential (omx-first-party-mcp.ts:35) with code_intel only being 10 seconds is an operational precept that "servers with external toolchain (tsc/ast-grep) coldstart should be given a longer handshake budget." If cli-jaw attaches an MCP with a heavy backend, setting a budget for each server in the spec instead of a uniform timeout reduces false positives (determination that the server is dead when it is alive).

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

Change history

  • 2026-05-29: First written based on oh-my-codex v0.18.6 source. 6 1st-party MCP specs (omx-first-party-mcp.ts, including code_intel 10s startup), omx_code_intel 9-tool and grep/tsc/ast-grep wrapper entity (code-intel-server.ts), CLI parity layer (mcp-parity.ts, importWithAutoStartDisabled) in-process fallback), absence of hermes parity, McpTransportFailureSignal detection·fallback prescription·hermes/wiki blind spot (codex-native-pre-post.ts), common bootstrap life cycle (bootstrap.ts, auto-start gate·watchdog·idle teardown), setup registration branch (mcpMode none default/compat opt-in, setup.ts/generator.ts), grep-reliability additive conclusion, Claude Code MCP comparison table, cli-jaw implications section 4.

Previous article: [[09_cc_mcp]] Next article: [[00_omx_overview]]

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 009_mcp-orchestration/09_omx_mcp.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

oh-my-codex (omx) MCP 오케스트레이션

분석 스냅샷: 171_oh-my-codex/ — MCP orchestration.

이 문서는 Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex(OMX) v0.18.6가 OpenAI Codex CLI 위에서 MCP를 어떻게 정의·등록·기동·폴백하는지 소스 기반으로 해부한다. [[Claude Code]]가 162개 파일로 MCP를 제품 수준 통합(설정 6소스 병합·리소스 blob 저장·DiagnosticsManager IDE 브릿지)으로 다루는 것과 달리([[09_cc_mcp]]), OMX는 도구 루프를 직접 소유하지 않는다. 대신 6개의 1st-party MCP 서버를 stdio로 정의하고(src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts), omx setup이 그것을 Codex MCP 레지스트리에 (선택적으로) 등록하며, 가장 중요하게는 모든 MCP 도구를 비-MCP CLI 패리티 표면으로 이중화해(src/cli/mcp-parity.ts) MCP transport가 단일 실패점이 되지 않게 한다. 즉 OMX의 MCP 철학은 *"추가하되, 죽어도 같은 기능이 CLI로 살아남게"*다. 전체 시스템 맥락은 [[00_omx_overview]] 참조.

핵심 명제 세 줄:

  1. OMX는 검색 불안정 문제를 grep 교체가 아니라 omx_code_intel MCP라는 additive 보강으로 풀었다(§3) — 단 그 MCP조차 내부적으로 grep/tsc/ast-grep를 감쌀 뿐이다.
  2. MCP 도구는 거의 전부 omx <command> <tool> --input <json> CLI로도 호출 가능하다(§4). 이것이 단일 실패점 완화의 핵심이다.
  3. omx_hermes만 CLI 패리티가 없고(§4.3), 훅의 transport 실패 감지(McpTransportFailureSignal)도 hermes/wiki를 폴백 매핑하지 않는다(§5).

1. 도구 모델 — Codex 네이티브 + MCP 보강

[[Claude Code]]는 20여 개 내장 도구를 단일 번들에 하드코딩하고 그 위에 mcp__server__tool namespace로 외부 MCP를 병합한다([[09_cc_mcp]] §1). OMX는 정반대 위치에 선다. Codex가 자체 내장 도구(파일 R/W·셸·검색·spawn_agent 서브에이전트)와 도구 루프를 소유하고, OMX는 그 위에 MCP 서버로 도구를 추가하고, AGENTS.md/프롬프트로 라우팅을 형성 한다. 따라서 OMX가 MCP 층에서 기여하는 것은 정확히 두 가지다.

  • 6개 1st-party MCP 서버가 노출하는 도구 집합 (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)
  • 그 도구들의 CLI/JSON 패리티 표면 (src/cli/mcp-parity.ts)

OMX는 Claude Code식 OAuth/SSE/HTTP transport, claude.ai 계정 서버, 리소스 blob 디스크 저장, listMcpResources/ReadMcpResourceTool 같은 read-only 리소스 도구를 갖지 않는다. 모든 1st-party 서버는 단일 transport — 로컬 stdio Node 프로세스 — 만 쓴다. 이 단순함이 곧 §4의 CLI 패리티 폴백을 가능하게 하는 설계 전제다(stdio 프로세스의 핸들러 함수를 in-process로 직접 import 할 수 있으므로).

2. 6개 1st-party MCP 서버 (src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts)

omx setup이 Codex MCP 레지스트리에 등록하는 표준 서버 집합은 OMX_FIRST_PARTY_MCP_SPECS 배열에 단일 진실원천으로 선언돼 있다(omx-first-party-mcp.ts:15-58). 각 spec은 name/title/entrypoint/pluginTarget/startupTimeoutSec 5필드다.

MCP 서버명 pluginTarget entrypoint 역할 startupTimeout
omx_state state state-server.js 모드/워크플로우 상태 단일 진실원천 5s
omx_memory memory memory-server.js 프로젝트 크로스세션 메모리 + notepad 5s
omx_code_intel code-intel code-intel-server.js LSP 진단 + AST/심볼 검색 10s
omx_trace trace trace-server.js 에이전트 흐름 타임라인/통계 5s
omx_wiki wiki wiki-server.js 영속 프로젝트 지식베이스 5s
omx_hermes hermes hermes-server.js 안전 dispatch/status/artifacts 조정 5s

omx_code_intel만 startupTimeout이 10초인 점은 의도적이다(omx-first-party-mcp.ts:35). 나머지 5개 서버는 순수 파일 I/O(.omx/ 상태·메모리·trace·wiki markdown) 위주라 즉시 기동되지만, code-intel은 §3에서 보듯 첫 호출 시 npx tsc·ast-grep/sg 바이너리 탐색·npx @ast-grep/cli 폴백 같은 외부 툴체인 부팅을 동반한다. findSgBinary()가 which/where로 바이너리를 찾고 실패 시 npx @ast-grep/cli --version(15초 타임아웃)으로 폴백하므로(code-intel-server.ts:185-203), Codex가 5초 안에 stdio 핸드셰이크 응답을 못 받아 서버를 죽었다고 오판하지 않도록 startup 윈도우를 2배로 둔 것이다. 즉 10초는 "tsc/ast-grep 콜드 스타트 예산"이다.

2.1 두 가지 등록 형태 — setup용 vs plugin manifest용

같은 spec 배열이 두 함수로 변환된다.

// 직접(legacy) 설치: node 절대경로 + dist 엔트리포인트 절대경로
getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers(pkgRoot)  // omx-first-party-mcp.ts:90
//  -> { name, title, command: process.execPath,
//       args: [<pkgRoot>/dist/mcp/state-server.js], enabled: true, startupTimeoutSec }

// plugin manifest: omx mcp-serve <pluginTarget> 로 우회 기동
buildOmxPluginMcpManifest({ enabled })    // omx-first-party-mcp.ts:103
//  -> mcpServers["omx_state"] = { command: "omx",
//       args: ["mcp-serve", "state"], enabled }
  • setup 형태(getCurrentNodeExecutablePath() = process.execPath)는 현재 실행 중인 node 바이너리와 패키지 내부 dist/mcp/<entrypoint> 절대경로를 박아 넣는다. PATH 오염·node 버전 불일치에 강하다.
  • plugin manifest 형태는 command: "omx", args: ["mcp-serve", <target>]로 우회한다(OMX_PLUGIN_MCP_COMMAND/OMX_PLUGIN_MCP_SERVE_SUBCOMMAND, omx-first-party-mcp.ts:4-5). 이것이 [[00_omx_overview]]에서 설명한 omx mcp-serve 서브커맨드가 살아 있어야 하는 이유다(src/cli/omx.ts는 mcp-serve가 아니면 즉시 process.exit() 한다).

resolveOmxFirstPartyMcpEntrypointForPluginTarget()(omx-first-party-mcp.ts:72)는 mcp-serve <target> 호출 시 state 같은 pluginTarget 또는 state-server.js 같은 entrypoint를 받아 실제 dist 엔트리포인트로 해석하는 디스패치 역할을 한다.

3. omx_code_intel — grep 신뢰성 스토리의 additive 해답 (src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts)

[[00_omx_overview]] §3의 grep 리드 검증 결론은 *"네이티브 검색 교체가 아니라 LSP/AST 보강"*이었다. MCP 층에서 그 보강을 구현하는 단일 파일이 code-intel-server.ts다. 파일 헤더가 스스로 못 박는다(code-intel-server.ts:1-5):

"Provides LSP-like diagnostics, symbol search, and AST pattern matching. Uses pragmatic CLI wrappers (tsc, ast-grep/sg) rather than full LSP protocol."

즉 이것은 진짜 language server가 아니라 CLI 래퍼를 MCP 도구로 포장한 실용 계층이다. 서버 식별자는 { name: 'omx-code-intel', version: '0.1.0' }(code-intel-server.ts:319)이고 @modelcontextprotocol/sdk의 Server + ListToolsRequestSchema/CallToolRequestSchema로 9개 도구를 노출한다(buildCodeIntelServerTools(), code-intel-server.ts:323).

도구 내부 구현 Mutating
lsp_diagnostics npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project <tsconfig> 출력 정규식 파싱 ❌
lsp_diagnostics_directory 동일, 프로젝트 전체 → 파일별 그룹핑 ❌
lsp_document_symbols 정규식 SYMBOL_PATTERNS(TS/JS/Py/Go/Rust) 추출 ❌
lsp_workspace_symbols 워크스페이스 walk(depth≤6) + 심볼 substring 매칭 ❌
lsp_hover 정규식 기반 단어 추출 + 로컬 정의 근사 ❌
lsp_find_references grep -rn -w <symbol> 호출 후 결과 파싱 ❌
lsp_servers tsc/ast-grep/grep 가용성 점검 ❌
ast_grep_search ast-grep(sg) 메타변수 패턴 매칭($NAME/$$$ARGS) ❌
ast_grep_replace AST 치환, dryRun=true 기본 ✅

3.1 핵심 관찰: grep을 버리는 게 아니라 감싼다

lsp_find_references의 구현이 결정적 증거다. "참조 찾기"라는 LSP 시맨틱 도구의 본체가 실제로는 시스템 grep이다(code-intel-server.ts:576):

const { stdout } = await exec('grep', [
  '-rn', '--include=*.ts', '--include=*.tsx', '--include=*.js', '--include=*.jsx',
  '--include=*.py', '--include=*.go', '--include=*.rs',
  '-w', symbol, dir,
], { timeout: 15000 });

이후 extractSymbols로 선언 라인을 식별해 includeDeclaration=false면 선언을 빼는 정도의 후처리만 한다(code-intel-server.ts:587-598). 즉 OMX의 "참조 검색"은 grep + 정규식 후처리다. tsc도 마찬가지로 type error를 stdout으로 토하면(exit code 2여도) 그대로 파싱한다(exec 헬퍼가 e.stdout !== undefined면 에러를 삼킨다, code-intel-server.ts:38-45).

ast_grep_search는 한 단계 더 나아간 보강이다. sg/ast-grep 바이너리가 없으면 npx @ast-grep/cli --yes로 폴백하고(runAstGrep, code-intel-server.ts:246-252), --json 출력을 파싱해 구조화된 매치를 돌려준다. ast_grep_replace만 유일한 mutating 도구이며 dryRun !== false가 기본이라 명시적으로 dryRun: false를 줘야 실제 파일을 고친다(code-intel-server.ts:663, --update-all 플래그는 buildAstGrepRunArgs에서 dryRun이 아닐 때만 추가, :222).

판정(MCP 관점): code-intel MCP는 "네이티브 grep이 불안정해서 MCP로 갈아끼웠다"는 스토리의 additive 절반을 정확히 구현한다. grep/tsc/ast-grep을 더 구조화된 도구 인터페이스(lsp_*/ast_grep_*) 뒤에 감싸 모델에게 일관된 JSON을 주되, 바닥에서는 여전히 같은 CLI 툴을 호출한다. [[09_cc_mcp]]의 DiagnosticsManager가 IDE의 LSP를 MCP로 읽어오는 것과 대비하면, OMX는 LSP가 없는 환경에서 CLI 툴로 LSP를 흉내내는 쪽이다.

3.2 나머지 5개 서버의 도구 표면(요약)

omx_state  (state-server):  state_read/write/clear, state_list_active, state_get_status
omx_memory (memory-server): project_memory_{read,write,add_note,add_directive},
                            notepad_{read,write_priority,write_working,write_manual,prune,stats}
omx_wiki   (wiki-server):   wiki_{ingest,query,lint,add,list,read,delete,refresh}
omx_trace  (trace-server):  trace_{timeline,summary}
omx_hermes (hermes-server): hermes_{start_session,send_prompt,report_status,read_status,
                            read_tail,list_sessions,list_artifacts,read_artifact, ...}

도구 이름의 prefix 규약(state_/project_memory_/notepad_/trace_/wiki_/hermes_)이 §4의 CLI 패리티 매핑과 §5의 transport 실패 감지 정규식 모두의 기준이 된다.

4. MCP-CLI 패리티 층 — 단일 실패점 완화 (src/cli/mcp-parity.ts)

OMX MCP 설계의 진짜 핵심은 서버 6종이 아니라 이 패리티 층이다. 같은 도구를 MCP transport 없이도 omx <command> <tool> --input <json> [--json]으로 호출할 수 있게 만든다(mcp-parity.ts:60의 usage 문자열). 이것이 [[00_omx_overview]] §10이 지목한 "MCP 의존이 단일 실패점이 되지 않게" 하는 메커니즘이다.

4.1 패리티가 덮는 6개 CLI 명령

type McpParityCommandName =
  "state" | "notepad" | "project-memory" | "trace" | "code-intel" | "wiki";   // mcp-parity.ts:33

memory-server는 도구 prefix(notepad_ vs project_memory_)에 따라 두 개의 CLI 명령(omx notepad, omx project-memory)으로 분기된다(loadMemoryDescriptor, mcp-parity.ts:204). 즉 6개 CLI 명령이 5개 서버(state/memory/trace/code-intel/wiki)를 덮는다.

각 CLI 명령은 McpCliDescriptor(mcp-parity.ts:17)로 기술된다: commandName/title/tools/aliases/handle. 사용자 친화적 alias가 풀 도구명으로 매핑된다(예: omx state read → state_read, omx notepad write-priority → notepad_write_priority, mcp-parity.ts:193-200, 219-233).

4.2 핵심 트릭: autoStart-disabled import → 비-MCP in-process 실행

패리티가 MCP transport를 전혀 거치지 않는 방식이 정밀하다. 각 descriptor 로더는 서버 모듈을 import 하기 직전에 해당 서버의 auto-start를 끄는 환경변수를 임시로 켠다(importWithAutoStartDisabled, mcp-parity.ts:40-52):

async function importWithAutoStartDisabled<T>(envName, importer) {
  const previous = process.env[envName];
  process.env[envName] = "1";        // 예: OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START=1
  try { return await importer(); }   // 그 다음 import('../mcp/code-intel-server.js')
  finally { /* 원복 */ }
}

왜 필요한가? §6에서 보듯 모든 stdio 서버 모듈은 파일 맨 끝에서 autoStartStdioMcpServer(...)를 import 시점에 즉시 실행한다(code-intel-server.ts:679). 패리티는 이 서버를 실행하려는 게 아니라 그 안의 순수 핸들러 함수(handleCodeIntelToolCall, buildCodeIntelServerTools)만 가져다 in-process로 직접 호출하려는 것이다. 따라서 import 전에 disable env를 켜서 stdio 루프가 부팅되지 않게 막는다. disable env 이름은 서버별로 정확히 매핑된다(mcp-parity.ts:185, 209, 239, 256, 269):

CLI 로더 disable env import 대상
loadStateDescriptor OMX_STATE_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START state-server.js
loadMemoryDescriptor OMX_MEMORY_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START memory-server.js
loadTraceDescriptor OMX_TRACE_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START trace-server.js
loadCodeIntelDescriptor OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START code-intel-server.js
loadWikiDescriptor OMX_WIKI_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START wiki-server.js

실행 경로: executeDescriptorCommand가 alias를 풀고(mcp-parity.ts:142), 허용 도구 집합을 검증한 뒤(allowedTools Set, :143-148), descriptor.handle({ params: { name, arguments } })를 직접 호출하고(:150), extractPayload로 content[].text에서 JSON을 뽑아낸다(:117-130). 결과는 { ok, data } 또는 { ok: false, error }로 정규화되고 --json이면 그대로 직렬화 출력한다(runDescriptorCommand, :162). 동일 로직을 프로그래밍 방식으로도 노출한다(executeMcpParityCommand, :327) — 훅이 이걸 부른다(§5).

의미: MCP transport(stdio 파이프)가 죽거나 비활성인 환경 — Codex App, plain Codex 세션, transport 끊김 — 에서도 omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input '{"file":"..."}' --json 한 줄로 완전히 동일한 핸들러 코드가 실행된다. transport는 죽어도 코드 경로는 살아남는다. 이것이 단일 실패점 완화의 본질이다.

4.3 omx_hermes는 CLI 패리티가 없다

위 표에 hermes가 없다. McpParityCommandName 유니온(mcp-parity.ts:33)과 mcpParityCommand switch(:291-325)에 hermes 케이스가 존재하지 않으며, 소스 전체에서 mcp-parity.ts는 hermes를 단 한 번도 import 하지 않는다(grep 확인). 따라서:

  • omx hermes ... 같은 비-MCP CLI 표면이 없다.
  • hermes 도구(hermes_start_session/hermes_send_prompt/...)는 오직 MCP transport로만 호출 가능하다.

이는 우연이 아니라 역할 차이에서 온다. state/memory/trace/wiki/code-intel은 모두 로컬 파일·로컬 툴 위의 stateless-ish 조회/기록 도구라 in-process 직접 호출이 자연스럽다. 반면 hermes는 team/swarm 워커 사이의 실시간 dispatch·status·question/answer를 중계하는 라이브 코디네이션 브리지(본체 src/mcp/hermes-bridge.ts)다. 세션 수명·메일박스 상태를 가진 라이브 transport 위의 도구를 "한 방 CLI 호출"로 패리티 복제하는 것은 의미가 약하다(상대 워커가 살아 있어야 의미가 있으므로). 트레이드오프: hermes 경로는 transport 단일 실패점이 그대로 남는다. §5의 훅 폴백도 hermes를 매핑하지 않으므로(아래), hermes MCP가 죽으면 자동 CLI 폴백이 없다.

5. 훅의 McpTransportFailureSignal 처리 (src/scripts/codex-native-pre-post.ts)

[[00_omx_overview]] §4에서 본 PostToolUse 훅(codex-native-pre-post.ts)은 MCP transport가 도중에 끊기는 상황을 감지해, 모델에게 무작정 재시도하지 말고 CLI 패리티로 폴백하라고 지시한다. 이것이 §4의 패리티 층과 훅을 연결하는 고리다.

5.1 감지: detectMcpTransportFailure

detectMcpTransportFailure(payload)(codex-native-pre-post.ts:180)는 PostToolUse 페이로드를 정규화한 뒤(normalizePostToolUsePayload, :100) 두 가지를 본다.

  1. MCP-like 도구인가(isMcpLikeToolName, :132): 정규식 ^(mcp__|omx_(?:state|memory|trace|code_intel)\b|state_|project_memory_|notepad_|trace_)로 판별.
  2. transport 죽음 패턴인가(MCP_TRANSPORT_FAILURE_PATTERNS, :136): transport (closed|error|failed), server disconnected, connection (closed|reset|lost), \beconnreset\b, \bepipe\b, broken pipe, stream ended unexpectedly, stdio .*closed, pipe closed, mcp.* closed 등 10개 정규식.

MCP 도구면 raw stderr/stdout + 구조화 텍스트를 합쳐 보고, 비-MCP 도구라도 구조화 응답에 \bmcp\b나 omx-(state|memory|trace|code-intel)-server 컨텍스트가 있으면 검사한다(hasMcpTransportContext, :171). 매치 시 { toolName, summary }의 McpTransportFailureSignal(:37)을 반환한다.

5.2 폴백 처방: buildOmxParityFallbackCommand

신호가 잡히면 buildNativePostToolUseOutput(:1226)이 block decision을 내고 정확한 CLI 패리티 명령을 처방한다(:1230-1244):

const mcpTransportFailure = normalized.isBash ? null : detectMcpTransportFailure(payload);
if (mcpTransportFailure) {
  const fallbackCommand = buildOmxParityFallbackCommand(payload, mcpTransportFailure.toolName);
  // -> "Retry via CLI parity with `omx state read --input '{...}' --json`."
  return { decision: "block", reason: "...lost its transport/server connection...",
           hookSpecificOutput: { hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "..." } };
}

resolveOmxParityTarget(:206)가 도구명 mcp__omx_<server>__<tool>에서 패리티 명령을 역산한다:

toolName.match(/^mcp__omx_(state|memory|trace|code_intel)__([a-z0-9_]+)$/i)
//  state       -> omx state <tool(state_ 제거, _→-)>
//  trace       -> omx trace <tool>
//  code_intel  -> omx code-intel <tool>
//  memory + notepad_*        -> omx notepad <tool>
//  memory + project_memory_* -> omx project-memory <tool>

그리고 buildOmxParityFallbackCommand(:230)가 원래 tool_input을 그대로 직렬화해 omx <command> <tool> --input '<json>' --json을 조립한다(:234). 폴백을 못 만들면(매핑 안 되는 도구) 일반 권고 문자열로 대체한다(:1235).

추가 처방 텍스트(:1242)는 운영 지식을 담는다: "OMX MCP 서버는 plain Node stdio 프로세스라 stdin/transport가 닫히면 같이 죽는다", team 런타임 중이면 omx team status <team> 또는 omx team api read-stall-state ...로 먼저 상태를 캡처하고, 근본 원인은 OMX_MCP_TRANSPORT_DEBUG=1로 재현하라고 안내한다.

5.3 폴백 매핑의 사각지대 — hermes·wiki

resolveOmxParityTarget의 정규식은 (state|memory|trace|code_intel)만 잡는다(:207). 즉:

  • omx_wiki: CLI 패리티는 있으나(§4.1) 훅의 자동 폴백 매핑에는 없다 → transport 실패 시 자동 명령 처방 없이 일반 권고만.
  • omx_hermes: CLI 패리티 자체가 없고(§4.3) 폴백 매핑도 없다 → 이중으로 폴백 부재.

isMcpLikeToolName(:132)과 hasMcpTransportContext(:171)의 서버 목록도 state|memory|trace|code_intel만 열거한다. 결과적으로 transport 자동 복원 안전망은 state·memory·trace·code-intel 4종에만 완전하다. 이는 §2의 startup-timeout 차등(code_intel만 10s)과 함께, OMX가 조회/기록 계열 4종을 핵심 폴백 대상으로, hermes/wiki를 보조로 취급하는 설계 의도를 드러낸다.

6. 서버 기동·라이프사이클 (src/mcp/bootstrap.ts)

모든 1st-party stdio 서버는 공통 부트스트랩 autoStartStdioMcpServer(serverName, server)(bootstrap.ts:453)로 부팅된다. 각 서버 파일 끝에서 호출한다(예: code-intel-server.ts:679의 autoStartStdioMcpServer('code_intel', server)).

6.1 auto-start 게이트

shouldAutoStartMcpServer(bootstrap.ts:444)가 두 환경변수로 부팅 여부를 결정한다:

  • 전역: OMX_MCP_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START(GLOBAL_DISABLE_ENV, :17)
  • 서버별: SERVER_DISABLE_ENV(:8-15) — OMX_STATE_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START 등 6개.

둘 중 하나라도 "1"이면 stdio 루프를 띄우지 않는다. §4.2의 CLI 패리티가 import 전에 켜는 바로 그 플래그가 이것이다 — 패리티는 이 게이트를 빌려 "서버 코드는 로드하되 transport는 안 띄우는" 상태를 만든다.

6.2 부모/중복 형제 워치독 + idle teardown

부팅 시 두 워치독을 건다(bootstrap.ts:513-599).

  • 부모 워치독(:513, 기본 1초): 부모 프로세스(process.ppid)가 사라지면 shutdown('parent_gone') — Codex가 죽으면 고아 stdio 서버가 같이 정리된다.
  • 중복 형제 워치독(:524): analyzeDuplicateSiblingState로 같은 entrypoint의 더 새로운 형제 프로세스를 감지해, traffic 이후 idle 윈도우(기본 60초, DEFAULT_DUPLICATE_SIBLING_POST_TRAFFIC_IDLE_MS, :30)가 지나면 자신을 superseded_duplicate_after_idle로 self-teardown 한다(:575-579). pre-traffic 단계에선 엔트리포인트당 최대 형제 수(DEFAULT_MAX_SIBLINGS_PER_ENTRYPOINT = 4, :32) 초과 시 superseded_hard_cap_pre_traffic으로 즉시 종료.

모든 라이프사이클 이벤트는 writeMcpLifecycleTelemetry(bootstrap.ts:485)로 기록되고 OMX_MCP_TRANSPORT_DEBUG=1이면 stderr로도 찍힌다(:475). 이 텔레메트리가 §5.2의 디버그 권고(OMX_MCP_TRANSPORT_DEBUG=1)와 직접 연결된다.

6.3 Codex 레지스트리로의 등록 (omx setup)

omx setup은 MCP를 항상 등록하지는 않는다. mcpMode 설정이 두 값을 가진다(SETUP_MCP_MODES = ["none", "compat"], setup-preferences.ts:11)이고 기본값은 none(DEFAULT_SETUP_MCP_MODE = "none", setup.ts:237). 즉 OMX는 CLI-first가 기본이고, 실제 ~/.codex/config.toml의 [mcp_servers.omx_*] 등록은 --mcp compat로 옵트인해야 일어난다:

  • mcpMode === "compat"일 때만 mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock(generator.ts:2296)이 getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers(pkgRoot)(§2.1)의 서버들을 config.toml의 마커-바운드 블록(SHARED_MCP_REGISTRY_MARKER, generator.ts:106)에 동기화한다(shouldSyncSharedMcpRegistry, setup.ts:2084).
  • compat가 아니면 setup은 오히려 기존 first-party MCP 등록을 제거하자고 제안한다(promptForFirstPartyMcpRemoval, setup.ts:651; removeFirstPartyMcpRegistrations, :1796-1810).

이 정책은 §4의 CLI 패리티를 기본 경로로 승격한다. MCP 등록은 진짜 MCP 클라이언트가 필요한 호환 시나리오를 위한 opt-in이고, 평소엔 omx <command> --json이 1차 표면이다. mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock은 각 서버에 startup_timeout_sec를 함께 써넣어(generator.ts:2286) §2의 code_intel 10초 예산이 config.toml에도 반영되게 한다.

7. 아키텍처

graph TD
    subgraph Spec["단일 진실원천 (omx-first-party-mcp.ts)"]
        Specs["OMX_FIRST_PARTY_MCP_SPECS<br/>(6 servers, startupTimeout)"]
    end

    subgraph Setup["omx setup (mcpMode 기본 none)"]
        Compat["--mcp compat 일 때만"]
        Reg["mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock<br/>→ ~/.codex/config.toml [mcp_servers.omx_*]"]
    end

    subgraph Servers["stdio 서버 (autoStartStdioMcpServer)"]
        State["omx_state (5s)"]
        Memory["omx_memory (5s)"]
        CodeIntel["omx_code_intel (10s)<br/>tsc / ast-grep / grep"]
        Trace["omx_trace (5s)"]
        Wiki["omx_wiki (5s)"]
        Hermes["omx_hermes (5s)<br/>hermes-bridge"]
    end

    subgraph Parity["CLI 패리티 (mcp-parity.ts)"]
        PState["omx state"]
        PNote["omx notepad / project-memory"]
        PTrace["omx trace"]
        PCode["omx code-intel"]
        PWiki["omx wiki"]
        NoHermes["(hermes 패리티 없음)"]
    end

    subgraph Hook["PostToolUse 훅 (codex-native-pre-post.ts)"]
        Detect["detectMcpTransportFailure"]
        Fallback["buildOmxParityFallbackCommand<br/>(state/memory/trace/code_intel만)"]
    end

    Specs --> Compat --> Reg
    Specs --> Servers
    Specs --> Parity
    Reg -.MCP transport.-> Servers
    Parity -.autoStart-disabled import<br/>in-process handle().-> Servers
    Servers -->|transport 죽음| Detect
    Detect --> Fallback
    Fallback -.-> Parity
    Hermes -.폴백 매핑 없음.-> NoHermes
    Wiki -.폴백 매핑 없음.-> PWiki

8. 데이터 흐름

8.1 정상 호출 vs CLI 패리티 폴백

sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as Codex 모델
    participant MCP as omx_code_intel (stdio)
    participant Hook as PostToolUse 훅
    participant CLI as omx code-intel (parity)
    participant Tool as tsc/ast-grep/grep

    Model->>MCP: mcp__omx_code_intel__lsp_diagnostics
    alt transport 정상
        MCP->>Tool: npx tsc --noEmit
        Tool-->>MCP: 진단 출력
        MCP-->>Model: { diagnostics, command }
    else transport 죽음 (EPIPE 등)
        MCP-->>Hook: "transport closed" 응답
        Hook->>Hook: detectMcpTransportFailure → signal
        Hook-->>Model: block + "Retry via `omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input ... --json`"
        Model->>CLI: omx code-intel lsp_diagnostics --input '{...}' --json
        Note over CLI: OMX_CODE_INTEL_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTO_START=1<br/>로 import (stdio 미기동)
        CLI->>Tool: 동일 handleCodeIntelToolCall → npx tsc
        Tool-->>CLI: 동일 진단 출력
        CLI-->>Model: 동일 JSON
    end

8.2 setup 등록 분기

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as omx setup
    participant Pref as setup-preferences
    participant Gen as generator
    participant Cfg as ~/.codex/config.toml

    U->>Pref: resolveMcpMode (기본 none)
    alt mcpMode === "compat"
        U->>Gen: mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock(getOmxFirstPartySetupMcpServers)
        Gen->>Cfg: [mcp_servers.omx_*] + startup_timeout_sec 마커 블록
    else mcpMode === "none" (기본)
        U->>U: CLI-first; 기존 first-party MCP 등록 제거 제안
        Note over U: 도구는 omx <command> --json 로만 사용
    end

9. 기술 참조

핵심 파일 매핑

파일 역할 신뢰도
src/config/omx-first-party-mcp.ts 6서버 spec 단일 진실원천, setup/plugin 두 등록 형태, code_intel 10s 강
src/mcp/code-intel-server.ts omx-code-intel v0.1.0, 9도구, tsc/ast-grep/grep 래퍼, lsp_find_references=grep 강
src/cli/mcp-parity.ts CLI 패리티 6명령, importWithAutoStartDisabled, alias, in-process handle() 강
src/scripts/codex-native-pre-post.ts McpTransportFailureSignal, 감지 정규식, buildOmxParityFallbackCommand, block decision 강
src/mcp/bootstrap.ts autoStartStdioMcpServer, disable env 게이트, 부모/중복 워치독, idle teardown 강
src/config/generator.ts mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock, config.toml 마커 블록, startup_timeout_sec 기입 중강
src/cli/setup-preferences.ts SETUP_MCP_MODES = ["none","compat"] 강
src/cli/setup.ts DEFAULT_SETUP_MCP_MODE="none", compat 게이트, first-party 제거 제안 강
src/mcp/hermes-bridge.ts hermes 코디네이션 본체 (패리티 없음) 중

패리티/폴백 커버리지 매트릭스

서버 MCP 도구 CLI 패리티 훅 자동 폴백 매핑
omx_state ✅ ✅ omx state ✅
omx_memory ✅ ✅ omx notepad / project-memory ✅
omx_trace ✅ ✅ omx trace ✅
omx_code_intel ✅ ✅ omx code-intel ✅
omx_wiki ✅ ✅ omx wiki ❌ (정규식 미포함)
omx_hermes ✅ ❌ 없음 ❌ 없음

Claude Code MCP와의 대비 (vs [[09_cc_mcp]])

축 Claude Code oh-my-codex
MCP 파일 규모 162 파일 6 서버 + 패리티/부트스트랩 소수
transport stdio/sse/http/claudeai-proxy (4종) 로컬 stdio만
설정 소스 6소스 병합(claude.ai 계정 포함) spec 1소스, config.toml opt-in
리소스 표면 listMcpResources/ReadMcpResourceTool, blob 디스크 저장 없음
IDE 통합 DiagnosticsManager (MCP=LSP 브릿지) code-intel이 tsc/grep을 흉내
비-MCP 폴백 없음 CLI 패리티 + 훅 자동 처방
기본 활성화 MCP 등록이 1차 경로 CLI-first(none), MCP는 compat opt-in

10. 한계와 판정

한계

  1. hermes-server.ts/hermes-bridge.ts의 도구 시그니처는 §3.2에서 요약했으나 본 문서는 hermes 내부 dispatch 상태기계를 깊게 추적하지 않았다(패리티/폴백 부재만 확정).
  2. generator.ts의 mergeSharedMcpRegistryBlock이 생성하는 config.toml 블록의 정확한 TOML 레이아웃은 마커/타임아웃 기입까지만 확인했고, 충돌 병합 엣지케이스는 미검증.
  3. lsp_workspace_symbols/lsp_hover의 정규식 근사는 본질적으로 부정확(note: 'Regex-based approximation', code-intel-server.ts:547)하므로 "LSP"라는 이름이 과대표현이다 — 실제 LSP가 아님을 문서가 명시.

판정

OMX의 MCP는 "얇은 6서버 + 두꺼운 폴백" 구조다. Claude Code가 MCP 자체를 제품 표면으로 키운 것([[09_cc_mcp]])과 정반대로, OMX는 MCP를 선택적 호환 transport로 격하하고, CLI 패리티(mcp-parity.ts)를 1차 경로로 승격했다. 이 설계 덕분에:

  • transport가 죽어도(EPIPE/disconnect) 훅이 동일 코드 경로의 CLI 명령을 자동 처방한다(state/memory/trace/code_intel 4종).
  • code-intel MCP는 grep 신뢰성 스토리의 additive 해답을 구현하되, 바닥에선 여전히 grep/tsc/ast-grep을 호출한다 — 네이티브 검색을 교체하지 않는다.
  • 약점은 hermes(패리티·폴백 모두 부재)와 wiki(폴백 매핑 부재)에 집중된다.

11. cli-jaw 비교 시사점

  • (MCP-CLI 이중화를 코드 경로 공유로) OMX의 가장 이식 가치 높은 패턴은 importWithAutoStartDisabled로 같은 핸들러 함수를 transport 없이 in-process 호출하는 것이다(mcp-parity.ts:40). cli-jaw가 MCP를 핵심 도구 경로로 쓴다면, MCP 핸들러와 CLI 핸들러가 동일 함수를 공유하도록 설계해야 "MCP가 죽으면 CLI로 같은 결과"가 진짜로 보장된다(별도 구현 두 벌이면 드리프트 발생).

  • (transport 실패를 훅이 처방하게) OMX는 transport 죽음을 감지하면 모델에게 정확한 폴백 명령 문자열을 만들어 block-decision으로 주입한다(buildOmxParityFallbackCommand). cli-jaw도 "blind retry 금지 + 구체적 대체 명령 제시"를 훅 층에서 강제하면 MCP 장애가 무한 재시도 루프로 번지는 것을 막을 수 있다.

  • (폴백 커버리지 매트릭스를 명시적으로 관리) OMX의 사각지대(hermes/wiki 폴백 부재)는 폴백 매핑 정규식이 서버 목록을 하드코딩한 데서 온다(/^mcp__omx_(state|memory|trace|code_intel)__/). cli-jaw는 서버↔패리티↔폴백 커버리지를 §9 매트릭스처럼 단일 테이블로 관리하고 신규 서버 추가 시 세 곳을 동시에 갱신하는 lint를 두는 게 안전하다.

  • (startup-timeout를 도구 콜드스타트 예산으로) code_intel만 10초인 차등(omx-first-party-mcp.ts:35)은 "외부 툴체인(tsc/ast-grep) 콜드스타트를 가진 서버는 더 긴 핸드셰이크 예산을 줘야 한다"는 운영 교훈이다. cli-jaw가 무거운 백엔드를 가진 MCP를 붙인다면 일률 타임아웃 대신 서버별 예산을 spec에 박는 편이 오탐(서버가 살아있는데 죽었다고 판정)을 줄인다.

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

변경 기록

  • 2026-05-29: oh-my-codex v0.18.6 소스 기반 최초 작성. 6개 1st-party MCP spec(omx-first-party-mcp.ts, code_intel 10s startup 포함), omx_code_intel 9도구 및 grep/tsc/ast-grep 래퍼 실체(code-intel-server.ts), CLI 패리티 층(mcp-parity.ts, importWithAutoStartDisabled in-process 폴백), hermes 패리티 부재, McpTransportFailureSignal 감지·폴백 처방·hermes/wiki 사각지대(codex-native-pre-post.ts), 공통 부트스트랩 라이프사이클(bootstrap.ts, auto-start 게이트·워치독·idle teardown), setup 등록 분기(mcpMode none 기본/compat opt-in, setup.ts/generator.ts), grep-reliability additive 결론, Claude Code MCP 대비표, cli-jaw 시사점 4항.

이전 문서: [[09_cc_mcp]] 다음 문서: [[00_omx_overview]]

26

Axis 10: Memory pipeline

AXIS

010_memory-pipeline/10_omx_memory.md

Overview

Axis 10: Memory pipeline — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 171_oh-my-codex/ — memory pipeline.

  • 이 문서는 oh-my-codex(OMX) v0.18.6이 "턴을 넘어 살아남는" 메모리/상태를 어떻게 구현하는지 소스 기반으로 설명한다. OMX는 자체 LLM 루프나 자유서술 메모리 추출기를 갖지 않는다. 대신 이벤트 소싱 Rust 런타임(crates/omx-runtime-core)을 durable 상태 엔진으로 쓰고, .omx/ 파일시스템 레이아웃을 크로스세션 메모리 표면으로 노출하며, Codex 네이티브

  • ⚠️ 소스 기반: crates/omx-runtime-core/src/lib.rs(RUNTIME_SCHEMA_VERSION/명령·이벤트 어휘), replay.rs(ReplayState), engine.rs(fs2 락·persist·load·replay), authority.rs/dispatch.rs/mailbox.rs(durable 로그), `crates/omx-runtime/src/main.

  • [[Claude Code]]가 에이전트가 직접 markdown 파일에 쓰는 자율형 메모리 + API-level 서버사이드 compaction 조합인 것과 달리, OMX의 메모리는 이벤트 로그를 단일 진실원천으로 두고, 스냅샷·뷰·markdown은 그로부터 파생되는 구조다. 모든 상태 전이는 append-only RuntimeEvent로 기록되고, 재기동 시 그 이벤트를 처음부터 재생(replay)해 인메모리
  • graph TD
  • subgraph Cmd["명령 (RuntimeCommand)"]
  • C1["acquire/renew-authority"]
  • C2["queue-dispatch / mark-*"]
  • C3["create-mailbox-message"]
  • C4["request-replay / capture-snapshot"]
  • end

Topics covered

    1. 왜 이벤트 소싱인가 — "한 번의 추론 버스트를 넘어 살아남기"
  • 1.1 명령/이벤트 어휘 (lib.rs:18-43)
    1. RuntimeEngine — 상태 전이·영속·복구의 단일 지점
  • 2.1 process — 명령을 이벤트로 (engine.rs:103-191)
  • 2.2 persist — fs2 배타 락으로 직렬화 (engine.rs:232-252)
  • 2.3 write_compatibility_view — TS 리더용 섹션 파일 (engine.rs:256-286)
  • 2.4 load — 이벤트 재생으로 상태 재구성 (engine.rs:288-338)
  • 2.5 compact — 종료된 디스패치 이벤트 가지치기 (engine.rs:208-230)

  • 3.1 멱등 스킵 (replay.rs:23-26)
  • 3.2 cursor 재생과 보류 알림
  • 3.3 readiness 게이트와의 결합 (engine.rs:408-436)
    1. AuthorityLease / DispatchLog / MailboxLog — durable 통신
  • 4.1 AuthorityLease — 리더 단독 소유 (authority.rs)
